https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: For exceptional moments and rare encounters, Elixir de Bombe unfolds in robust notes of red pepper, ginger, and tangy tangerine. Paired with rock rose, raspberry, and sweet caramel, it creates a confident and slyly sensual experience that challenges conventional perfumery with its bold combination of spicy and sweet elements.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: Elixir de Bombe

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: Contemporary and visionary, Flâneur captures the essence of urban wandering with its green, faintly bitter scent of absinthe. The warmth of cashmere wood embraces linden and almond blossom, while fresh bergamot adds sparkle. The composition is grounded by elegant cedarwood and a sophisticated base of star anise, dry amber, and vetiver, creating a modern interpretation of the art of mindful wandering.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: Flâneur

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: Genetic Bliss is a groundbreaking molecular perfume that adapts to your unique body chemistry. This innovative creation combines five pure molecules, including Akigalawood®, Georgywood®, and Javanol, to create a signature scent that's as unique as your genetic code. The fragrance maintains a consistent, linear presence while harmoniously blending with your natural scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: Genetic Bliss

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: Hakuna Matata means 'no worries,' and this perfume captures that feeling perfectly. It's a playful and unique scent journey. Imagine the life of a banana, from the green peel to the ripe, sweet fruit. This fruity and gourmand fragrance is built around a surprising mix of banana and honey. It's a scent that's free, present, and full of easy grace. A truly unconventional and happy perfume.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: Hakuna Matata

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: Hamaca by 27 87 is a modern interpretation of a beach vacation captured in a bottle. Created by perfumer Shyamala Maisondieu in 2017, this fragrance masterfully combines marine freshness with tropical warmth, evoking the sensation of lounging in a hammock by the seaside. The composition balances salty marine accords with creamy coconut and grounding woods, creating a sophisticated summer scent that transcends typical beach fragrances.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: Hamaca

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: #hashtag is inspired by everyday digitalization. Cool, yet deep and smoky, it combines Somalian incense, Moroccan cedarwood, and iris from the Landes region. Blended with the metallic vibes of fresh aldehydes, it's a mirror and companion to modern life: grounded with a hint of tech appeal.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: #Hashtag

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: A contemporary fragrance that artfully blends ancient traditions with modern tribal rhythms. This sophisticated composition creates an intricate mosaic of contrasting elements, where cold smokiness meets mystical sweetness, and raw leather intertwines with gourmand touches.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: Mosaïque

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: Per sē [/ˌpɝː ˈseɪ/ from Latin per sē "by itself"] is not a scent. It's a sensory experience. From its avant-garde composition to its minimalist design, it echoes a new sensory universe that expands beyond the bottle. Per sē is our scent identity and the olfactive translation of our core belief: There is No Scent Like the Present. It combines the now. The achromatic, and the individual in a sensory experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: Per Sé

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: Guided by the sharpness of its namesake mathematical formula, Rule of 72 combines the muted elegance of saffron and geranium with vigorous natural Thai oud and creamy guaiac wood. Leather notes, along with vetiver and patchouli, whisper confidence rather than scream it — for a scent as resolute as it is ambitious.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: Rule of 72

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: Sónar by 27 87 captures the electrifying atmosphere of a rock concert, where the raw energy of music meets the industrial edge of modern life. Created by Jacques Huclier, this avant-garde fragrance combines the sweetness of tuberose with unexpected metallic accords and a unique beer note, creating an olfactory experience that pushes the boundaries of conventional perfumery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: Sónar

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.description: Inspired by the lust for novelty and exploration, Wandervogel combines exotic shiso, marine notes, and subtle sand accords, lending it an airy, near transcendent appeal. Combined with a soft note of rare Moroccan mint, it's a modern interpretation of exploration and lands unseen.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/27-.name: Wandervogel

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: Beaumont Sur Mer captures the glamour of the sunlit coast. White stone villas and endless nights await you. This powdery and woody scent brings the feeling of warm skin under the sun. It leaves a dense, unforgettable trail. Discover a deeply addictive and unique aura with a soft gourmand touch.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Beaumont Sur Mer

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: A charismatic woody gourmand boasting the savor of cardamom-infused fig, Clifton transports the wearer to Cape Town's luscious coastal landscape, weaving warm smoky spices with the milky sap of the fig for an olfactive escape that is both enveloping and serene. At the heart, vibrant notes of peach and sweet orange flower melt into the creamy layer of orris, while balmy sandalwood whispers of romance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Clifton

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: Indulge in the forbidden with a fragrance that embodies both temptation and elegance—a daring overdose of the world's most luxurious florals and woods, crafted to captivate every sense. The opening is a tantalizing blend of juicy plum and sparkling grapefruit, igniting the senses with a burst of fruity freshness. As it unfolds, a captivating symphony of florals and opulent woods takes center stage, creating a mesmerizing, layered complexity that's as timeless as it is modern. Elegant yet daring, sensual yet mysterious, this fragrance evokes the allure of the Garden of Eden—where beauty becomes sin and innocence is lured by darkness. A fragrance for those who dare to embrace their inner power, it's both classic and cutting-edge, seductive and bold—an intoxicating signature scent for anyone who seeks to leave a lasting, unforgettable impression. This perfume is a journey through floral and woody notes, with a touch of fruity brightness.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Eden

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: An intensely tempting fragrance evocative of the tropical beaches of the Dominican Republic, Juanillo is built around a delectable fusion of sultry gourmand notes. An opening of airy mandarin and vivacious orange delves into the heart of savory pistachio entwined with honeyed sweetness of dates, their delectable aromas softened and smoothed by the creamy coconut.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Juanillo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: An intriguing and sultry blend of floral, woody and gourmand notes, Numero Uno (I) is an embodiment of indulgence. Built around powdery allure of violet, it is framed by spiced baies rose and laced with a dash of rich, satiny rum. Violet's velvety aroma, a symbol of romantic love, takes center stage, unleashing an aura of sensuality and refinement.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Numero I

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: An irresistible fusion of nobility, elegance and luxury, Numero Due (II) defines the very essence of refined perfumery. This spectacular woody musky fragrance opens with an exhilarating duet of blood orange and sparkling saffron, leading to a sumptuous spiced heart of black pepper and cashmeran that evolves into a base of creamy sandalwood and majestic musk.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Numero II

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: A harmonious symphony of saffron, incense and leather, Numero Tre (III) kindles a deep, smoky warmth, while the tangy infusion of rhubarb lends a titillating fruity touch, striking the perfect balance between the light and dark notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Numero III

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: A darkly sensual floral elixir, Numero Quattro (IV) opens with an elegant current of zesty bergamot richly spiced with baies rose and deepened with majestic oud. Each note is gently layered on a bed of voluminous Bulgarian roses, the aromas coalescing into a beguiling sillage that ignites desire.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Numero IV

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: Numero V by Adamo is a luxurious extrait de parfum that pays homage to the mystical essence of coffee, combining dark, richly-brewed Brazilian coffee with Cambodian oud. Released in 2023, this immersive near-gourmand fragrance reflects dignity and composure through its sophisticated blend of coffee, chocolate, and precious woods.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Numero V

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: Romazzino captures the heat and joy of a Sardinian summer. It shines with radiant citrus and rich, golden almond. Pistachio and green tea add a fresh green touch. Peru oil brings warm, sun-baked resins to the mix. The base reveals a creamy trail of milk, Brazilian mate, and summer oud. Bold and sensual, this woody scent fills the air with pure summer magic.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Romazzino

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: An effervescent, graceful aquatic fougere, South of 5th captures the magical moment when the ocean splashes you with its salty spray and the relentless heat of a Miami day transitions to a golden hour's caressing embrace.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: South of 5th

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: Tawakkul tells a story on your skin. It starts with the rich sweetness of Amaretto liqueur, feeling like a velvet embrace. This initial scent meets the warm, spicy shimmer of cardamom. As it evolves, the heart reveals deep leather and oud, creating a dark and sophisticated mood. Finally, the scent settles into a soft, creamy caress of tonka bean. This fragrance balances elegance with leathery and resinous depth.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Tawakkul

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.description: **Uluwatu** is a mesmerizing and sensual fragrance. It opens with a bang: blackcurrant, zesty lemon, and the star, matcha tea. This mix is fresh and subtly green. Then, it softens into a floral heart. Think delicate orange blossom and airy muguet. The scent settles into a warm base. Rich amber, smooth vanilla, and earthy patchouli add depth. It's a scent of contrasts: bright yet warm, refreshing yet mysterious. **Uluwatu** leaves a trail of elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ada.name: Uluwatu

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: Black Muscs by Alexandre.J is an elegant and classy perfume that embodies the power and mystery of black. Created as an ode to elegance, it's imagined as a timeless tuxedo in fragrance form. This musky oriental fragrance is designed to be suitable for all genders, combining fresh citrus top notes with a floral heart and a warm, musky base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: Black Muscs

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: Imperial Peacock is a sophisticated fragrance from Alexandre J's Art Nouveau collection, presented in an opulent all-gold 25ml bottle. This oriental gourmand perfume, inspired by the Art Nouveau era's peacock motif symbolizing beauty and wealth, is housed in a sleek green cylindrical gift box adorned with a delicate gold ring.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: Imperial Peacock

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: Iris Violet is a fruity floral young and sophisticated fragrance. This is a tribute to the French royalty and celebration of the young and fresh Iris flower. Iris violet is a scent of energy and happiness that makes you cheerful throughout the day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: Iris Violet

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: Morning Muscs is a fascinating light, energetic and refreshing fragrance that helps you start your day right with its gentle, mood-boosting qualities. It combines fresh fruity notes with delicate florals and a musky base, creating a feminine yet versatile scent perfect for morning wear.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: Morning Muscs

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: The Oriental Floral and Woody Ravel in olfactive evocation inspired by the natural world of art and architecture. The opulent hand-blown bottles are made even more precious featuring patterns gilded with fine gold decadently packaged in lavish silk and leather... a nod to the period's significant impact on design and decorative art. Created to capture the mind and ensnare the senses, Ode to Rose hints at a sensually lavish scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: Ode to Rose

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: Oriental Enigma by Alexandre J. is a luxurious fragrance from the Art Nouveau Collection, presented in an opulent hand-blown bottle adorned with gold-gilded patterns. Released in 2022, this sophisticated creation by perfumers Anne-Sophie Behaghel and Amélie Bourgeois comes housed in lavish silk and leather packaging, embodying the grandeur of Art Nouveau design.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: Oriental Enigma

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: Discover a world where every moment resonates with intensity and sophistication. With its vibrant orange hue and bold geometric lines, Passion Bliss embodies joy and audacity. Inspired by South American traditions, where passion fruit is savored during family celebrations, it symbolizes sharing and renewal. Its vibrant and modern bottle is presented like a jewel, nestled in an orange leather case.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: Passion Bliss

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: Rose Alba by Alexandre.J is a luxurious tribute to one of history's most famous love stories - Mark Antony and Cleopatra. This fragrance combines Eastern and Western influences, creating a sophisticated blend that symbolizes love, beauty, and romance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: Rose Alba

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: The Majestic Jardin by Alexandre.J is a sophisticated woody-oriental fragrance launched in 2019. It masterfully combines fruity and spicy elements with a rich woody base, creating an intriguing and mysterious olfactory experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: The Majestic Jardin

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: The Majestic Oud by Alexandre.J is a sophisticated fragrance released in 2019 that masterfully combines smoky oud with spicy and woody elements. It features a complex blend of blackcurrant in the top notes, sage and patchouli in the heart, and a base of oud, amber, and musk.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: The Majestic Oud

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: The Majestic Vetiver by Alexandre.J is a sophisticated aromatic fragrance released in 2019. It combines fresh spicy notes of cardamom and basil with a touch of grapefruit in the opening, leading to a heart of liatris and coriander, before settling on a base of suede, labdanum, vetiver, and a subtle touch of oud.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: The Majestic Vetiver

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.description: Zafeer Oud Vanille is an oriental eau de parfum that masterfully combines gourmand and oriental elements. This luxurious fragrance opens with a blend of sweet coconut, caramel, and smooth leather notes. The heart reveals a sophisticated mix of tonka bean, blonde woods, clove, and ylang-ylang, while the base features a rich combination of vanilla, oud, and musk. The composition creates a perfect balance between sweet gourmand elements and oriental sophistication.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ale.name: Zafeer Oud Vanille

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/alo.description: A handcrafted natural perfume from Kiel-based Aloha Senses, inspired by Hawaiian fragrances. This warm amber creation combines refreshing citrus notes with exotic spices and precious florals, all wrapped in a comforting base of natural resins. Created by perfumer Corinna Kuhnert, it embodies the Hawaiian 'Aloha' philosophy of love and respect.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/alo.name: Amber - Warm Embrace

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/alo.description: Forever Young by Aloha Senses is a sophisticated natural perfume that captures the essence of timeless beauty and sensuality. Created by perfumer Corinna Kuhnert, this warm and rich composition balances the freshness of citrus with the depth of white florals and precious amber, creating an aura of eternal youth and elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/alo.name: Gigi - Forever Young

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/alo.description: Honi - Narcotic Kiss represents the traditional Hawaiian greeting where foreheads and noses touch while sharing breath, symbolizing a deep spiritual connection. This natural perfume embodies the essence of Hawaiian culture through its carefully selected ingredients and sustainable production methods. Created by Aloha Senses from Kiel, it represents their dedication to Hawaiian nature and culture while using 100% natural essences.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/alo.name: Honi - Narcotic Kiss

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/alo.description: KEANU, meaning 'evening wind that blows from the sea into the mountains' in Hawaiian, captures the essence of Pacific breezes meeting tropical woods. This natural perfume embodies the transition from day to night, where wild ocean winds merge with the aromatic forest landscape of Hawaii.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/alo.name: Keanu - Sensitive Vagabond

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/alo.description: MANA, meaning 'supernatural power' in Hawaiian, is a fragrance that embodies the radiant energy within. This natural perfume combines energizing citrus notes with exotic white florals and a warm, comforting base, designed to enhance your inner glow and confidence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/alo.name: Mana - Luxurious Glow

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.description: Anfas Dhai is an exquisite perfume that seduces the senses with a fascinating and mysterious presence. This fragrance is a homage to the beauty of nature and the deep connection with the environment.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.name: Dhai

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.description: Ghala by Anfas is a captivating oriental fragrance that captures the elegance and sophistication of the Middle East. Opening with a vibrant blend of citrus fruits, the fragrance evolves through a heart of exotic florals and spices, before settling into a warm, woody base. The composition masterfully combines bergamot, orange, and black currant in the top notes, followed by rose, jasmine, and precious oud in the heart, while rich sandalwood, amber, and musk create a lasting impression in the base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.name: Ghala

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.description: Anfas by Asim Al Qassim Haneen - Eau de Parfum is a sensual and seductive fragrance that enchants the senses with its sweet and floral presence. This fragrance embodies the feeling of love and passion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.name: Haneen

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.description: Ishq means 'admiration': A fragrance that reflects the extent of loyalty and admiration. Created by Asim Al Qassim, this perfume embodies the essence of deep love and sacrifice. The scent of sour red fruits represents the delicious mixture of sacrifice and love, touching all senses, while vanilla symbolizes faithfulness and eternal devotion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.name: Ishq

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.description: Jannah, meaning 'Paradise' in Arabic, embodies the concept of heavenly beauty and eternal bliss. This luxurious fragrance from Anfas, created by the first certified perfumer in the UAE, Asim Al Qassim, represents a harmonious blend of floral opulence and aquatic freshness, adorned with a sophisticated musky foundation.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.name: Jannah

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.description: Mada is more than a perfume—it is a testament to continuity, a journey that never truly ends. It is the essence of bold exploration, of footprints left on boundless horizons, of a presence that endures long after the moment has passed. A story of timeless beauty, captured in a single drop. This fragrance is a journey through leathery, fruity, and spicy realms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.name: Mada

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.name: Anfas Oriental Journey

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.description: Rahaba - 'Welcome to my life' - The warm air gently caresses the skin as it flows through the houses, carrying all the scents it has encountered along the way. Everything is prepared for a heartfelt welcome: precious details, beautiful gifts, an atmosphere of abundance, and magnificent moments full of warmth. The invitation to enter the house becomes a reality - a place where one finds peace and immerses in the vibrant energy of spaces created to welcome guests.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.name: Rahaba

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.description: Salam means 'Hello' and establishes the first contact... In the heat of a sunny day, two people destined for each other come towards each other on the street. In this narrow street far from the busy downtown, every small detail catches the passerby's eye. The scent of fresh fruit flows from the houses, the sweet aroma of cut flowers fills the air: All this is a sign, an omen of peacefulness and tranquility. The energy exchange happens as they stand facing each other. His eyes sink into hers, feeling safe and calm as the world around them seems to drift in a whirlwind of emotions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.name: Salam

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.description: Shaouq is an opulent Oud explosion accompanied by the sensual warmth of sandalwood. The richness of vanilla and raspberry unfolds while subtle accents of orange, rose, and lavender bloom. A touch of mandarin and bergamot adds an additional nuance, making it an unforgettable olfactory experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/anf.name: Shaouq

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Argos Adonis Awakens is inspired by the legend of a Greek god and the goddess of love. It tells a story of desire and loss through scent. Based on a famous painting, this fragrance is romantic and bold. It captures the moment of awakening with a powerful and emotional aura. It is a timeless choice for those who want a scent that feels alive.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Adonis Awakens

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Bacio Immortale means immortal kiss. It tells the ancient love story of Eros and Psyche. This scent captures that divine romance perfectly. It blends elegant citrus with deep woods and soft smoke. It is a timeless and royal perfume. You will feel a powerful aura that carries you through the day. This fragrance is a lovely journey through leathery, fruity, and woody notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Bacio Immortale

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Argos Birth of Venus is a tribute to the goddess of love. Inspired by Botticelli's art, it radiates beauty and elegance. This floral and fruity perfume feels like a warm embrace. It blends sweet notes with a sophisticated woody base. It is a luminous scent for those who want to feel divine.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Birth of Venus

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Inspired by the Greek goddess Artemis, this fragrance embodies the thrill of the hunt. Brivido Della Caccia is wild yet elegant. It tells a story of instinct and nature. The scent captures a rugged landscape filled with aromatic herbs and woods. It is a bold choice for those who love leathery and green perfumes. This scent is an adventurous journey through the wilderness.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Brivido Della Caccia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Inspired by the mythological ferryman of the underworld, this fragrance embodies a journey across the River Styx. It captures the mystery of the transition between worlds. The scent evokes a dark, ritualistic atmosphere like a cathedral of trees. It blends deep woody elements with rich resins for a solemn vibe. It invites you to explore the shadows with a lasting presence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Charon's Vail

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Danae is inspired by the Greek myth of the golden rain. It tells the story of Zeus visiting the imprisoned princess. The scent captures this divine and sensual moment, much like Gustav Klimt's famous painting. It is an opulent blend that feels rich and luxurious. This fragrance fits perfectly into the woody and citrus families.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Danae

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Inspired by the dramatic mythology of Phaeton's fall, this perfume captures a moment of chaos and beauty. It reflects the intensity of Peter Paul Rubens' famous painting. The scent is bold and powerful, telling a story of fire and thunder. It blends bright energy with deep, dark tones. This fragrance takes you on a journey through spicy, woody, and leathery landscapes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Fall of Phaeton

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Argos Fire and Desire: Vulcan's Revenge Extrait de Parfum brings a dramatic Greek myth to life. It is inspired by the secret affair of Venus and Mars, who were caught by the fire god Vulcan. This scent captures that intense moment of passion and retribution. It balances raw power with seductive charm. You will experience a rich blend of woody, floral, and spicy notes. It represents the heat of desire and the fury of a betrayed god.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Fire & Desire: Vulcan's Revenge

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Step into a world of rebirth and renewal. Inspired by Sandro Botticelli's famous painting, this fragrance captures the heavy, opulent side of spring. It is a rich floral tapestry that feels elegant and deep. Velvety vanilla blends with earthy vetiver to create a lasting aura. This is not a light breeze, but a powerful musk experience that celebrates life.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: La Primavera

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Argos **Love Triumphs over War** captures a dramatic moment in history. It is inspired by a famous painting by Rubens. Venus, the goddess of love, gently disarms Mars, the god of war. This floral scent represents peace and passion winning over conflict. It shows how beauty can stop chaos. The fragrance mixes strength with seduction. It is perfect for a romantic soul who believes in the power of love.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Love Triumphs over War

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Midas Touch by Argos tells the legendary tale of a king whose wish turned everything to gold. It captures the tension between dazzling beauty and hidden danger. Imagine a warm sunbeam that feels rich and heavy with luxury. This perfume is an opulent creation that demands attention. It balances bright light with deep shadows. The composition takes you on a journey through floral, resinous, and leathery landscapes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Midas Touch

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Dive into the deep blue with Neptune's Trident. This perfume from Argos is inspired by the Roman god of the sea. It balances the calm and the storm. You will smell bright citrus notes mixed with soothing tea. It feels powerful yet peaceful. The scent captures the spirit of the ocean with a deep aquatic touch. It is perfect for those who love fresh and aromatic fragrances.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.name: Neptune's Trident

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/arg.description: Channel your inner goddess with Argos Pallas Athene. This scent is bold, radiant, and empowering. It captures the spirit of a warrior woman. The fragrance blends bright floral notes with deep woody accords. It feels commanding yet elegant. Perfect for making a statement.
