https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.name: Musk Kashmir

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.description: Musk Kashmir is one of the most sensual scents. It is completely different from anything you have smelled before. Think of it as your second skin, your inner self brought to life. A white cloud of light musk haze settles on your shoulders, as pure as spring water. This fragrance tells a story from the mystical Himalayas, where the snow never melts. It's a heavenly scent, almost too complex for words, but simply divine.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.name: Musk Kashmir Extrait

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.description: Qalbi is an exquisite oriental fragrance. It opens with a vibrant burst of bergamot, pink pepper, and ginger. A hint of spice adds a delicate warmth. The heart reveals a luscious blend of ylang-ylang and orange blossom, creating a captivating floral embrace. The base is rich with oud, sandalwood, and the earthy sophistication of akigalawood. This creates a long-lasting and sensual foundation. It's a luxurious and timeless scent for those seeking an opulent signature.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.name: Qalbi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.description: Second Skin is an enigmatic symphony of sensuality. This luxurious amber fragrance starts with the bright zest of bitter orange. The heart unfolds with a delicate floral embrace of Rosyfolia® and Mahonial®. The scent deepens into a velvety base of modern musk molecules, creating a smooth and long-lasting trail. It's a scent that feels like a second skin.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.name: Second Skin

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.description: Sierra by Attar Collection is a sophisticated modern fragrance that masterfully combines spicy, floral, and woody elements. Created by perfumer Gaël Montero, this luxurious scent is housed in a striking blue marble bottle that reflects its contemporary elegance. The fragrance represents a perfect balance between vibrant spices and warm woods, making it a captivating addition to the niche perfume world.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.name: Sierra

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.description: Slate Blue starts with a fresh splash. Think bright bergamot, zesty lemon, and sweet mandarin orange. A hint of warm nutmeg adds a sophisticated twist. The heart is a cool mix of sage, geranium, and neroli. This creates a confident, charming vibe. The scent settles into an earthy, rich base. You'll find smooth cedarwood, green vetiver, and creamy sandalwood. It leaves a feeling of quiet luxury. A timeless aromatic and citrus scent for effortless elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.name: Slate Blue

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.description: This is the golden age of the heyday of the Persian empire. A pattern of taste and luxury was the palace of the greatest King Darius - Persepolis - everything in that palace was decorated with gold, everywhere there was an expensive brocade, the air was enveloped in the delicate fragrance of incense. The king's favorite wife - young Artastun was an extraordinary beauty who wore light organza tunic and the finest flax, caressing her hair with vanilla and patchouli. She surrounded herself with flowers, and sweet incenses were always lit in her apartments.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.name: The Persian Gold

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.description: The Queen of Sheba evokes the legacy of the mysterious Oriental queen from Ethiopia who visited King Solomon bearing precious gifts of gold and fragrant spices. This black masterpiece, launched in 2015, captures the essence of classic oriental elegance in luxury packaging. The fragrance embodies power, glamour, and captivating sophistication worthy of its royal namesake.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/att.name: The Queen of Sheba

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/aur.description: A.E.O.M. (All Eyes On Me) is a luxurious extrait de parfum created by Cécile Zarokian that captures the essence of success born from inner strength and self-confidence. This oriental-woody composition combines rich boozy notes with spices, resins, and woods to create a powerful yet sophisticated fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/aur.name: A.E.O.M.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/aur.description: In the nocturnal embrace of darkness, a scent lingers in the air, weaving ties of addiction. Ouroboros, the eternal symbol, watches as passions ignite, entangling hearts in its fiery grasp. Gwen, a name whispered, holds dominion over desires, commanding obedience from those who yearn for her touch. Yet within the depths of this submissive dance, a silent longing for freedom whispers, urging souls to break free from Gwen's seductive chains and discover liberation in their own wild, untamed hearts.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/aur.name: Gwen

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/aur.description: Characterised by unbridled energy, TestoX's long-lasting silhouette underscores the striking, dynamic and at times audacious character traits of its wearers.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/aur.name: TestoX

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.description: Alid is a soft and cuddly fragrance that feels like a warm embrace. It embodies deep longing and inner peace. Inspired by the lonely Alid volcano in Eritrea, this scent captures a calm yet confident spirit. It offers seductive freshness and timeless elegance. Experience a journey through fruity and floral landscapes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.name: Alid

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.description: Dubbi captures the raw energy of Eritrean volcanoes. It symbolizes a powerful connection, like lava flowing into the sea. The scent balances effortless lightness with profound depth. This floral and woody fragrance feels both modern and deeply natural.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.name: Dubbi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.description: Gufa offers a fascinating scent journey that stands out from the crowd. It starts with a lively mix of fruits, avoiding any sticky sweetness. As it evolves, a sharp spiciness takes center stage, adding character and depth. The dry down reveals a warm, leathery touch that lingers comfortably. It is a masterful blend of fruity, spicy, and amber styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.name: Gufa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.description: Jalua captures the spirit of wanderlust. It takes you on a journey through Ethiopia, Eritrea, and Djibouti. The scent reflects breathtaking landscapes and solitary volcanoes. It is a mix of leathery spice and creamy blooms. This perfume is for those who find themselves while traveling. It is inspired by Africa and crafted in Milan.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.name: Jalua

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.description: Mabda captures the magic of Djibouti in a bottle. It is a refreshing yet intense scent, inspired by love and vast African landscapes. The vibe is silky and soft, unlike harsh incense fragrances. It mixes fruity zest with smoky mystery. This perfume offers a unique journey for lovers of complex floral scents.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.name: Mabda

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.description: Nabro by AZYA is a rich amber fragrance released in 2024. It blends sweet fruits with a complex mix of spices and deep woods. As an Extrait de Parfum, it offers a strong and lasting presence. This scent is ideal for those who enjoy a warm and sophisticated floral experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/azy.name: Nabro

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: The fifth and final instalment of the Revenants collection draws inspiration from the Elizabethan poet Sir Philip Sidney. In his Sonnet sequence 'Astrophel and Stella' Sidney develops and captures the essence of a haunting… the presence of one that is always felt but never seen.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Absent Presence

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: Acrasia by Beaufort London is a haunting and seductive fragrance inspired by a 16th Century epic allegorical poem and its sorceress character. Created by perfumer Julie Dunkley in 2022, this sophisticated composition masterfully blends boozy wine notes with dark florals and resinous elements.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Acrasia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: Inspired by the relationship between the sea and the art it has inspired. Pen and ink drawings of yachts, libraries of nautical fiction and tattoos are all referenced here in this enveloping, dark fragrance. Accords of black Ink dominate; spiced rum; papers lost and found; the familiar dry accords of leather bound books balanced with warm enigmatic notes of vanilla pipe tobacco. All finely based around a dark heart of birch tar and labdanum.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Cœur de Noir

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: Fathom V by Beaufort London is a challenging aquatic fragrance that reimagines the concept of marine scents. Created in 2016, it contrasts the above and below of the sea, blending salt with earth, sparkling herbals with dark mosses, and bright florals with intense spices.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Fathom V

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: Meet the Director's Cut of Fathom V. This limited edition celebrates ten years of the original scent. It is an extra strong version packed with 150% more perfume oil. Known as the 'big green beast', this fragrance brings hidden details to life. It is very powerful and lasts all day. Only 1000 numbered black bottles exist worldwide. Each one is a wild ride through green and aquatic worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Fathom V Director's Cut

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: Iron Duke by Beaufort London is a powerful fragrance that pays tribute to the Duke of Wellington. Created in 2017 by perfumer Julie Dunkley, this bold composition blurs the line between man and beast, creating an olfactory representation of horse and rider in battle.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Iron Duke

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: Lignum Vitae by Beaufort London is a unique fragrance inspired by marine chronometers, combining elements of wood, metal and salt. Created in 2016, it celebrates the innovative spirit of early clockmakers through an unexpected blend of exotic materials.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Lignum Vitae

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: Inspired by the works of satirist William Hogarth, Rake & Ruin by Beaufort London is a debauched fragrance that captures the essence of gin-soaked 18th century London. Created by perfumer Julie Dunkley in 2018, this bold composition combines botanical gin ingredients with dark woods, smoke, and animalic notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Rake & Ruin

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: Terror & Magnificence by Beaufort London is a complex fragrance inspired by Georgian architect Nicholas Hawksmoor. It combines elements of ancient Egyptian mysticism with Gothic architectural atmosphere, featuring church incense, candle wax, papyrus, and a distinctive wet stone accord. Created by perfumer Pia Long in 2019, it represents the dark and mysterious elements of Hawksmoor's architectural legacy.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Terror & Magnificence

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: Inspired by historical relics and the darkly evocative stories that surround them, Tonnerre employs bold ingredients in extremely high concentrations to conjure a uniquely powerful olfactory experience. Accords of smoke, gunpowder, blood and brandy combine with sea spray and a penetrating citrus note. Singularly bold in its composition, yet ultimately refined, provocative and unique.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Tonnerre

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.description: Vi et Armis by Beaufort London is a challenging and provocative fragrance that celebrates smoked ingredients. Created in 2015, it's an intense blend of lapsang souchong tea, heavily peated whisky, dark tobaccos, spices, and opium. The fragrance has been described as 'chaos in a bottle' and 'an alchemist's Christmas party', featuring heavily overdosed ingredients that create a singular and narcotic experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bea.name: Vi et Armis

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ber.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ber.name: Time Travel: J.F. Schwarzlose Berlin

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bes.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bes.name: Argos Mythology Collection

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bes.description: Immerse yourself in the world of Parfums de Marly with this exclusive Parfinity Box! 👑 Discover five exquisite fragrances that capture the essence of femininity, elegance, and irresistible charm. From fresh, floral notes to sensual, gourmand accords – this collection is a tribute to the modern woman who celebrates her individuality. Find your new signature scent and enjoy complete flexibility: the value of this box will be 100% credited towards the purchase of a full-size bottle. ✨ The fragrances in your box: Valaya Valaya is like a fresh, white cotton shirt – radiant and soft at the same time. This fragrance, created by Quentin Bisch, plays with contrasts and feels both fresh and comforting. Imagine your skin warmed by the sun and wrapped in clean linen. It is a modern interpretation of floral, musk, and fruity notes. Valaya opens with a bright burst of fresh bergamot and juicy white peach. A heart of delicate white flowers like orange blossom adds a clean, soft touch. The fragrance settles into a powerful and long-lasting base of modern musk, warm Ambrofix, and a hint of woody Akigalawood®. A clean, slightly synthetic scent with a soft, fruity sweetness. 🍑 Delina Delina, also created by Quentin Bisch, is a modern floral bouquet full of charm. A fragrance that is both sweet and sensual, celebrating flowers like rose, lily of the valley, and peony. Zesty notes of lychee and rhubarb give it a fruity twist. The base is warm and soft, with vanilla, musk, and Cashmeran creating a beautiful powdery finish. The fragrance opens with a tart and juicy burst of rhubarb and lychee, brightened by bergamot. The heart is a beautiful floral blend revolving around a lush rose and delicate peony. It dries down to a comforting and sensual base of creamy vanilla, smooth Cashmeran, and clean musk. 🌹 Delina Exclusif This captivating interpretation of the famous Delina, also by Quentin Bisch, is a deeper and more sensual version of the original. It opens with fruity notes of pear, lychee, and grapefruit. The heart is a beautiful bouquet of Turkish Damascena rose, blended with a hint of frankincense and vetiver. The fragrance settles into a warm and soft base of vanilla and musk. A lush opening of juicy lychee and sweet pear creates a bright, fruity start. The heart reveals a rich, velvety Turkish Damascena rose, made more complex by a touch of smoky frankincense. The drydown is a creamy and powdery dream, with warm vanilla and soft musk lingering beautifully on the skin. ✨ Cassili Cassili, created by Calice Becker and Nanako Ogi, is a joyful, sparkling, and playful perfume. It is a delightful blend of delicate fruits and light flowers, with a hint of vanilla and wood. This fragrance is made for those who love modern elegance. The famous plum note makes it special and vibrant. A perfect blend of playful and classic, a truly fruity and floral experience. The fragrance opens with a juicy burst of red currant and sweet plum. A beautiful bouquet of white flowers, tropical frangipani, and powdery mimosa forms the heart. The fragrance settles into a warm and creamy base of sandalwood, sweet vanilla, and cozy tonka bean. 🌸 Oriana Oriana, by Nathalie Lorson and Hamid Merati-Kashani, is a fragrance all about texture. Imagine a mille-feuille of sweetness, softness, and sensuality. It opens with a bright splash of citrus, then reveals a heart of cheerful orange blossom and juicy fruits. The real treat is the base: a cloud of fluffy marshmallow and sweet Chantilly cream. This perfume is a true delight, a perfect blend of gourmand, fruity, and floral notes. A sparkling start of juicy mandarin and grapefruit leads to a sweet heart. Here, orange blossom meets tart raspberry. The fragrance settles into a dreamy, addictive base. Fluffy marshmallow and airy Chantilly cream form a soft cloud, with a hint of warm musk and ambrette. 🍰
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bes.name: Best of Parfums de Marly (Women)

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bes.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bes.name: Best of: Thameen

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bis.description: Bonne Nuit opens with a surprise. Sweet fruits meet spice for a first impression that grabs you. It feels like a longing glance across the room. Deep inside, earthy moss mixes with cinnamon and sticky honey. A smooth touch of whiskey adds a smoky and grown-up feel. The base is warm and stays with you for a long time. It blends rich woods and musk with soft vanilla. This scent explores woody, amber, and gourmand styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bis.name: Bonne Nuit

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Almas, Arabic for 'diamond', embodies the endurance and intensity of a precious gem. This bold pure perfume features rich and creamy opulence that ignites the warrior within, inspiring total self-assurance. Like a diamond's multifaceted brilliance, this fragrance combines strength with sophistication, creating an aura of timeless luxury.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Almas

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Inspired by the feelings of falling in love, Ardent is both addictive and alluring. Rich with emotion and warmth, this stirring fragrance combines the nobility of rose with honeyed beeswax and exotic spices. Creamy and comforting while passionate and intriguing, it is the perfect scent for both new beginnings and enduring love.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Ardent

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: A burst of sunshine with a nod to the exotic, Blue Sapphire celebrates happy and carefree times with its uplifting personality. Created in honour of Queen Elizabeth II and Prince Philip's 65th wedding anniversary, this pure perfume combines dewy florals with oud and sparkling citrus. The composition features a supple leather accord linking gin-tonic freshness to a compelling dark oud and amber base, while patchouli adds earthiness to the lush floral heart.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Blue Sapphire

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: A warm and inviting scent full of Eastern promise. Cherry dominates this gourmand tour de force, but its sweetness is tempered with the inclusion of clove, pepper and a host of light woods. Bodacious is a mature and seductive delight that captures the essence of luxury and sophistication.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Bodacious

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Consort, a regal fragrance from Boadicea the Victorious, presents an ambiguous blend that masterfully balances fresh citrus notes with sophisticated woody undertones. This modern interpretation of classic freshness offers versatility for any occasion, from business meetings to casual outings, making it a perfect companion for the contemporary individual seeking refinement.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Consort

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Dasman by Boadicea the Victorious is a luxurious oriental fragrance that captures the essence of Middle Eastern opulence. This masterful creation centers around a rich triumvirate of roses, golden saffron, and amber, opening with an unexpected boozy character and a subtle menthol undertone that echoes the petrolic facets of certain roses.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Dasman

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Layers of imaginatively composed notes, accords and technologies by Kamila Lelakova, the first female perfumer for Boadicea the Victorious, has produced a bold perfume of tenacity and emotional impact. Defender opens with a rebellious shout of zesty ginger, grapefruit and unexpected swirls of dark liquorice and honeyed cognac mingled with a fascinating red berry compote and hints of kirsch.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Defender

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Dragon illustrates the perfect blend of power and sublime sophistication. The strength and fluidity of the dragon oozes from the first spray of this refined scent. The bright top notes are indicative of the height and breath of this magnificent beast, while the floral heart denotes its beauty and potential to seduce. Dragon celebrates 2024 being a Chinese year of the dragon, representing power, nobility, honour, luck, and success.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Dragon

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: A fragrance of positivity and reflection, Energizer captivates with its uplifting and dancing citrus tones that transport you away from the everyday. Its true beauty emerges in the calm and muted musky dry down, creating a lasting impression that leaves the soul yearning for more.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Energizer

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Glorious is an enchanting blend that captures the essence of English fruit orchards. The fragrance unfolds with ripe fruits basking in warm sunlight, where plump peaches and crisp apples mingle with wine-colored raspberries. Morning dew glistens on emerald grass while blossoms release their heady perfume into the air. This luxurious composition perfectly balances fruity opulence with sophisticated woody undertones.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Glorius

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Created to celebrate the Year of the Monkey, Hanuman captures the quintessential qualities of the monkey deity, embodying intelligence, strength, courage, loyalty and creativity. This sophisticated fragrance represents the harmonious balance between power and spirituality, offering a journey of inner peace through its carefully crafted composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Hanuman

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Exclusive to Selfridges and Boadicea online, Harmonious brings balance to life. A scintillating scent with a positive and calming disposition, Harmonious exudes sweet and spicy accords that soothe the soul. A refined yet intoxicating fragrance that masterfully blends boozy notes with powdery iris and warm spices.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Harmonious

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Imperial by Boadicea the Victorious conjures up the majestic reassuring rulers of the past and present, creating a calm and powerful presence. This noble fragrance combines traditional British refinement with exotic Middle Eastern opulence, embodying authority and sophisticated elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Imperial

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Throw routine cares out of the window and let hope flourish with this extravagantly uplifting perfume, blessed with a bright buoyancy that elevates it high above the ordinary. Bergamot dashed with lemon gives a sense of expectancy; orange flower and rose are peppered with nutmeg to add a sumptuous, spicy centre; vetiver, guaiac wood and moss feature among a plethora of base notes designed to bring richness and refinement.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Lavish

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Monarch by Boadicea the Victorious is a regal fragrance that exudes opulence and sophistication. This distinguished composition combines warm spices, precious woods, and refined leather to create a scent worthy of royalty. The fragrance maintains perfect balance between grandeur and accessibility, making it a testament to refined luxury.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Monarch

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: A truly opulent perfume where oud takes center stage, with other materials orbiting like planets around a smoky, woody sun. The name Nemer derives from the Arabic word for Tiger, referencing Tiger Oud extracted from distinctively striated bark patterns. This prestigious creation showcases a full-bodied, velveteen oud that's smooth and deeply aromatic, exemplifying British refinement with Middle Eastern character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Nemer

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.description: Valiant, part of the Zodiac collection representing The Year of the Horse, embodies agility, boldness, and good humor. This luxurious fragrance pays homage to the free-spirited steeds that led Boadicea into battle against Roman rule. A masterful blend that captures both elegance and strength, Valiant represents the courage and determination of warriors while maintaining a sophisticated floral character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boa.name: Valiant

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: From the start it evokes the crystal clarity of a midsummer day. Its original freshness, which does not conceal the personality of the wearer, it is achieved by concentrating the hesperidian note. The middle note presents a flowery procession. The fragrance extends over an elegant, sensual base note enriched by refined boisé notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Agrumi Amari Di Sicilia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Escape from normality and seek out the most intense olfactory stimulus. Abstract is a sensory hurricane, a blend of warm and aromatic notes that sets itself no limits, able to fascinate and amaze.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Astratto

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: A fragrance that defies the traditional rules, reinterpreting them with a modern twist. The greatest expression of the Cannabis buds, a debut of pureness, a voluptuous heart for a piercing, slightly impudent perfume.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Cannabis

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: A fragrance that defies the traditional rules, reinterpreting them with a modern twist. The greatest expression of the Cannabis buds, a debut of pureness, a voluptuous heart for a piercing, slightly impudent perfume.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Cannabis Dolce

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: A fragrance that defies the traditional rules, reinterpreting them with a modern twist. The greatest expression of the Cannabis buds, a debut of pureness, a voluptuous heart for a piercing, slightly impudent perfume.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Cannabis Fruttata

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: A modern and unconventional fragrance that boldly reinterprets traditional perfumery rules. Cannabis Salata by Bois 1920 showcases the pure essence of cannabis buds, combined with citrus, spices, and salty notes for a distinctive and slightly rebellious character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Cannabis Salata

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Centenario by Bois 1920 is a celebration of the brand's heritage, blending Florentine tradition with exotic elements. This fragrance combines precious Iris and warm Jasmine with exotic flowers like Tiaré and Ylang-Ylang, creating a bridge between the brand's Italian roots and its global presence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Centenario

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Classic 1920 by Bois 1920 is a sophisticated fragrance that masterfully blends spicy and floral elements with elegant fruity nuances. Created in 2005 by Enzo Galardi, this versatile scent combines traditional perfumery with modern sensibilities. The composition opens with fresh bergamot, aromatic basil, and warm nutmeg, complemented by sweet apricot. The heart reveals a complex floral bouquet of lavender, osmanthus, and rose, while the base settles into a refined woody foundation of Caribbean sandalwood, vetiver, and subtle amber.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Classic 1920

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Classic Paradise by Bois 1920 is a warm, eclectic fragrance that releases happiness through its intriguing olfactory pyramid. Created in 2021 by perfumer Christian Carbonnel, it features an abundance of natural accords and a refined floral-fruity bouquet where Orange, Peach, Magnolia, and Lavender stand out in elegant harmony. The composition is completed with an inebriating touch of Amber and Sandalwood.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Classic Paradise

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Seductive and mysterious, it is an encounter between citrusy notes of Grapefruit and Bergamot, spaced out to sensual ones of Cinnamon and Pepper. Thyme, Cardamon, Nargamutta and Prune intertwine in the heart, creating a memorable alchemy. The dry down seals and exalts the fragrance, extraordinary woods, Patchouly, Cashmere and Gaiac, elegant Vetiver, Sandalwood and Cedarwood, bound with tender Vanilla and virile Labdanum.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Dolce Di Giorno

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Elite I by Bois 1920 is a fresh marine fragrance launched in 2019. A sparkling composition opens with citrus notes of lemon and mandarin, leading to a heart of marine notes blended with white florals (tuberose, gardenia, and lily). The base features a sophisticated blend of sandalwood, tonka bean, vanilla, and musk.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Elite I

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: An elegant olfactory pyramid, finely soft in all its evolution. The delicacy of Rose drifts to notes of White Flowers, Amber and Precious Woods. A refined lightness which seizes the mind revealing its inebriating charm.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Elite II

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: A mystical, irresistible, mysterious fragrance. A complex olfactory pyramid, a timeless journey, cradle of past memories... The sensual essence of Rose joins the precious notes of Jasmine and Ylang-Ylang, while fragrant accords of Patchouly introduce Incense, creating a lofty dry down.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Elite III

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: A warming and intense fragrance, a glimmer of passion full of imagination and sensorial facets. The entire evolution, characterized by the amber dry down, conceals a mysterious, exciting and creamy heart thanks to the enlightened union of Honey, Iris and Tobacco notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Elite IV

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Frammenti by Bois 1920 is a modern fragrance released in 2023. It's a complex blend that opens with vibrant blackcurrant and rhubarb, complemented by fresh bergamot, grapefruit, and green notes. The heart reveals a rich floral bouquet of geranium, magnolia, rose, and violet, enhanced by frankincense. The base settles into a sweet, warm combination of amber, benzoin, caramel, vanilla, and white musk.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Frammenti

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Capturing the soul of an ancient historic Florentine pub at dawn, when the lights go out and the scent of memories comes alive. The intensity of the accord of Whisky, Leather and Tobacco evokes a night of party and excess around a gaming table, when the last laughs and secrets exchanged between friends blend in the air.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Gioco all'Alba

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Insieme by Bois 1920 is a fruity-aquatic fragrance released in 2019. The intensity of Mandarin, combined with the gentleness of Raspberry and Strawberry, shapes the top notes, recalling the fruity senses of a hot summer landscape. The dry down, softened by Vanilla, lays down on a White Musk and Amber bed.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Insieme

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Notturno Fiorentino is a seductive feminine fragrance that captures the essence of a mysterious Florentine night. Created by Enzo Galardi for Bois 1920, this enchanting perfume combines precious floral notes with warm, spicy undertones and a sophisticated gourmand base, making it perfect for evening wear and romantic occasions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Natturno Fiorentino

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Oltremare by Bois 1920 is a sophisticated citrus-aquatic fragrance launched in 2011. Created by Enzo Galardi, it opens with a vibrant blend of Italian citrus fruits, leading to a unique heart of various teas and rhubarb, finally settling on a base of ambergris and white musk.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Oltremare

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Oro 1920 by Bois 1920 is a luxurious and sophisticated fragrance launched in 2013. Created by perfumer Enzo Galardi, this scent masterfully combines leather, woods, and resins with unexpected fruity notes. It opens with an innovative blend of fir balsam, raspberry, frankincense, and ginger, leading to a heart of precious orris absolute, gaiac wood, may rose, opoponax, and osmanthus. The base reveals a rich combination of leather, benzoin, tobacco, beeswax, and vanilla.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Oro 1920

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Elegant, impressive, demanding. The magnificence of Damask Rose and Peony interwines the refinement of Ylang-Ylang, creating a perfect blend of passion, gentleness and charm. A fascinating combination enanched by a breezy wisp of woods and Vanilla offering a peerless intensity.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Oro Bianco

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Oro Nero elevates in a mysterious and bold way the olfactory notes of Oro 1920. Inside Oro Nero elegant Saffron notes blend with an intense Bergamot, Orange and Clove create an exciting, spicy, oriental note. The middle note presents a woody procession where Patchouly and Sandalwood interwine Cedarwood and Ylang-Ylang. Leather, Amber and Vanilla notes delineate a harmonious end.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Oro Nero

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: A contemporary, innovative olfactory composition. A refined accord of Fruity Notes envelops the brightness and the effervescence of the Rose for an exciting sillage, enriched by the delicate touch of Vanilla.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Oro Rosa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: A sensual, graceful, enchanting composition where the softness of the Jasmine intertwines the spicy warmth of Saffron, enchanting the aphrodisiac and fascinating side of the fragrance. The dry down is daring, sublimated by intense woody notes which exalt rich accords of Musk and Oak Wood.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Oro Rosso

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Paranà by Bois 1920 is a sophisticated woody-fruity fragrance launched in 2018. It combines luxurious leather birch notes with fruity nuances of black currant and Italian Bergamot, while its heart intertwines Rose and Moroccan Jasmine. The base is completed by woody and amber notes, creating a unique and sophisticated personality.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Paranà

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Real Patchouly by Bois 1920 is a sophisticated eau de parfum launched in 2005. Created by Enzo Galardi, this sensual and intense fragrance reveals itself through facets of Indian Sandalwood and Texan Cedarwood, while base notes of Vanilla and Amber emphasize its dominant woody harmony.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Real Patchouly

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: The first sniff worms in sinuous and charming, bewitches the mind like an olfactive spell…the intriguing encounter between May Rose and Incense is literally magic, and a dusting of Sugar makes this elixir irresistible. The heart is enveloping, moreish and sensual, wafts of exotic Everlasting and Davana rise up warmed by smooth touches of Sandalwood. This philtre completes itself in the dry down, where vibrant woods, Vetiver and Patchouli, lose sweetly themselves into the voluptuous embrace of Vanilla and Black Amber.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Relativamente Rosso

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: A sophisticated bouquet created to express timeless elegance and femininity. The fine Bergamot from Calabria and Chinese Mandarin melt with the liveliness of Blackcurrant and the freshness of Litchi fruit. Head notes evolve into a sensual flowery heart, in which the elegance of the petal bouquet of Bulgarian Rose fuses with the preciousness of the absolute essence of Turkish Rose. The combination is surrounded by Lily of the valley and Bamboo flower. The warm bottom notes of Lebanese Cedar, Asian Patchouli and Amber embrace the femininity of the Iris flower to underline this unique fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Rosa Di Filare

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: An enveloping and fascinating fragrance that combines the herbaceous freshness of Sage, accompanied by the lively and sparkling accord of Bergamot and Cardamom. Incense and Helichrysum add mystery and luxury, while Cedar, Sandalwood add depth and sensuality.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Sandalvia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Scorzaforza is an intense and powerful fragrance, the result of a disruptive wave of citrus notes which trigger vivacity and freshness thanks to Lemon, Mandarin and Bergamot. The effervescence of Mint blends with Lily of the Valley and a light note of Rose. White Musk, Amber and Patcholuy characterize the sillage, giving an aura of enveloping elegance and refinement.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Scorzaforza

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Scuro by Bois 1920 is a mystical and meditative fragrance that showcases the strength and mystery of incense. Released in 2023, this perfume artfully combines citrus freshness with resinous depth, creating an intriguing balance between light and dark elements.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Scuro

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Sensuality and femininity transformed into an olfactive creation. The mellow and thrilling notes of Tuberose charm at first approach, surrounded by sparkling spicy touches of Coriander and luminous sparkles of Peach. In the heart, a white blossoms bouquet of Jasmine and Orange Blossom blooms inebriating, while creamy and tender scents of Coconut and Heliotrope hypnotize. The dry down is daring and voluptuous, an encounter between Sandalwood, Patchouly and Benzoin, laid down on a White Musk bed and enwrapped by precious Iris.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Sensual Tuberose

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: An intense beginning where the citrus notes blend harmoniously for an eau de parfum that speaks of love. The heart releases its spicy personality: the vibrant and exotic luminosity of Pepper, Nutmeg and Cinnamon. The fragrance develops into a brilliant and almost nonchalant wisp of woods and Vanilla of Madagascar.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Sushi Imperiale

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Imagine an unusual and personal fragrance that harmonizes the liveliness of bright daylight and the elegance of timeless nights. The top note reveals the sparkling character of Mediterranean citruses, as it warms and binds with a noble, seductive boise heart to finish with touches of Patchouly, Amber and Incense.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Vento Di Fiori

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.description: Vetiver Ambrato by Bois 1920 is an elegant and seductive fragrance launched in 2005. Created by Enzo Galardi, this sophisticated composition embodies the power and mystery of modern masculinity while maintaining a refined balance. The fragrance opens with sparkling citrus and green notes, evolves through a warm spicy heart, and settles into a rich, ambery-woody base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/boi.name: Vetiver Ambrato

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Angels' Powder is a wild ride into a pink, sugary fantasy. It captures the chaotic fun of a carnival mixed with an edgy, urban vibe. Imagine the smell of fresh cotton candy swirling in the air, clashing with the sharp scent of nail polish. It is sweet, eccentric, and addictive. This fragrance is a statement piece for those who love gourmand scents with a synthetic twist.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Angels' Powder

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Borntostandout delivers an uncompromising and provocative experience with this scent. Black Creme evokes the sensation of hot wax melting on skin. It balances raw power with velvety smoothness. The vibe is dark yet comforting. It feels like a strong embrace in a tuxedo. This fragrance explores the depths of gourmand, leathery, and woody styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Black Creme

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Released in 2025 and crafted by perfumer Suzy Le Helley, this fragrance is a bold statement. Black Guava captures the vibe of a tropical noir. It mixes the bright fun of fruit with a mysterious, dark edge. Imagine a fresh smoothie spiked with something intense. It is perfect for those who want a fruity scent that is not childish. The woody base makes it serious and lasting. It fits well in spring and autumn, cutting through the grey days with energy.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Black Guava

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Black Karak is a bold mix of tradition and rebellion. It takes the idea of Karak tea and turns it into a loud, daring scent. This perfume is for those who want to show off their courage and creativity. It fits perfectly into the spicy, tea, and woody families.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Black Karak

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Meet Black Mango by Borntostandout. This is not a shy perfume. Released in 2025, it mixes ripe fruit with dark vibes. It smells like a sticky gourmand treat that fell into a bonfire. If you like fruity scents with a heavy leathery twist, this is for you. It is strong and lasts a long time.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Black Mango

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: DGAF by Borntostandout is a fragrance for those who live by their own rules. It captures the electric vibe of a crowded nightclub. Think of loud beats, hot energy, and no regrets. This scent is fresh yet deep, perfect for making a statement day or night. It seamlessly blends aromatic, spicy, and woody elements for a truly confident style.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: DGAF

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Imagine a white paradise with a dark twist. Dirty Heaven is not your typical boring scent. It mixes bright flowers with heavy sweetness. The vibe is creamy and addictive. You get a blend of floral beauty and amber heat. It feels like high-quality melted ice cream. This gourmand fragrance grabs attention and holds it.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Dirty Heaven

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Dirty Milk is not your average sweet scent. It mixes childhood nostalgia with a grown-up twist. Imagine a glass of warm milk swirled with gooey caramel. But there is a secret here. Black pepper and deep musk make it bold and a bit wild. It is creamy, thick, and addictive. This perfume walks the line between a cozy gourmand and a sexy animalic skin scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Dirty Milk

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Dirty Rice is a surprise. Despite the name, it is not dirty at all. It is a clean and cozy scent from Borntostandout. Perfumer Olivier Cresp created a fragrance that feels like warm skin or a milky bath. It mixes woody notes with a soft musk vibe. This lactonic perfume is subtle and intimate. It is perfect for those who want a unique but quiet scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Dirty Rice

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Drunk Lovers captures the rush of a wild night. It tastes like sweet berry notes and strong cognac. It feels like a lover's embrace. The scent is bold and fun. It fits those who love boozy and woody vibes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Drunk Lovers

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Borntostandout brings a cheeky twist to the classic fig scent. While many fig perfumes focus on the dry leaf, Fig Porn is all about the ripe, pulpy fruit. It is inspired by the ancient belief that figs are symbols of fertility and desire. This scent captures a moment of pure pleasure. It starts fresh but melts into a creamy, warm embrace. It fits perfectly into the fruity and green categories.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Fig Porn

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Indecent Cherry is pure fun in a bottle. It feels like bright neon lights and pop art. This perfume is not dark or heavy. Instead, it reminds you of sweet lollipops and fancy shampoo from the 90s. It is a cheeky and flirtatious scent. The vibe is modern and bold. It mixes fruity notes with a cool synthetic edge. It is made for those who love to play by their own rules.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Indecent Cherry

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Intimacy meets sterile freshness. Naked Laundry creates a provocative contrast between the scent of fresh sheets and warm, bare skin. It is not your typical clean fragrance. It challenges the nose with a sharp, almost bleach-like opening that slowly melts into something more carnal and sweet. This creation by **Borntostandout** plays with our perception of purity. It bridges the gap between synthetic cleanliness, dirty musk, and comforting gourmand warmth.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Naked Laundry

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Welcome to a paradise of flavor. Nanatopia is a bold scent that does not follow the rules. It captures the smell of warm baking with a wild kick. Borntostandout delivers a unique gourmand experience here. It is perfect for those who want to smell edible but sophisticated. This fragrance mixes fruity sweetness with a boozy edge.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Nanatopia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Nuts by Borntostandout is a fun and addictive scent. It captures the rich aroma of roasted nuts glazed in syrup. The fragrance balances sweetness with a smooth, boozy edge. It fits perfectly into the gourmand style. Ideal for those who love bold, edible scents with a twist.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Nuts

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Don't let the name fool you. Oud Candy is not a simple sugar rush. It is a bold mix of gourmand sweetness and dark power. The scent starts with crispy, burnt sugar rather than soft cotton candy. Then, it dives deep into a dry world of woody elegance and leathery strength. This perfume is for those who want to stand out. It is strong, unique, and truly intense.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Oud Candy

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Borntostandout creates a fragrance that truly leaves a mark. Purple Stain is an intense experience that divides opinion. It combines freshness with a dark, brooding depth. Fans describe a phantom note of black grape mixing with spices. It feels modern yet nostalgic, evoking memories of powerful classics. This scent fits perfectly into the woody, spicy, and gourmand families.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Purple Stain

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Sugar Addict creates an insatiable craving. It represents the pure joy of sweetness in a bottle. This is not just a candy scent; it is sophisticated and dark. Imagine the thrill of a sugar high mixed with warm spices and booze. It is perfect for those who love bold gourmand fragrances that demand attention.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Sugar Addict

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Amber Cologne is a shimmering and effervescent creation that captures the energising and invigorating qualities of citrus fruits and floral aromas. As the sun sets and the sultry hot summer air begins to mellow, the aromas of citrus groves and exotic flowers waft through the air. Lemon, grapefruit, bergamot and sweet orange provide a tantalisingly juicy opening with sambac jasmine and frangipani providing the perfect counterpoint. Smooth woods and exotic oud blend with ambergris and vanilla in the base for a fragrance which captures the feeling of a perfect summer evening in an exotic land.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Amber Cologne

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Chypre du Nord by Bortnikoff brings a classic chypre style into the modern world. This extrait de parfum uses rare ingredients to craft a rich and elegant profile. Instead of old-school florals, it relies on a creamy peach to feel fresh and inviting. Underneath, a warm animalic touch makes it truly unique. It is a timeless scent that wraps you in beauty, perfect for any season or occasion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Chypre du Nord

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Cologne de Feu by Bortnikoff is a modern interpretation of a classic cologne structure, elevated with gourmand elements. This 2022 creation combines bright citrus notes with sophisticated fruity accords and precious woods, offering a refined and refreshing experience that bridges traditional cologne with contemporary perfumery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Cologne de Feu

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Dubai by Bortnikoff is a luxurious extrait de parfum that masterfully combines Middle Eastern opulence with contemporary sophistication. This 2024 creation showcases Dmitry Bortnikoff's expertise in working with precious materials, particularly genuine Hindi oud, creating a harmonious blend that bridges fruity freshness with deep, resinous warmth.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Dubai

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Lao Oud represents the pinnacle of oud-based perfumery, featuring an exceptionally powerful and animalic agarwood composition. This masterful creation combines precious oud oils from Laos and India with rich coffee notes, creating a dark and mysterious fragrance that captures the essence of ancient Vientiane. The composition is enriched with beeswax, cacao, and subtle floral touches, resulting in a complex and unforgettable olfactory experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Lao Oud

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Musk Cologne is a masterful creation that combines precious natural musk with fresh citrus notes and elegant florals. This sophisticated fragrance showcases the mysterious allure of genuine Siberian deer musk, a substance more valuable than gold, known for its ability to enchant the senses. The composition represents a perfect balance between classical refinement and modern wearability, making it suitable for various occasions while maintaining its luxurious character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Musk Cologne

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Musk Khabib is a luxurious creation that showcases the mysterious and captivating qualities of natural deer musk. This exceptional fragrance combines precious ingredients like ambergris, oakmoss, and tonka beans to reveal the profound beauty and carnal sensuality of musk, while maintaining an elegant and sophisticated character that appeals to distinguished perfume connoisseurs.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Musk Khabib

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Mysterious Oud is a masterful blend of precious oud oils from India, Vietnam, and Thailand, combined with warm spices and resins. This extrait de parfum showcases the authentic agarwood aroma with an intense yet playful character, complemented by citrus freshness and light floral elements. The composition demonstrates Bortnikoff's expertise in working with high-quality natural materials, creating a complex and sophisticated oriental fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Mysterious Oud

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Oud Maximus is a masterful creation dedicated to the perfumer's son Maxim, showcasing the richest expression of wild oud oils. This extraordinary composition features a carefully balanced blend of multiple precious oud varieties from Laos, India, Thailand, and Sri Lanka, harmoniously combined with four distinct rose oils. The fragrance represents the pinnacle of exotic luxury in natural perfumery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Oud Maximus

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Oud Monarch is a masterful creation dedicated to the most precious of ingredients - genuine oud oil, traditionally reserved for royalty in the East. This extrait de parfum showcases two exceptional varieties of oud, complemented by exquisite florals and rich gourmand elements, creating a fragrance worthy of monarchs.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Oud Monarch

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Bortnikoff Oud Journey

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Sayat Nova is a fragrance inspired by the legendary 18th Century Armenian poet and troubadour of that name. The scent evokes the romantic mysticism of exotic lands and bygone centuries. This exceptional creation fuses dark and intense woody tones with rich and luscious sweetness, creating an opulent masterpiece that captures the essence of romance and unbridled passion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Sayat Nova

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Sir Winston is a sophisticated tribute to the legendary British statesman, embodying both strength and refinement. This masterfully crafted fragrance combines rare ingredients including real ambergris and Indonesian Bouya oud, creating an opulent composition that bridges tradition with luxury. It represents the essence of English aristocracy while maintaining a contemporary appeal, perfect for those who appreciate exceptional quality and complexity in their fragrances.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Sir Winston

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.description: Tabac Doré is a masterful oriental fragrance that captures the essence of noble luxury from the East. The composition features precious tobacco absolute containing over 300 components, including intriguing pyrazines and sweet fruity damascenones, combined with wild oud from Thailand and Vietnam. This thick, dark blend of oils creates a unique and mysterious oriental experience, enhanced by vanilla absolute, balms, and resins.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/bor.name: Tabac Doré

base: Wild Oud from Thailand and Vietnam

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.description: Truly classic and timelessly elegant, 1888 Casamorati is a scent experience like no other. Spicy oriental in character, this perfume serves as a sensual souvenir from a bygone era and is inherently Italian in spirit. Opening with fresh green pepper and precious Iranian saffron, the exotic heart of Indonesian ylang-ylang and Moroccan neroli tempts and seduces. The nose is left wanting more, with a classic base of mysore sandalwood, patchouli and amber.

Bouquet Ideale is a spicy oriental perfume from the Casamorati collection by Xerjoff, created in 2009 by perfumer Jacques Flori. This vintage-inspired fragrance celebrates the ancient art of Italian perfumery with its warm, sophisticated blend of spices, woods, and sweet notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.name: Bouquet Ideale

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.description: Beautifully light, feminine and sensual, this classic white scent opens with zesty lime and Florentine iris, inviting the nose in closer to a heart of Egyptian jasmine, violet and lilac. Exotic base notes of Indonesian sandalwood and vanilla beans from Zanzibar offer an earthy embrace in Dama Bianca Casamorati. An inspiring vintage scent that celebrates the ancient art of Italian perfumery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.name: Dama Bianca

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.description: Take an unforgettable journey across the Amalfi Coast with this beguiling scent. Romantic and beautiful, Dolce Amalfi Casamorati immediately evokes the ancient roads of its namesake town, with gourmand top notes of apple saffron quince and cardamom. Intense heart notes of clove bud, incense and tolu balsam lead to a woody base accord of vanilla tonka bean and cedarwood.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.name: Dolce Amalfi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.description: Be transported to the beautiful landscape of an olive grove, with the sweet sound of the Mediterranean shores lifting your spirits. Undeniably floral in character, this magical springtime scent conjures a joyful mood, with fresh lotus flower top notes leading to a heart of olive flowers and jasmine absolute. Benzoin, amber and musk offer a warm base accord. An inspiring vintage scent that celebrates the ancient art of Casamorati perfume.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.name: Fiore d'Ulivo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.description: A joyful expression of the innocence of young love, Gran Ballo Casamorati takes the senses on a spin in the grand palace. In Italica Casamorati a sweet warm heart of Bourbon vanilla and buttery toffee leads the nose to a luscious base of sandalwood, cedar wood and white musk.

A symbol of renewal, whose scent breathes new life onto the person it is sprayed upon in a baptism of new beginnings.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.description: Mysterious and provocative, Lira Casamorati makes a striking statement. Simple and understated, it packs a punch that is hard to resist. Fresh bergamot and blood orange top notes lead the nose to a classic heart of rose jasmine and liquorice blossom In Lira by Casamorati the gourmand base notes of vanilla musk and caramel dial up the seduction. An inspiring vintage scent that celebrates the ancient art of Italian perfumery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.name: Lira

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cas.description: Mefisto Gentiluomo is a refined Italian niche fragrance from Casamorati's collection, launched in 2018. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cli.description: A contemporary masterpiece of perfumery, bridging the gap between history and the future, this fragrance is a tribute to 150 years of the Crown Perfumery legacy. A symphony of elegant notes unfolds from the complexity of 203 ingredients, with the warmth of nutmeg and cedarwood harmonising with earthy moss and the invigorating essence of single malt. Nodding geranium heads stir alongside hedgerow berries, subtly complemented by a hint of black pepper, weaving captivating olfactory tales for the wearer.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cli.description: An timeless tribute to the artistry of true perfumery, evoking the grandeur of a storied past. This creation is a testament to the 150-year legacy of the Crown Perfumery. This refreshing perfume comes to life with a complexity of 187 ingredients, starting with the vibrant notes of bitter orange, lime, and the subtle sparks of ginger. These lively elements dance alongside classic English lavender, cool mint, and coriander seed, accentuated by the warm spice of nutmeg. A base of leather, musks, and amber cradles the fragrance close to the skin, offering an unmatched olfactory experience.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cli.description: 1872 for Men by Clive Christian is a luxurious woody-citrus fragrance launched in 2001. Created by perfumer Geza Schön, it features 219 ingredients and was inspired by the year Queen Victoria granted the Crown Perfumery Company the right to use the crown symbol. The fragrance comes in an elegant emerald green bottle adorned with a royal crown.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cli.name: 1872 for Men

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cli.description: 1872 for Women by Clive Christian is a luxurious citrus-floral fragrance launched in 2001. Created by perfumer Patricia Choux, it features an exquisite blend of 146 ingredients, including precious May Rose absolute, where 170 rose petals are required for a single drop. The fragrance represents the heritage of Crown Perfumery, founded in 1872.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cli.name: 1872 for Women

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cli.name: Crab Apple Blossom

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/cli.description: Clive Christian No. 1 for Women, launched in 2001, is considered one of the world's most prestigious perfumes, featuring 248 rare and precious ingredients.
