This is delicately spiced with star anise and cloves to bring a unique twist to the composition which is bright and fresh.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Auster

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: An elegant pairing of woods, aromatic herbs and luxurious caviar. The luxurious saltiness of caviar blends perfectly with the sage, rosemary and lavender to create an aromatic heart resting on a woody earthy base with oakmoss and patchouli. Oceanic lavender fit for an emperor.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Black Caviar

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: A truly indulgent cherry confection of Bacchanalian intensity, served on a silver platter. Caspian Cherry is an epicurean delight, an extravagant and tantalising fragrance that perfectly captures the lavish scent of cherries, set against an elegant gourmand backdrop.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Caspian Cherry

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: A celestial bouquet of roses with mystical incense and spices. Luminous, indulgent, confident.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Celestial

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: A magnetic pairing of irises wrapped in suede. Daring, complex, electric. Cupid's Kiss is a sumptuous and timeless blend of the softest suede and tempting orris. Inspired by the complexity of love, Cupid's Kiss is multifaceted and contradictory, in turn showing elements which are sensuous, delicate, nostalgic, and powerful.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Cupid's Kiss

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: Noble, charming, intense. A triumphant oud fragrance that radiates character. Gladiator Oud pays tribute to the strength and fortitude of Roman gladiators. With warm, spicy, and woody notes, this intense scent captures the bravery and skill of these fearless warriors, igniting imaginations and sparking curiosity.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Gladiator Oud

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: Imperium by Electimuss is a luxurious pure parfum that combines sparkling citrus notes with creamy florals and a sophisticated woody-vanilla base. Created by perfumer Sofia Bardelli in 2019, this fragrance represents power and elegance in the tradition of ancient Rome.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Imperium

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: Mercurial Cashmere embodies the charm and allure of the messenger of the gods, Mercury. With its luxurious blend of floral, woody, and gourmand notes, this fragrance promises to captivate attention and leave an irresistibly addictive trail wherever it goes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Mercurial Cashmere

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: A bountiful harvest of exquisite and honeyed Medjool dates, with the golden warmth of the oasis. Moroccan Medjool is a sumptuous fruity amber that combines the caramel sweetness of dates with the golden warmth of the desert. The scent opens with bright and fruity notes, with a dewy citrus freshness setting a scene of sunrise over the oasis.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Moroccan Medjool

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: Majestic and noble, a rose scent with timeless appeal. Rich, bold, majestic The heart of Octavian circles around a powerful bouquet of roses skilfully blended with the finest Iranian oud. This luscious composition harnesses the timeless beauty of both these elements drawing on influences from both Eastern and Western perfumery to produce a majestic and powerful scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Octavian

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: Patchouli of the Underworld is a dark and mysterious fragrance from Electimuss, created by perfumer Kévin Mathys. This pure parfum opens with a riot of spices, combining black and pink peppers with lighter touches of mandarin and opulent cistus. The scent evolves into an earthy and raw composition, creating the atmosphere of a hidden underground kingdom where precious stones glitter against darker surfaces.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Patchouli Of The Underworld

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: A pleasure-evoking patchouli scent with a gourmand twist. Delightful, demure, inviting Persephone's Patchouli enters with a fresh and elegant cardamom lightly laced with plum and pomegranate. Bright and uplifting, the fragrance has the energy and feel of a warm spring day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Persephone's Patchouli

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: Puritas, created by Christian Provenzano in 2020, embodies the definition of perfume through smoke and purity. This virtuous and evocative fragrance opens with a sharp, almost medicinal top. Elemi, pink pepper, and saffron are joined with the bitterness of absinthe to create a fusion of elements reminiscent of an apothecary's shop full of drying herbs.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Puritas

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: Spice D'Arno by Electimuss is a luxurious pure parfum that captures the essence of comforting spices flowing with the rhythm of the Arno river. Created by perfumer Céline Barel in 2024, this complex composition offers a harmonious blend of spicy, sweet, and resinous notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Spice D'Arno

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: Trajan embodies the spirit of exploration and trade along the Silk Road. Inspired by Emperor Trajan's pioneering spirit, this scent blends citrus, herbs, and woods, offering a versatile and long-lasting aroma.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Trajan

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: A decadent vanilla scent that reveals the light and dark sides of this exotic orchid fruit. Opulent, hedonistic, exciting. Vanilla Edesia enchants with a lively blend of citruses, spices, and rich vanilla. Inspired by the Roman goddess of feasting, this luxurious fragrance intertwines creamy sweetness and warm spices, creating a truly elevated gourmand experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Vanilla Edesia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.description: Vixere by Sofia Bardelli is a luxurious pure parfum that captures the essence of a stroll through beautiful palace gardens. Created in 2019, this distinguished and romantic fragrance offers an indulgent, sensual and creamy floral composition that represents a life well-lived.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ele.name: Vixere

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: Essential Parfums presents Bois Imperial, a masterful creation by Quentin Bisch that exemplifies modern woody perfumery. This eco-friendly fragrance combines natural and synthetic ingredients to create a sophisticated, versatile scent suitable for both professional settings and casual wear. The composition showcases innovative molecules like Akigalawood and Ambrofix alongside traditional ingredients, resulting in a fresh, woody signature that's both contemporary and timeless.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Bois Imperial

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: Bois Impérial Extrait de Parfum is a masterful intensification of the original fragrance, concentrated at 32%. This nocturnal interpretation reveals a darker, richer character with enhanced depth and sensuality. Created by perfumer Quentin Bisch, it represents the ultimate expression of woody sophistication combined with spicy allure.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Bois Imperial Extrait de Parfum

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: Divine Vanille pays homage to sustainably sourced Madagascar Vanilla absolute, creating a masterful blend of warmth and sophistication. This creation by Olivier Pescheux showcases vanilla in its most refined form, complemented by natural ingredients that enhance its mysterious and suave character. The composition demonstrates Essential Parfums' commitment to sustainable luxury, offering an accessible yet premium fragrance experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Divine Vanille

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: Inspired by the light of a sunny day in the south of France, Nathalie Lorson has composed an optimistic and reassuring fragrance. The reminiscent smell of an afternoon dreaming in the orchard, comfortably installed under the fig trees.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Fig Infusion

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: Mon Vetiver by Essential Parfums is a charismatic and elegant composition centered around natural Haitian vetiver. The fragrance features an unexpected gin accord infused with fresh Mexican lime and juniper essence, creating a sophisticated and refreshing blend. Natural lavandin and gentian add complexity, while cashmere wood and Indonesian patchouli provide a mysterious and grounding base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Mon Vetiver

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: Neroli Botanica is a modern interpretation of orange blossom, crafted by master perfumer Anne Flipo. This creation combines the finest natural ingredients, featuring three different expressions of orange blossom alongside spicy and woody elements. The fragrance represents Essential Parfums' commitment to making high-quality niche perfumery accessible, offering sophisticated composition without traditional marketing markups.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Neroli Botanica

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: Nice Bergamote is a vibrant tribute to the aristocratic beauty of Calabrian bergamot, masterfully crafted by Antoine Maisondieu. This refreshing composition celebrates the essence of summer, combining precious citrus notes with delicate floral undertones and a sophisticated woody base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Nice Bergamote

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: Orange X Santal by Essential Parfums is a radiant composition that transports you to the Italian coast. Created by perfumer Nathalie Gracia-Cetto, this fragrance combines natural bitter orange with Australian sandalwood, enhanced by Egyptian basil, French oak moss, and cypress wood essential oil. The composition offers a perfect balance between citrus freshness and woody depth.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Orange X Santal

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: A sensual and mysterious patchouli creation that strikes a perfect balance between the rich earthiness of patchouli and the powdery sweetness of cocoa. This sophisticated composition showcases the versatility of patchouli while maintaining its authentic character through a modern interpretation.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Patchouli Mania

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: Rose Magnetic by Essential Parfums is a contemporary interpretation of the classic rose fragrance, created by perfumer Sophie Labbé. This elegant composition showcases the most sensual of flowers in a playful and addictive modern presentation, combining certified natural Rose Essential™ LMR and Turkish Rose Absolute LMR with contrasting fresh and sweet elements.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Rose Magnetic

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: The Musc by Essential Parfums is a sophisticated interpretation of modern musk, created by master perfumer Calice Becker. This clean, comforting fragrance combines natural ingredients with innovative synthetic molecules to create a scent that embodies pure elegance and everyday luxury.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: The Musc

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.description: Velvet Iris by Essential Parfums is a special take on the iris flower. Perfumer Dominique Ropion creates a woody and warm scent. It's an elegant and captivating fragrance. Think of a walk in a unique forest. This perfume mixes green freshness with resinous warmth and a soft leathery feel.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ess.name: Velvet Iris

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Discover **Above the Waves**, the first tea-inspired fragrance by Etat libre d'Orange. The ritual of tea is a way to reconnect with life. This scent honors Mazu, the goddess who protects sailors. It's a blend of three unique tea varieties, making it aromatic and fresh. This perfume protects and uplifts. It reminds us to take a step back and rise above. It's a companion for life's journey.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Above the Wave

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Archives 69, the essence of Etat Libre d'Orange, is a daring and original creation that challenges conventional perfumery. Named after the brand's address in Paris, this fragrance embodies their irreverent and artistic approach. It's a complex composition that plays with contrasts - medicinal and sweet, spicy and fruity, clean and sensual - creating an unexpected olfactory experience that defies traditional categorization.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Archives 69

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Attaquer Le Soleil Marquis de Sade is a daring creation built around a single note - labdanum. Inspired by the infamous libertine Marquis de Sade, this fragrance breaks conventional barriers with its complex simplicity. Created by Quentin Bisch for Etat Libre d'Orange, it challenges perceptions of what a single-note fragrance can achieve, much like its namesake challenged societal norms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Attaquer Le Soleil - Marquis de Sade

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: A tribute to tomorrow's glorious possibilities. This is fresh, pure water, with top notes of aldehydes and lemon, a water that washes away the sins of the night and leaves the skin luminous. He feels clean, like a shaving from a cake of soap. It is an ode to the beauty of the male body and to the radiance of the natural self. This perfume offers unrestricted access to the immense outdoors, the forest, with notes of birch leaves, cypress, and pine at its heart. Fantasy clings to him like his leather jacket, with suede, musk, and grey amber in the base notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Clean Suede

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: We pay allegiance to the concept of a modest cologne. Not an ordinary cologne, not a basic cologne. A proper cologne that achieves the perfection of simplicity. The Cologne of Etat Libre d'Orange is a tender introduction to our sensual collection, a gentle initiation into our subversive world. This is an adaptable cologne that showers your body with a fresh joy.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Cologne

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: A child can either charm or annoy us with the same ruthlessness. A child can be irresistible with his angel-sweet smile but he also knows how to drive us crazy. Under the angel, the faked innocence of a demon. After the gentle top notes of orange blossom and marshmallow, breaks the unexpected accord of coffee, leather and cold tobacco, a shrilling symbol of our sleepless nights. True to his reputation of 'polymorphic pervert', this mini-sized tyrant is only happy when he succeeds in imposing his whims.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Divin'Enfant

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: A rose that bleeds with passion and protection, Eau de Protection is a masterful creation inspired by the iconic Spanish actress Rossy de Palma. This fragrance embodies the duality of feminine power - thorny defense and voluptuous allure. The composition intertwines spicy elements with a dominant rose theme, creating a scent that's both protective and revealing, fierce and sensual.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Eau de Protection

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Exit the King tells the story of a fall - the fall of certainties and power. A modern interpretation of the classic chypre genre, this fragrance challenges traditional hierarchies while maintaining an air of sophistication. Created by perfumers Cécile Matton and Ralf Schwieger, it represents the decline of power structures and the assertion that nothing can rule us.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Exit the King

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Legend has it that an apple from a tree fell on Newton's head - and thus, the theory of universal gravitation was born. But imagine instead Newton asleep under a rose bush, where a fully scented, fleshy rose falls. This precise and clear-cut formula creates a chypre that falls sudden and direct, leaving an unforgettable trail. Akigalawood and patchouli embrace a honeyed rose in this experimental creation.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Experimentum Crucis

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: A semi-modern vetiver that tells the story of a fallen beauty from Texas, now a Fat Electrician in New Jersey. His splendor consumed in service of others, his talent depleted in his sexual decline - this is the curse of beauty, it doesn't last. The fragrance captures this narrative through an innovative blend of materials that challenge traditional vetiver compositions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Fat Electrician

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: He brings the sun. Here, find an innocent wisdom that points to dreams and liberation. This is the golden eye that reflects beauty and conflict, rapture and pain. Fils de dieu is an emotional fragrance, a scent that requires a sympathetic connection between the server and the served, the giver and the taker, and the willingness to exchange roles. With the refreshing zest of lime and ginger, spiced with cardamon and coriander, soothed with shiso and rice, infused with the tropical warmth of the coconut, this is a scent that supports the escape from conformity and eases the way to freedom from convention.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Fils de Dieu du Riz et des Agrumes

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Frustration is a perfume that invites you on a regressive journey through memories of childhood, where the strong child meets the fragile adult. It's a sophisticated blend that explores the delicate balance between comfort and complexity, weaving together gourmand warmth with spicy sophistication. The composition masterfully combines the sweetness of vanilla and rum with earthy vetiver and warm chestnut wood, creating a fragrance that embodies both nostalgia and modern elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Frustration

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Who goes beside you into the forest on the darkest night? In Victor Hugo's poem, the narrator says 'by my side, Hermann seemed to me like a shadow.' This enigmatic fragrance embodies the concept of our alternative self, our constant companion in life's journey. It's a sophisticated blend that explores the duality of presence and absence, light and shadow, through a masterful combination of spicy, smoky, and green notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Hermann à mes Côtés me Paraissait une Ombre

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: La Fin du Monde (The End of the World) explores an unconventional apocalyptic vision through the lens of cinema and popcorn. Created by Quentin Bisch for Etat Libre d'Orange in 2013, this fragrance challenges traditional perfumery by combining the comfort of buttery popcorn with the dramatic tension of gunpowder and sophisticated iris. It's a modern interpretation of how the apocalypse might smell - surprisingly warm, inviting, and thought-provoking rather than destructive.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: La Fin du Monde

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Les Fleurs du Déchet - I Am Trash is a revolutionary fragrance that celebrates sustainability by using upcycled ingredients. Created from what others might discard, this scent proves that beauty can be found in the unwanted. Inspired by the wisdom of the Borindi people of New Caledonia, it embodies their principle of taking only what's necessary while preserving nature's resources for tomorrow.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Les Fleurs du Déchet - I am Trash

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: A festive and seductive fragrance that embodies the spirit of Christmas celebration. This perfume tells the story of a charismatic presence that lights up any party, bringing warmth and joy to cold December nights. Sweet honey notes dance with tangerine, while spicy elements create an intoxicating atmosphere of celebration and desire.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Noël au Balcon

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Nostos means 'return' in Greek. It's a feeling of longing for something you can't have back. This perfume is like that feeling. It's inspired by **Achilles**, a hero who was both strong and beautiful. He was a brave warrior but also had a soft side. This scent captures his story. It's a mix of powerful woody notes, classic chypre touches, and rich leathery accords. Imagine an ancient story told in a modern way. Nostos is about fighting for what you want, even when it seems impossible. It's a scent for a hero in all of us.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Nostos

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Putain des Palaces embodies the essence of sophisticated seduction. This provocative creation from Etat Libre d'Orange captures the allure of a high-class temptress in luxury hotel bars. The fragrance balances refinement with raw sensuality, weaving together powdery elegance and animalic undertones in a masterful composition that speaks of desire and indulgence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Putain des Palaces

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: For every epoch, there are remarkable people who transcend the ordinary. Like demigods of classical mythology, they demonstrate strength and power, facing challenges with unwavering determination. From explorers to scientists, artists to entertainers - these extraordinary individuals believe in something different, something better. They are the uncompromising, unexpected, unconventional citizens of Etat Libre d'Orange, honored through this extraordinary fragrance that captures their remarkable spirit.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Remarkable People

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Nothing is Everything. Do not believe what you first see... under the demureness of the name, the spicy savour of blackcurrant bays and the musky notes of blonde suede. Rien is a second skin perfume, a perfume that clings to the body and perseveres in the mind. Like venial sin on the verge of becoming mortal, irresistible and resolutely pervasive. As light as mohair and as precious as cashmere, the fragrance envelops skin with a powdered caress.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Rien

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Rien Intense Incense is a bold and provocative creation from Etat Libre d'Orange that challenges conventional perfumery. This intense interpretation of the original Rien amplifies its predecessor's DNA with a powerful combination of incense, leather, and aldehydes. It's a post-modern fragrance that bridges classic perfumery with avant-garde aesthetics.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Rien Intense Incense

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: The body reigns supreme. Like blood, sweat, sperm, saliva, Sécrétions Magnifiques is as real as an olfactory coitus that sends one into raptures, to the pinnacle of sensual pleasure, that extraordinary and unique moment when desire triumphs over reason. A subversive, disturbing perfume that shook up the perfume world when it was launched, and still does. A work of conceptual perfumery designed to speak to all the senses at once.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Sécrétions Magnifiques

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Some of us have known it, others have yet to experience it, but we are all waiting or looking for it. It will come. True love is an eternal beginning again - a story that unfolds uniquely for each person, captured in this warm and nostalgic fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: Story of your Life

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: From the bottom of the matter, rise up. In a night of pale moonlight at the end of the 20th century, where the old world ends and the new begins, The Ghost in the Shell emerges as a perfume that speaks of the human phenomenon and its paradox. A fragrance that represents the merger of matter and the birth of spirit, it embodies the future while maintaining a connection to our humanity.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: The Ghost in the Shell

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.description: Los Angeles. In this city of fallen angels, fantasy rules. You or Someone Like You is a welcoming fragrance that embodies the essence of LA through the lens of Anne Rosenbaum - cool, crisp, and sophisticated. Finding solace in literature and her hillside garden overlooking downtown LA, this contemporary creation built around timeless materials offers an invigorating and fresh appeal that feels both familiar and unique.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/eta.name: You or Someone Like You

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.description: H¹ Heart celebrates love, that universal feeling. It's like a special energy turned into a perfume. This scent tells a story of the heart's wisdom. Imagine sweet fruits mixed with warm, woody and ambery notes. It's a unique smell that feels like a loving hug. This fragrance explores woody, chypre, and fruity worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.name: h¹ Heart

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.description: Discover H² Harmony, a fragrance of togetherness and inner peace. This scent takes your senses on a journey, bringing calm and balance. H² Harmony connects you deeply with the earth and nature's energy. Feel peaceful with this bright and strong creation. It's built on woody notes, with light floral touches.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.name: h² Harmony

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.description: H³ Happiness is more than a scent; it's a feeling from your soul. It's like pure energy that shines from your heart. Dive into a smell journey that brings inner joy and peace. Feel like a soft, salty breeze on your skin, showing your calm inside. This perfume is a woody and salty breath, full of pure soul feelings. It blends fruity touches with an aquatic freshness.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.name: h³ Happiness

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.description: When darkness falls, a magical feeling takes over. People dance, full of joy. This is the moment to make an impression that lasts. Let go of daily stress. Feel creative energy flow from midnight until the sun rises. 'Midnight to Sunrise' is a scent designed for connection. It brings light to the dark, making your presence felt. Experience this journey through woody, spicy, and resinous notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.name: Midnight to Sunrise

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.description: Sunrise to Sunset evokes the unique feeling of release and invigoration that the Sun Salutation Yoga posture gives us to elevate the Soul. Shower yourself with Peace and tranquillity. Let the morning start with a subtle awakening tone and Centeredness. This note is a true boost of energy, preparing you to fulfil your day from the first rays of Sun to the Sunset. Experience a journey through floral and woody notes, touched by citrus elements.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.name: Sunrise to Sunset

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.description: As daylight fades, it's time to get ready for the night. This scent helps you feel energized and powerful. It creates a sense of harmony as day turns to night. Imagine soft wisps of incense guiding your thoughts. This perfume explores musk, amber, and woody scents.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ete.name: Sunset to Midnight

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ex-.description: Shyamala Maisondieu blends rock and roll vibes with vintage luxury. Inspired by the journeys of great musicians, this fragrance has true attitude. It mixes woody strength with spicy flair. A scent for those who want to stand out while staying comfortable. It embodies a fusion of ancestral know-how and modern rebellion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ex-.name: Atlas Fever

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ex-.description: Blue Talisman marks a special anniversary for EX NIHILO. It was created as a hypnotic jewel and a lucky charm for your skin. The scent captures the vanguard spirit of Place Vendôme in Paris. It represents infinite spiritual energy and subtle delicacy. This fragrance is a statement of modern elegance. It invites you to explore a world of fresh and woody wonders.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ex-.name: Blue Talisman

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ex-.description: Blue Talisman Extrait refines the avant-garde spirit of Ex Nihilo. It is a smoother, more intense interpretation of the original fragrance. Designed as a hypnotic jewel, this fruity and woody scent invites you on a sensory journey. It feels richer and warmer than its predecessor.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ex-.name: Blue Talisman Extrait

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ex-.description: Imagine a journey to the 1950s in Northern India. This scent captures the spirit of Chandigarh, a dream city built where the mountains meet the jungle. It represents a bold union of French vision and Indian heritage. A modernist utopia rising from nature. The vibe blends sophisticated leathery textures with the wildness of a tropical forest. It is a tribute to vanguard architects who designed a new world from nothing.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ex-.name: Chandigarh Express

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ex-.description: This fragrance represents the signature of the Ex Nihilo house on Rue Saint-Honoré in Paris. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.description: Pistachio Haiku is like a walk through a quiet orchard. It captures the whole pistachio experience. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.description: Created blending the Essentials Rose Rhubarb & Sandalwood Musk. An animalic rose, sensual and daring, decadent and primal. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.description: Sable Gris by Experimental Perfume Club is a modern interpretation of Ambergris, created by perfumer Emmanuelle Moeglin. This Eau de Parfum blends Essentials Cardamom Moss & Sandalwood Musk to create an evocative marine-woody composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.name: Sable Gris

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.description: Discover a warm and creamy woody scent. It smells like hot stone wrapped in soft suede. This fragrance melts into your skin. It brings to mind the glowing ashes of burning sandalwood. Perfect for lovers of a deep, leathery blend. It is both smooth and a little smoky.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.name: Sandalwood Musk

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.description: A mineral-infused sandalwood where shadows meet light. A fleeting burst of zesty and sparkling citrus seamlessly transitions to the cool, mineral-infused tones of sandalwood, embraced by the comforting warmth of vibrant spices.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.name: Santal Nuit

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.description: This is a fragrance for those who command attention. Smell Like A King is a rich, leathery scent that's bold and powerful. Imagine a room filled with the scent of fine cigars, aged whiskey, and a hint of mysterious absinth. The air is thick with an intoxicating allure. Earthy notes of cypriol, cedarwood, and patchouli create a deep, smoky warmth. It's a dark, seductive, and unapologetically woody experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.name: Smell Like A King

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.description: A fragrance to nuzzle into, to cuddle up to. A scent so familiar, it feels like home. That snug feeling, as the days start to get colder, there is a crispness in the air and the scent of honeyed nuts roasting fills the streets. The need for warmth as the light closes in. Sesame, almond and green hazelnut sink into cushions sweet Frankincense, ambery Myrrh and luxurious labdanum. Chocolatey, earthy, patchouli enhances roasted tonka beans.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.name: Tonka Extraordinaire

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.description: A delicious mix of gourmand and woody notes, blended in perfect harmony. Green hazelnut, almond, and tonka bean swirl around a delightful sesame core. Powdery heliotrope enhances the nutty feel. The scent is grounded by earthy patchouli and cedarwood. It's a warm, toasty fragrance that's almost good enough to eat.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.name: Tonka Sesame

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.description: A captivating tale of contrasts. Sparkling bergamot mixes with smoky and smooth incense while a powdery iris and rich Ambroxan add to the softness. A highly addictive scent that surprises the senses.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/exp.name: Velvet Incense

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: From Reggio di Calabria to South America, from Brescia to Rome - it's not the destination, it's the journey. 7 MIGLIA recalls the pace of life, a constant companion seven days a week, sizzling with the Calabrian vibrancy of the Bergamot. An energetic, woody, smoky fragrance setting the pace of the race. The finest things in life are those you choose to make your own masterpiece.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: 7 Miglia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: SOUTH TYROL, MONTE CRISTALLO - Clarity within to light your path. The moment when the sun is at its zenith, a strikingly perfect white beam of light, revealing beauty from the inside out. In a graceful, vibrant prism of woody Patchouli and Italian-summer accents of fig leaves, the heady notes of Indian Jasmine Sambac bring to mind the story of something common place yet extraordinary. A fragrance that when worn brings your inner light to the fore revealing that which is external.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Cristallo Bianco

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: A deliciously versatile, sensory moment anchored in the soothing vibrations of cedarwood. As happy as an Aperitivo, as fleeting as a Romano glass of wine, Dolcetto Romano is the ultimate wood and spice-infused take in the Fabbrica della Musa collection.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Dolcetto Romano

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: Dynasty is a modern twist on a classic style. It's a zesty, fresh, and fruity fougere. The scent opens with bright citrus and a kick of spicy ginger. Then, it settles into a heart of aromatic lavender and soft white flowers. The experience ends with a deep, mysterious base. A distinctive woody and spicy dry down gives it a warm, elegant finish.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Dynasty

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: LOST IN THE INDIAN OCEAN. Untouched landscape in the middle of the Indian ocean. ÎLE BOURBON is crafted like an exploration narrative diary releasing the mysterious essence of smoky chocolate from the heart of Madagascar. Just as the explorers ventured into the unknown in the 17th century, the journey is a sensory adventure through an island's unspoiled luxurious nature. In a burst of warm spices — vanilla, clove, and cinnamon— ÎLE BOURBON unfolds its senses in the island's mystical forests, where the mist of woods' essence intertwines with a whisper of earthy wilderness.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Ile Bourbon

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: Magia Maestrale captures the essence of Provence, where the mighty Mistral wind sweeps across lavender fields under endless summer skies. This sophisticated fragrance combines aromatic lavender with warm spices and precious woods, creating a magical journey through the Mediterranean landscape.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Magia Maestrale

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: Dream on The intense spicy, golden shades of dawn on rolling Tuscan hills. The Neroli-infused glare of the sun mirroring Comoros Ylang and bewitching Jasmine Indian hesperidia accents when the world is an untouched page to be explored. This is the moment in the day when everything is a fresh start made of unlimited possibilities, the pathway to a new journey. An endless appeal for dreamers seeking a happier life.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Mia Alba Mistica

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: OPERA INFERNAL channels the vibrant temperament of Latin America, where the rhythm of tango music flows through the streets, and the sensual spirit burns intensely. Drawing inspiration from a volcano eruption, its fire and molten lava ribbons, the scent captures a fervent energy that crescendos with emotion and freedom. The deep-dark red flacon recalls the red velvety opera stage curtains and the captivating allure of Carmen's dress. Like an opera in two acts, the fragrance opens with the juicy pineapple before embracing the intense floral heart of the scent. Made with Praline & Vetiver, it adds a firy intensity to the sillage.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Opera Infernal

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: Draped in the emblematic indigo turban, OUD TUAREG pays homage to the Tuareg's blue symbolism, connecting the codes of their culture with the timeless art of living in the desert. At the heart of this elixir lies an enigmatic oasis town, a desert jewel. The memory of ancient caravans infuses it — a tale of boundless wealth shared generously. As treasured as gold, OUD TUAREG unveils Oud's opulence paired with modern rose, warm sandalwood, and hints of mandarin and ginger.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Oud Tuareg

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: Pearl of Dawn blends warmth and clarity. The scent brings freshness and sweet depth in perfect balance. It feels like a calm morning embrace. A modern signature that rests gently on your skin. Discover a world of gourmand magic, floral elegance, and woody warmth.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Pearl of Dawn

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: Piccadilly Hero is a tale of contrasts. It starts with a sweet memory, a delicious blend of juicy cherry and rich praline. This is a true gourmand delight. But soon, a deeper side emerges. A cool, smoky touch of tobacco and black tea adds a powerful twist. The story settles into a warm, creamy finish. Soft sandalwood and cozy vanilla create a lasting, woody embrace.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Piccadilly Hero

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: Tribeca Vibes captures the essence of a vibrant city park. It starts with a burst of fresh grass and aromatic basil, brightened by a splash of sparkling grapefruit. The heart unfolds into a light, airy floral bouquet of rose and jasmine petals, touched by a cool mineral feel. As it settles, a comforting base of soft musk and mystical frankincense emerges, creating a scent that is both modern and serene. A truly green and woody experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Tribeca Vibes

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.description: Via Velluto takes inspiration from the historic Silk Road, creating a cross-cultural olfactory journey. This sophisticated composition marries the glamour of Middle Eastern perfumery with Western refinement, offering a unique interpretation of the leather-floral genre enhanced by luscious fruit notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fab.name: Via Velluto

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: But Not Today is a challenging and unique fragrance from Filippo Sorcinelli, inspired by the relationship between Hannibal Lecter and Clarice Starling. It opens with a violent, metallic accord that evolves into a complex composition celebrating a dark and authentic love story. The fragrance was created as an olfactory interpretation of the iconic film 'The Silence of the Lambs'.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: But Not Today

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: The need to find yourself and your beauty through the mists of solitude. A necessary and horizontal warm blanket which never evolves.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: Ennui Noir

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: An olfactory tribute to Mario Giacomelli's famous photographic series of young priests in Senigallia Seminary. The fragrance takes its name from David Maria Turoldo's poem 'I have no hands to caress my face' and captures the essence of spiritual contemplation, loneliness, and religious devotion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: Io non ho mani che mi accarezzino il volto

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: Good things are images that disappear from our minds. They are parts of us lost in the forest of habits. But the pain remains and describes what cannot be chosen. Maybe I don't want to forget maybe it won't happen I want to feel different. Only free. I remember crying because it's stronger than forgetting. But going is sweeter than staying. I don't want to live in fear of what comes from the dark or what I left behind. I am who I wanted to be even when it wasn't me speaking. They were tears to the moon always climbed as a prayer sculpting my fate. I proudly sigh a single leap into the drama not to let go of the emotions. So I follow my emerald-scented path wherever it may lead me. It's a promise to me to one another an oath a cry a sincerity a brave hymn. Strong. I believe. and I never forget.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: Lascia ch'io pianga

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: LAVS (Latin for 'praise') is the first fragrance from Filippo Sorcinelli's UNUM collection, originally created as a room fragrance for the L.A.V.S. atelier (Laboratorio Atelier Vesti Sacre), which produces sacred vestments for the Vatican, including those for Popes Benedict XVI and Francis. This extrait de parfum represents the essence of Catholic liturgical atmosphere.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: LAVS

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: Né il giorno né l'ora (Neither the day nor the hour) is the twelfth fragrance in the UNUM collection by Filippo Sorcinelli, inspired by the Gospel of Matthew's parable of the ten virgins. This artistic creation is designed to confront and embody the emotion of fear, presented in an innovative bottle design that includes scissors to 'free' the fragrance from its rubber binding.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: Né il giorno né l'ora

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: Opus 1144 by Filippo Sorcinelli is a Gothic-inspired fragrance that pays homage to the laying of the first stone of the Saint Denis basilica in Paris in 1144. This sophisticated composition masterfully blends architectural and olfactory elements to create a meditative and majestic experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: Opus 1144

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: Quando rapita in estasi by Filippo Sorcinelli is inspired by Maria Callas' performance of Lucia di Lammermoor at La Scala in the 1950s. This extrait de parfum captures the essence of operatic drama through a powerful composition of incense, sacred woods, and floral notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: Quando rapita in estasi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: Reliqvia by Filippo Sorcinelli is a sacred and profound fragrance inspired by religious relics and the Christian context. The name derives from Latin meaning 'I leave' or 'what remains'. It is an artistic interpretation of spiritual elements, centered around incense, woods, and resins.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: Reliqvia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: Rosa Nigra by Filippo Sorcinelli is an olfactory paraphrase of the Assumption, inspired by the phrase 'Nigra sum, sed formosa' (I am black, but beautiful). The fragrance represents the Virgin Mary's ascension to heaven 'in body and soul', with materials that evoke a rose without actually containing any rose notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: Rosa Nigra

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.description: Don't forget to ask for forgiveness… Persecuted by remorse, in the fury of fate. And anger grows. Unexpected wounds mark the silence, Violence and mist. Nobody want to talk. Ignorance. The inhumanity of life leads us to be insensitive, not to know humility, not to recognize the faults, to wither. To numb the pain. But only that pain lived and full of signs, scarring and sculpts the memory, only scratches caused by anguish as to ask forgiveness shape the choice. And weep for a courage that moves the colors of change, giving suffered flowers and breath on the petals. Forgive me.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fil.name: Scusami

At the heart, violet petals create a smooth, powdery feel that shifts on your skin. The base adds gentle warmth, giving the fragrance a polished finish. It stays close to the skin and blooms softly all day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fin.name: Maze of Dreams

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.description: Dedicated to her majesty, they are born to serve their posts. Nursed and fed until ready to do the work of collecting nature's dust and converting it to liquid gold, they now nurse and feed the next generation. Striped and fit for the many tasks to keep the castle strong, they assemble and carry out her will. Converting flower dust into nature's greatest elixir is not as hard as it seems. The great nectar bar of spring unfolds its brilliant colors, giving out samples to its busy customers. Buzzing and bumping from bloom to bloom, piggybacking Spring's bold bouquet, these busy workers inspire a scent worthy of the queen herself.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.description: Ancient. Forever. Celebrated for its unique ability to preserve a moment for eternity. Sought after for its intoxicating beauty and mystique. Layered with the rich details of a timeless tapestry, from the fresh ripeness of plum and black currant to the smooth air of Rose, the golden rich honey of Amber peeks atop Cedarwood and Vetiver, preserving deeper mysteries within a bold and polished surface.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.name: Amber Absolutely

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.description: Smokey rooms tucked away behind posh clubs in 1897 St Petersburg conjure images of dedicated followers of magic. Kerosene lamp light in the haze of tobacco and ornate mirrors creates the scene for the perfect illusion. Dark and hypnotic, his voice is calm and deep. "Tsilindr." A single word, as he removes his famous purple top hat and lowers it down again, gently atop his head.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.name: Bojnokopff

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.description: The Art of Seduction is as old as the flower that marks its most sincere and alluring promises. Beautiful. Smooth. Sensual. Her petals play their gentle part, initiating the ritual with her soft and silky dance. Her oils lace the lover's palace with their lush appetite for embrace. Subtle musk undertones emerge and fill the secluded chamber. Lush and silky whispers fill the air. Combinations of Vanilla and Damascene Rose heighten the mood, while a nuanced velvety Cashmere invites intrigue.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.name: Harem Rose

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.description: Afternoons basking in the island breeze of one of Oceana's rare natural gems. Noted for its diverse fauna and flora, celebrated for its clean and pristine air, this is the land of layered textures, colors, and flavors. Crystal waters captivate the senses with the rich sentiments of this South Pacific jewel. Take a journey through the legendary lands of the Solomon Isles. Discover a luxe bouquet with notes of exotic fruit, coconut palms and the unforgettable colors of the capital city of paradise - Honiara.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.name: Honiara

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.description: Late Harvest by Fort & Manlé is a nostalgic fragrance that captures memories of days gone by. Created by Rasei Fort in 2022, it centers around the rich aroma of aged tobacco, specifically reminiscent of a grandfather's leather tobacco pouch and rosewood pipe. The scent combines cherry pipe tobacco with earthy notes and sweet undertones.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.name: Late Harvest

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.description: Known for its rich aromatics, the Vardhana dynasty's capital city Kannauj became the center of 7th century trade. Success was not lost on the emperor, Harshavardhana, who imposed a Vetiver Tax. While many remained silent, a band of fragrance masters believed the new tax would be used to fund violence against innocent people and staged a rebellion. Under the cover of night, these rebels covered the city with aromatic oils. Subdued by the fragrant forces of Kannauj, the tax was abolished.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/for.name: V for Vetiver

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.description: Brume Du Matin captures the essence of dawn on the French Riviera, where morning mist meets Mediterranean sunshine. This sophisticated fragrance represents new beginnings through a masterful blend of citrus freshness and floral elegance, created by perfumer François Merle-Baudoin. A modern interpretation of classic French perfumery that bridges casual sophistication with refined elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.name: Brume Du Matin

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.description: An intensely intimate fragrance, Cavort evokes the excitement and intensity of a first encounter. A sultry saffron-infused aroma hints at the anticipation of what lies behind that stolen second glance. Stimulating the senses, a warm woody floral aphrodisiac of spicy cinnamon and soft but potent geranium flows in, heightening emotions. Exotic floral mid-notes breeze by like the gentle touch of a hand brushing skin.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.name: Cavort

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.description: Inspired by London's iconic streets and style, this intensely invigorating fragrance exudes sartorial elegance aplenty. Its origins pay homage to London Oud with a fresher, more contemporary vista. Eminently easy and as fluid as London life, transitioning from dawn to dusk with unblemished performance. Spearmint, Marine notes, and lemon lend a masculine edge softened by the subtle floral tones of quintessentially English lavender.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.name: Lucius

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.description: An inimitable style of its own, this old-world fashion capital of romance requires a signature fragrance of note. That fragrance is undeniably Milano, a liquefied expression of glamour, high society and impeccable class. Opening with a burst of native Sicilian bergamot and zesty orange, Milano canters coquettishly into Italian springtime saffron and thyme-infused freshness. Fruity notes court balsamic olibanum and jasmine to create an aromatic character rooted in a luxuriating expanse of an exclusive leather accord.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.name: Milano

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.description: At half past midnight, when the world teeters between today and tomorrow, Minuit et Demi emerges as a seductive gourmand masterpiece. This collaboration between Demi Rawling and Fragrance Du Bois delivers an intoxicating blend of extraordinary ingredients, where warm spices dance with rich caramel and coffee, all wrapped in a sophisticated base of precious woods and musks.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.name: Minuit et Demi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.description: Stride out into the sweet and woody fragrance expression of the world's most upscale street and experience the intrigue and allure of New York 5th Avenue in wintertime. Luxurious ingredients sparkle, imitating the twinkling lights illuminating dusk like fine gems.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.name: New York 5th Avenue

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.description: An exquisite marine-inspired fragrance full of intriguing contradiction. At first, fresh and intensely invigorating with its uplifting hit of mandarin, yet comforting with a reassuring ensemble of complex woody, spicy notes. A classical French perfume that takes you on a journey to ocean's tranquility, creating an elegant projection of juxtapositions.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.description: Oud Jaune Intense by Fragrance Du Bois is a luxurious niche fragrance that captures the essence of an exotic tropical paradise. Created by perfumer Nathalie Gracia-Cetto, this sophisticated composition masterfully balances lush florals with juicy fruits and creamy base notes, while featuring a subtle touch of precious oud.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.description: Refined, sultry sophistication in fragrance form, the dark knight of the Shades Collection evokes the super-charged adrenaline of life in the fast lane. Its beguiling blend of delicate florals and a warm amber-oud finale invoke the majesty and mystery of the desert.

Buttery sandalwood lends an undeterred elegance to this soft, sensual, meditative perfume, famed for its laidback spirit but renowned for its indelible olfactory influence. Paradise beckons in the opening notes of exotic coconut and drizzled lemon before the heat rises in an unfettered heart of violet and black pepper. Indulgent amber, musk and sweet vanilla sign off this virtual voyage to sun-drenched shores.

Meanwhile, earthy spices and zesty white florals intertwine, submitting to autumnal nutmeg, neroli and cardamom. The primal dance endures as Japanese vetiver mimics the intense aroma of fertile woods after rainfall.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fra.description: Celebrating a decade of Fragrance Du Bois and the journey this has taken us pays homage to our origins in Paris, the city of love and a fashion capital is one of the world's most alluring and sophisticated cities. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/fri.description: Indulge in the ultimate clean with our 'Fresh Laundry Dreams' box, featuring fragrances that capture the crisp, comforting essence of freshly laundered linens. ✨ Dive into scents that evoke the feeling of pure freshness and simple luxury. Couleur Primaire by Les Eaux Primordiales: This fragrance embodies freshly laundered clothes drying in the open air, blending sharp aldehydes with delicate fruity notes and a sophisticated musky base for a modern clean scent. Floating by Liis: Experience a weightless sensation with this airy fragrance, featuring effervescent notes of ripe peach and bergamot levitating over crisp linen and grounding sequoia wood.🍑 Sun Bleached by Une Nuit Nomade: Evokes the sun-kissed walls of Muscat, Oman, blending pure linen, white flowers, and citrus notes, rounded by white musk, sandalwood, and vanilla for a warm yet fresh experience. Paper Soap by J-Scent: A nostalgic fragrance that captures the essence of traditional Japanese paper soap, combining fresh aldehydic notes with a delicate floral heart and a creamy musk base, for a clean and sophisticated scent.🧼 Totally White/126 by Parle Moi de Parfum: Transport yourself to Parc Monceau in spring with this delicate and creamy white floral fragrance dominated by lilac, complemented by hawthorn, and syringa. This collection offers a journey through the most comforting and pristine clean fragrance experiences.🕊️

Rich woods and resins create a lasting impression that is both classy and edgy. This perfume is not for the shy. It is loud, confident, and unforgettable. It belongs to the woody and fruity families.

The scent was made to make your night feel deeper, richer, and more intense.

It fits perfectly into the gourmand and amber families.

It is a true statement for lovers of woody vanilla scents.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gif.description: Discover the world of niche fragrances with your personal Parfinity voucher. Dive into our collection of over 800 exclusive scents and find your very own signature scent. Whether for a Parfinity Box with self-selected fragrance samples or for your favorite scent as a bottle – this voucher is your key to a sensory journey of discovery. Our motto "Wear First. Your Parfinity gift card – as individual as your scent.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Indulge in the allure of 'Die Goldene Parfinity Box,' where every fragrance embodies golden luxury and richness. This curated collection features scents that evoke opulence and sophistication.👑 Accento Overdose by Xerjoff: A vibrant fruity-floral fragrance with fresh green notes, eucalyptus, and a sophisticated base of jasmine and rose. Oro 1920 by Bois 1920: A luxurious leathery scent with smoky and fruity nuances, blending fir balsam, raspberry, and rich resins for a distinguished profile. The Persian Gold by Attar Collection: A luxurious gourmand fragrance evoking Persian royalty, with powdery tea rose, sweet caramel, vanilla, and earthy patchouli. No. 1 for Men by Clive Christian: A majestic woody-amber fragrance featuring 222 rare ingredients, blending British elegance with exotic Eastern influences with a unique 50-year-old aged sandalwood. Godolphin by Parfums de Marly: A distinguished scent inspired by the Arabian stallion, capturing power and refinement with leathery, fruity, and woody notes. 🐎 Embrace the extravagance and sophistication that 'Die Goldene Parfinity Box' has to offer.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Golden Opulence

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Set beneath a sunlit canopy of lush tropical rainforest, the scent evokes an image of native citrus trees drawing life from nearby cascading fresh waterfalls. With its invigorating opening of Australian finger lime and coriander, Bohemian Lime mellows to reveal blissful grounding notes of vetiver, cedar wood and sandalwood. Bohemian Lime is a carefree fragrance for women and men and an ode to Byron Bay, Australia's premier free-spirited tropical enclave and the place where the country first meets the sun.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Bohemian Lime

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Transportive and Seductive, Ingenious Ginger offers an instant sense of nature in a blissful and sultry destination. A solar perfume of sun-kissed mandarin, spicy ginger, elegant white florals, and warm, enveloping amber that cascades across your skin. An olfactory imagining of the unscented torch ginger lily flower, Ingenious Ginger is an abstract citrusy, floral, and ambery perfume that expresses our Founder's most beloved tropical flower, which grows in abundance at his holiday home in the wet tropics.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Ingenious Ginger

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Pacific Rock Flower by Goldfield & Banks captures the essence of Australia's sunlit coastline, where native white florals dance with salty sea breezes. This sophisticated fragrance represents the perfect harmony between the wild coastal landscape and delicate floral elements, creating an uplifting and refreshing olfactory experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Pacific Rock Flower

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Seize the day and experience a moment of pure bliss with this aquatic and fresh perfume. A distinctive marine note, graced with aromatic essences brings you on a lush coastal walk on a perfect summer day. Cedar wood gives this perfume a sturdy base on which to reveal a fresh, sea spray scent that speaks of summer days diving into Australia's blue waters. A fragrance for men and women, inspired by waves crashing upon sun-kissed rocks and long days that turn into warm, summer nights.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Pacific Rock Moss

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Purple Suede is the beguiling new addition to the Goldfield & Banks Botanical Series. An olfactory imagination expressing the scent of aromatic fields of sunburnt lavender, where blossoms are crisped by the fierce heat of the sun. Paired with the scent of rust-coloured saddles, this sensual perfume reveals a distinctively rich and dry sillage. A contemporary and unexpected take on lavender and leather.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Purple Suede

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Encased in molten gold and infused with precious Agarwood, Silky Woods is the aptly named debut fragrance in a new luxury collection called the Botanical Series by Goldfield & Banks. Showcasing the precious Agarwood harvested sustainably for the first time in perfume history in Tropical Queensland, Silky Woods is a delightful and delicate yet very sensual blend that captures Australia's sensorial experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Silky Woods

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Dark and excessive, Silky Woods Elixir is a luxurious reinterpretation of Australian agarwood, masterfully blended with exotic botanicals. This opulent creation combines precious oud with fig, saffron, and syrupy balsam, creating a mysterious and sensual experience. A true connoisseur's perfume that showcases the complex interplay between smoky woods and gourmand elements.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Silky Woods Elixir

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Southern Bloom honours the rare and enchanting native scented flower, the Boronia during its short September 'spring-bloom', on Australia's southernmost island, Bruny off the coast of Tasmania. The absolute of boronia is distinctive and one of the most expensive perfume materials in the world.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Southern Bloom

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: As a blazing sun dips into the Indian Ocean, the scent of fragrant native fruit pervades the languorous evening breeze. A heavenly elixir of citrus and spicy delights awaits, giving way to a deliciously gourmand and sensuous floral heart. Best served at sunset hour!
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Sunset Hour

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Tales of Amber is a modern take on an amber perfume. It captures the raw beauty of nature. The scent blends rare New Zealand ambergris with a classic amber accord. This creates a warm and deep fragrance. At its heart, you'll find soft floral notes of orange blossom and iris. These are balanced by earthy Australian oud. Spicy cinnamon adds a final touch to this woody and resinous scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Tales of Amber

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.description: Inspired by the lush nature of the balmy heritage listed K'gari in the Pacific Ocean, Wood Infusion is a celebration of all wood species found around the island. This fragrance is an exotic infusion of Australian woods enriched with Sandalwood Album, Iris and velvety Agarwood (Oud Wood). This unique combination offers men and women a sensation of a creamy and rich scent crafted from nature's most noble botanicals.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gol.name: Wood Infusion

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: The curiosity to go beyond; to fetch away; to outrush. The future is spontaneous: never solid, always changing. Thrilling and breezy, happy-go-lucky. Only if you dare. A mischievous approach to the great orientals. A perfumer's vision of a modern way to interpret the most traditional olfactive family. Luca Gritti takes the best from the Middle Eastern style, overlaying its warm, comforting mood with clear, fine structures of European perfumery: milk and cardamom, golden spicy powder and smooth, subtle iris. The future has no limits.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Beyond The Wall

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Chantilly by Gritti is a delightful fruity-powdery fragrance that captures the essence of a light summer dessert. Created in 2017 by Luca Gritti, this perfume combines fresh fruits with creamy, powdery notes to create a sensual and feminine experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Chantilly

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Soft. Intimate. Infinite. Chantilly Extrait is a delicate whisper on the skin. It is an Extrait de Parfum with a high oil concentration of 30%. This makes the scent deep and long-lasting. It feels like a second skin that stays with you. The vibe is a perfect mix of fruity sweetness and powdery elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Chantilly Extrait

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: The summer sun bounces off the cliffs. In the air, pungent and familiar, rosemary meets bergamot and orange. Flowers. Looking for them is instinctive. The heart welcomes them, envelops them, warms them with touches suffused with amber, vanilla, and sandalwood. A homage to the Amalfi Coast: the fresh smell of the first days of summer, when the air is still cool in the morning, and the sun rays barely touch the skin.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Costiera

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: A shadow: something is there. She determines fate as she walks along the spice road. As she passes, there's magic in the air, as warm as the hues of fruits that announce her coming. Her cloak weaves gold and velvets, and she has a delicate yet steadfast stride. Amused, she turns to look at the effect it has. Aristocratic weakness. Ripe black cherries enveloped by fresh marzipan and fine bitterness of red orange's zest. The heart is a delight: a creamy mix of white flowers and powdery cocoa notes; Duchessa's sillage is warm, balsamic, intoxicating. Sweet as liquor. A "narcotic" one: cherries and sugar, the real obsession. The smell of a Gritti Woman, bold and decisive.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Duchessa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Time is still, for a moment. Expectations, murmurs, excitement. Then astonishment. From here, it seems like everything has been contrived and invented, yet nothing is fake. Theatre. Full of passions, intrigues, crimes. Discoveries and hope. Every day is full of possibilities. The future becomes a reality. The past, history: just a voice to listen to. Eden smells of new fruits, with lilies and magnolias lighting it up with purity and whiteness. Water, all around. Dedicated to the Teatro La Fenice and dressed in scarlet velvet, the same as the curtain that hides the main stage, Luca Gritti's Fenice is a homage to the most famous Italian opera house.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Fenice

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Florian, The Gritti's ruby, is an extraordinary fragrance inspired by the Orient with its rich colors and intoxicating smells. Created by perfumer Luca Gritti in 2023, this extrait de parfum features precious Laotian oud adorned with spicy cardamom and dramatic Taif rose. The composition is enriched with golden incense and peppery ginger notes, leading to a mellow, sensual woody sillage.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Florian

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Fizzy and cheerful fruity cocktail for careless days, boozy nights and sunrise talks. White peach pulp and soft caramel meet the freshness of mango blossom and sheer litchi accord. White musk embraces the skin and gives it a smooth, radiant aura with notes of cashmeran and woody vanilla undertones.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Gossip Night

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: He comes with the storm, biting as the smell of his leather jacket that remembers thousands of miles. The engines roar, knees get weak, you're out of control. All or nothing. The smell of rule-breaker, one of a kind. Kill the lights. You'll see what comes. Dry, sharp-cut juniper and artemisia notes gride into a full and rich leather heart and run into its sharp, spicy nuances. Dense birch tar accord mixes with fresh balsamic nuances of lentisque like dusk with the dawn. A story to remember.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Kill The Lights

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: A tale of two worlds, an eclectic blend of memories, tastes, and smells captured between Mexico and India. The meeting point of East and West, inspired by creamy, juicy nuances of mango and the dark side of the oud, brought to the light together with a delicious vanilla accord and adorned with fresh, floral guava notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Mango Aoud

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Muskaria was once a secret. It was the personal signature scent of master perfumer Luca Gritti. Now, he shares this treasure with the world. This fragrance is a deep and elegant blend. It mixes noble musks, rare spices, and precious resins. Muskaria is more than a perfume. It's an invitation into a private world. It feels like a whispered secret on your skin, full of allure and confidence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Muskaria

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Discover Pomelo Assoluto, an intensified extrait de parfum that enhances the luminous freshness of Pomelo Sorrento, enriching it with a darker, warmer, and more mysterious allure. This 'noir' interpretation reveals a richer, more seductive side, with a base of soft woods, warm amber, and velvety musk—wrapping the fragrance in an embrace of irresistible noir sophistication.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Pomelo Assoluto

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Pomelo Sorrento by Gritti is a refreshing citrus fragrance that captures the vibrant essence of the Amalfi Coast. This sophisticated scent combines sparkling grapefruit and pomelo with green tea and delicate floral notes, creating a perfect balance between freshness and depth. Released in 2017, it's a modern interpretation of Mediterranean citrus gardens.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Pomelo Sorrento

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: The wide horizon leaves the mind free to wander in any direction. The water is now clear and calm, a prelude to a journey that begins under the best auspices. There's only one rule on this route: upholding purity. With intent and soul. Because that's the only way anyone can sustain the world and not get weary. The rugged, crisp notes as you open the bottle glide over the softness of the magnolia. Fruity and rich musks await patiently: everything is perfectly balanced. An homage to the Italian sartorial art, with Puro Luca Gritti approaches the great classic of perfumery: the musks. Like the perfect white shirt, this Gritti Privè extrait starts with a fresh, joyous embrace and then reveals its subtle, sexy skin scent with notes of sandalwood and spicy tonka beans.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Puro

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Unique yet familiar, just like every icon, capable of encompassing the surrounding world in it. Experiences and emotions merge, tributes and roots, all of which are essential for a sound future. That's why it's all there blended together: spices and exotic fruits, the Italian spirit of bergamot and iris, combined with the precious Taïf rose, the oud of an aspiring horizon, the sure landing place of white musk. Contrasting, just as the life of the Venetian districts on different sides of the legendary Rialto Bridge.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Rialto

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Seta by Gritti is a luxurious Extrait de Parfum that pays homage to the Gritti family's historical involvement in the silk trade. This refined fragrance represents guaranteed seduction through its sophisticated composition. A kaleidoscope of notes creates an elegant interplay of light and shadows, offering both delicate and daring elements. Like the noble silk fabric it's named after, Seta proves to be exquisitely crafted and uniquely versatile.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Seta

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Summer on your mind. Endless, mellow afternoons between Noto's almond gardens and Marzamemi's sea breeze. The dance of shades over bronze skin, shimmering and silky. A bliss. Fresh almond and creamy lemon blossom notes are leading to the luscious, tropical heart: a rich vanilla accord adorned with fragrant tiaré flowers and marzipan nuance. Like a Sicilian sunset, the perfume lasts on the skin wrapping it with warm, musky and vanilla sun kisses.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Siracusa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Born from explosion, born to glow bright. Chaos-to-order. Cosmic violent beauty bursts through the dark to light; a teal blaze smears the horizon. Open your eyes. Inhale the night. Discover the mineral abyss of space through subtle metallic accords entangled with frosty aromatic nuances and a deep, dusky mix of oud and grey amber.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Super Nova

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: Radiant light. A splendid explosion in a tribute to citrus fruits, with mandarin, lemon, and cedar joyfully whipping the air. Fresh ginger meets coriander for a curious twist, with the unmistakable blooming of jasmine. Caramel and musk are the sensual mix on which the fragrance, promising, concludes. Luca Gritti challenges the citrus olfactive family with this ode to the mandarine tree, the symbol of fortune.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Tangerina

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: A dance. A woman. Tenderness and power. Perfection. The most provocative experience. Utmost dedication. The magic of a moment. Tutù Blanc is an ode to the ballet dancers, their dedication, and incredible balance of strength and artistic fragility.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Tutù Blanc

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: In Madagascar, a legendary vanilla is born. This is Vanilla Tanà. It's an essence that tells stories and captures the senses. Master perfumer Luca Gritti learned a unique secret: vanilla beans macerated inside baobab trunks. This process adds woody notes and a primordial energy. Vanilla Tanà is a warm, enveloping fragrance. Resinous vanilla intertwines with sacred woods and mysterious spices. Wearing it is a journey to a distant, enchanted island.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: Vanilla Tana

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.description: The freedom of being yourself: unconventional, stubborn, vain. Unique. The courage to accept and the capacity to destroy. The audacity to live by your own rules. One song about Luca Gritti. And, now, the fragrance. With this composition, Luca Gritti tames one of the most ambiguous notes in perfumery: the blackcurrant. Its sparkling yet deep character is mixed with herbaceous chypre nuances and intensified by fresh and juicy Italian citruses. Sleek and explosive. The pure vanity.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gri.name: You're So Vain

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gru.description: This Halloween, delve into the shadows with our Gruselige Horroreske fragrance box, featuring scents that capture the eerie and unsettling spirit of the season. Experience olfactory terror with these hauntingly beautiful creations. 🎃 A City on Fire by Imaginary Authors: Embrace the scent of urban decay with burning matches and smoky woods, painting a vivid picture of a metropolis consumed by flames. 🔥 Notturno by Meo Fusciuni: Embark on a nocturnal journey with boozy rum, intriguing ink accords, and smoky birch – a fragrance that evokes the scent of old books in a dimly lit room. Sécrétions Magnifiques by Etat Libre D'Orange: Brace yourself for a controversial and visceral experience, a metallic-aquatic scent featuring blood accords, marine notes, and a provocative animalic character. Flash0021 by Perfume.Sucks: Explore the darker side of gourmand with an electric burst of sichuan pepper, earthy truffle, and buttery popcorn, contrasted by green rhubarb. But Not Today by Filippo Sorcinelli: Inspired by 'The Silence of the Lambs', this challenging fragrance blends metallic accords with aromatic herbs, evoking a dark and complex love story.🔪 Dare to explore the olfactory abyss with this curated collection of horrifying delights.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/gru.name: Halloween Horror Box

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.description: Arbolé is named after a poem by Federico Lorca. It captures the feeling of a lazy summer afternoon in Ibiza. Imagine a dry, salty wind rustling through the trees. A hint of incense hangs in the air. This is a romantic, vintage-style scent. It opens with earthy patchouli. Then, it blends with rich cedarwood and smooth sandalwood. A sweet and powdery base of vanilla and tonka bean grounds the fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.name: Arbolé

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.description: Arcadia is inspired by a perfect, untouched wilderness. Imagine a dense forest with babbling brooks and fragrant flowers. The air is fresh, green, and alive. This scent is a classic fougere, which means it smells like a magical fern. It's a beautiful mix of fresh, aromatic, and woody notes that create this enchanting forest feeling.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.name: Arcadia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.description: Hyde is a sensual and addictively mesmerising leathery fragrance. It opens with a strong burst of bright lemon and bergamot. These cheerful notes then clash with the dry and sharp scent of birch tar, reminiscent of burned wood. An opulent cassie flower adds green and spicy nuances. This beating heart is embraced by a warm, elegant base of smoky labdanum and malt vanilla melting into earthy oakmoss. Seductive and challenging, Hyde is an ode to adventure-seeking souls.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.name: Hyde
