https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.description: Moon Bloom is all about the tuberose flower. This flower is often called the 'mistress of the night' because its scent is strongest after dark. It has a soft, creamy aroma that is very alluring. The perfume starts with the fresh green smell of stems and leaves. Then, it opens up to a rich heart of sweet and spicy white flowers. The scent finishes with a warm, tropical base of creamy coconut and cozy resins. It's a journey through a floral garden at night.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.name: Moon bloom

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.description: People have always made love potions. They called them philtres. Drink one, and you'd fall madly in love. Perfumes are our modern love potions. They can change your mood in an instant. This is my version. It's made with beautiful flowers, spices, and resins. The star is the flower of love: carnation. Use it carefully.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.name: Philtre

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.description: Shangri La is back! Inspired by the mythical paradise from the novel *Lost Horizon*, this fragrance is a modern take on a classic chypre. It's a bright, airy perfume with a lush and exotic feel. Hiram Green has updated his original creation to be lighter and warmer. It places a greater emphasis on floral and spicy notes, creating a truly timeless scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.name: Shangri la

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.description: Slowdive is a warm, tobacco-themed fragrance. It captures the mood of a lazy afternoon in late summer. The air is sweet and thick, filled with the scent of heady flowers and the sound of humming bees. The fragrance opens with fresh neroli and orange blossom. Soon, notes of tobacco flower, honey, and beeswax take center stage. The heart is rich and deep, with hints of dried fruits and creamy tuberose. A base of warm resins gives Slowdive its soft, exotic touch, creating a beautiful gourmand and floral experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.name: Slowdive

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.description: Remember the drive to the orange grove? The air smelled sweet, like honey and possibility. The sun warmed our skin. We kissed under the orange blossoms. The whole day felt like our secret. Later, you found a flower in your coat. Its smell lingered—crisp, bright, and golden. This is a floral and citrus dream.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.name: Tryst

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.description: Inspired by the 1980s, Ultra captures the decade's intense energy and relentless optimism. This fragrance is a tribute to bold fashion, catchy synth music, and neon-hued interiors. At its heart, the rich and radiant character of narcissus shines, bringing the vibrant spirit of the era to life. The flower's intoxicating aroma also hints at something darker, recalling the Greek myth of Narcissus—a cautionary tale for the hedonistic decade.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.name: Ultra

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hir.name: Hiram Green's Natural Wonders

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hol.description: Embark on a journey through the world of woody perfumes with our curated selection! This Parfinity Box is perfect for anyone new to the world of niche fragrances or who loves the comforting and complex scent of wood. Discover five unique fragrances, each presenting a different facet of this versatile note. Experience the refreshing and airy Nothing but Sea and Sky by Une Nuit Nomade, a fragrance reminiscent of a cashmere scarf on a cloudy day by the sea. Immerse yourself in the meditative and balanced Agarwood by J-Scent, a modern interpretation of traditional Japanese incense. Discover the rebellious Papyrus Moléculaire by Maison Crivelli, a unique blend of milky papyrus and deep tobacco, created by Leslie Girard. Experience the groundbreaking molecular fragrance Genetic Bliss by 27 87, created by Jordi Fernandez, which adapts to your body chemistry, providing a clean and woody experience. Finally, escape to the coast with Grand Beau by Thomas De Monaco, a beautiful blend of woody and aquatic notes with a fresh green touch, created by Maurus Bachmann. Unleash your senses and find your signature scent with this exclusive Parfinity Box! Plus, enjoy a discount code equal to the box price for a full-size bottle of your favorite discovery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hol.name: Wonderful Woody Scents

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.description: Dive into the deep sea with Abyssal Odyssey. This aquatic scent explores hidden ocean worlds. It blends rare ambergris with cool marine notes. It is a beautiful tribute to the water. You will also find a soft mix of jasmine and clary sage. Experience the calm power of the ocean in this fresh perfume.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.name: Abyssal Odyssey

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.description: Ancient Currents is a bold fragrance inspired by the river Nile. It has a mossy marine essence. The scent mixes earthy riverbank moss with crisp aquatic notes. Exotic spices transport you to bustling old markets. You will feel the richness of saffron. It is balanced with the deep, earthy touch of oakmoss. The warmth of Virginia cedar ties everything together.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.name: Ancient Currents

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.description: Azure Reverie by House of Noya brings the Mediterranean right to you. It takes inspiration from sunlit terraces and warm breezy views. This fresh scent mixes bright citrus energy with clean floral touches. You will feel like you are walking through sunny landscapes. It is a perfect choice for those who love fresh and lively perfumes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.name: Azure Reverie

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.description: Citrus Coast takes you straight to the sun-drenched Italian Riviera. It captures the charm of a warm summer day by the sea. This vibrant citrus fragrance blends zesty lemon and bergamot with a fresh ocean breeze. You will feel like you are sipping Limoncello right on the beach. It is a highly refreshing scent that promises a spirited adventure in the sun.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.name: Citrus Coast

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.description: Step into the heart of the Amazon. Jungle Serenity by House of Noya brings the rainforest to life. Smell the earthy scent of wet leaves. Feel the cool river mist on your skin. This woody and aquatic blend captures nature's raw power. It is a peaceful yet wild escape into the unknown.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.name: Jungle Serenity

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.description: Dive into the graceful embrace of Ocean's Luminescence. This scent blends the salty crispness of the ocean air with a creamy touch. It captures the true beauty of the sea. Enjoy a stunning mix of delicate marine notes and soft white amber. Let this beautiful aquatic fragrance sweep you away. It is perfect for those who love a fresh, coastal breeze.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/hou.name: Ocean's Luminescence

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: A City on Fire by Imaginary Authors is a daring and avant-garde fragrance that captures the essence of smoke and fire in an urban setting. Released in 2014, this unique creation by Josh Meyer features prominent notes of burnt matches, cade juniper, and dark berries, creating an atmospheric composition that tells the story of a metropolis ablaze.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: A City on Fire

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: A Whiff of Waffle Cone by Imaginary Authors is a gourmand fragrance released in 2023 that captures the essence of a freshly baked waffle cone filled with vanilla ice cream and drizzled with salted caramel. Created by Josh Meyer, this sweet and comforting scent combines foodie elements with subtle smoky undertones.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: A Whiff of Waffle Cone

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: Bull's Blood by Imaginary Authors is a daring and provocative niche fragrance that challenges conventional perfumery. This dark and intense composition blends animalic notes with rich florals, creating a scent that walks the line between beauty and danger. Released in 2023, it's a reimagining of a discontinued cult favorite.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Bull's Blood

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: Cape Heartache by Imaginary Authors is a unique woody fragrance launched in 2013 that combines the rugged essence of Pacific Northwest forests with an unexpected sweet strawberry note. Created by Josh Meyer, this scent tells the story of a foggy morning in a wooden cabin surrounded by pine and fir trees, with wild strawberries growing nearby.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Cape Heartache

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: When Stina, a burgeoning writer, decamps to her mother's summer house for the winter to write a book, her trip overlaps for one day (and one steamy night) with a brawny fisherman named Ulv. While she struggles to gain traction with her novel, her fixation on the mysterious seafarer results in countless unsent letters, the contents of which chronicle the spiraling psyche of lust and longing. Set on the desolate west coast of Denmark during the tourist off-season, Every Storm a Serenade is a meditative masterwork that will lull you with its well-designed sentences and intimate tone.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Every Storm a Serenade

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: Falling into the Sea by Imaginary Authors is a bright, citrus-forward aquatic fragrance that captures the essence of a summer beach day. Released in 2012, this scent combines fresh citrus notes with tropical elements and a subtle salty accord.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Falling into the Sea

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: Fox in the Flowerbed by Imaginary Authors is a whimsical and airy floral fragrance released in 2021. Created by Josh Meyer, this perfume captures the essence of springtime with its delicate blend of jasmine, tulips, and wildflower honey, complemented by fresh air accords and subtle hints of frankincense and pink pepper.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Fox in the Flowerbed

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: In Love with Everything is a 2022 release from Imaginary Authors, capturing the essence of a vibrant, energetic night out. This playful and exuberant fragrance combines fruity punch, raspberry, and palm sugar notes with subtle touches of rose and sandalwood.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: In Love with Everything

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: Memoirs of a Trespasser is a sophisticated fragrance from Imaginary Authors, launched in 2012. Created by Josh Meyer, this woody-vanilla composition masterfully blends smoky and sweet elements, featuring notes of guaiac wood, oak barrel, bourbon vanilla, myrrh, benzoin, and ambrette seed. It's a complex scent that tells a story of mystery and sophistication.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Memoirs of a Trespasser

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: O, Unknown! is a mysterious fragrance from Imaginary Authors released in 2017. Created by Josh Meyer, this perfume combines the sophistication of tea with powdery orris butter and woody undertones. It's a complex composition that balances between classic and modern sensibilities.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: O, Unknown!

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: Saint Julep by Imaginary Authors is a unique interpretation of a mint julep cocktail transformed into a fragrance. Released in 2017, this creation by Josh Meyer captures the essence of Southern sophistication with a modern twist.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Saint Julep

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: An impressive work of art, deep, rich, magical, warm, and emotionally evocative. Reminiscent of watching fireworks at a neighbor's place as a kid.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Slow Explosions

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: Sundrunk by Imaginary Authors is a bright, nostalgic fragrance launched in 2018. It captures the essence of summer memories with a fizzy citrus opening and floral undertones. Created by Josh Meyer, this scent aims to evoke memories of sun-soaked afternoons and refreshing orange sodas.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Sundrunk

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: Telegrama by Imaginary Authors is a unique fragrance that combines powdery talc, black pepper, lavender absolute, vanilla, and woody notes. Released in 2019, it evokes memories of vintage face powders, clean linens, and classic apothecaries.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Telegrama

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: The Cobra & The Canary by Imaginary Authors is a unique leather-forward fragrance that tells the story of a joyride in a Shelby Cobra. Released in 2012, this creation by Josh Meyer combines raw leather with smoky undertones, hay, tobacco flower, and an industrial asphalt accord.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: The Cobra & The Canary

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: The Language of Glaciers by Imaginary Authors is a unique fragrance that captures the essence of alpine landscapes. Released in 2024, this creation by Josh Meyer combines cold, fresh elements with florals and woods to create an atmospheric winter-spring transition scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: The Language of Glaciers

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: The Soft Lawn by Imaginary Authors is a unique fragrance that captures the essence of a grass tennis court and fresh tennis balls. Created by Josh Meyer, this creative composition combines citrus, green, and synthetic elements to evoke memories of sunny sports days.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: The Soft Lawn

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: When the long hours Azzam Issa pulls at his family's bakery begin to interfere with his day-job as a security guard at The Louvre, things turn bizarre. Angelic creatures move from one painting to the next and statues speak to him in cryptic whispers. The delusions are a nuisance and the few hours of sleep he is afforded between jobs are no better; dominated by visits from ancient mariners and supernatural figures from worlds past. It isn't until he begins to listen to these apparitions that he becomes truly unhinged. In the frantic search for the true identities of these lost souls, Azzam discovers something far more remarkable, his own.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Whispered Myths

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.description: Yesterday Haze by Imaginary Authors (2014) is a unique interpretation of fig, blending creamy, woody, and gourmand elements. Created by Josh Meyer, this fragrance captures the essence of a fig orchard with additional notes of walnut, tonka bean, and iris, creating a nostalgic and comforting atmosphere.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ima.name: Yesterday Haze

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Every person has a unique Absolute - a primal instinct that, once awakened, releases a remarkable power. In the alchemy of scent, opulent Vanilla, Musk and Castoreum merge to embody the true essence of an aphrodisiac. As it melts on your skin, radiant floral notes and rich Amber enhance its irresistible warmth, while Vanilla and Musk weave a sensual aura. The animalic touch of Castoreum adds a provocative edge that awakens your instincts and ignites passion. With ABSOLUTE APHRODISIAC, explore your inner depths, uncover your primal instincts and awaken your authentic self. This fragrance is a journey through animalic, gourmand, and amber realms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Absolute Aphrodisiac

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Experience the allure of ADDICTIVE VIBRATION, where instinct meets pure delicacy. It opens with crisp Apple Blossom and bright Orange Blossom, mingling with airy white flowers. Rich Honey and sweet Vanilla then create an uplifting heart. Gentle waves of Musk leave a soft, magnetic trail. ADDICTIVE VIBRATION is more than a scent; it's a subtle pulse, connecting moments with its floral and gourmand charm. Instinctive and captivating, it’s a timeless sensation for those seeking something beyond the ordinary.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Addictive Vibration

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Atomic Rose is a truly powerful floral perfume. Imagine a beautiful rose in full bloom, bold and impossible to ignore. It's lightly dressed with hints of jasmine and sweet vanilla bean. This scent starts off soft and shy, but then it grows, filling the air around you like a magic spell. It's all about intense attraction and fearless love. Atomic Rose feels like a rush of emotion, an explosive and unforgettable experience. Many say it's a standout rose fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Atomic Rose

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Blessed Baraka by Initio is a fragrance that feels like a divine connection. It's a source of power, a blessing in a bottle. Imagine the pure scent of white flowers mixed with the grounding feel of Sandalwood and the mysterious touch of Musk. This perfume wraps you in an aura of power and grace. It's an amber scent with woody and gourmand layers, creating a feeling of destiny and sacred purpose.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Blessed Baraka

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Feel fiercely alive with a scent of pure desire. It's a tempting mix of Rose and spicy Pink Pepper. This obsession grows with rich Caramel and soft Vanilla. At its heart is Hedione, a special molecule that adds a sensual touch to everything. **Can't Get Enough** is a fragrance you'll crave again and again. It's a hypnotic, passionate scent that's truly irresistible. A journey into gourmand and floral obsession.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Can't get enough

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: High Frequency is a perfume that feels like a soft hug. It mixes pretty magnolia flowers and sweet almond with a special touch called Hedione. This scent starts gentle and then gets a bit stronger, making you feel special. It's a lovely floral smell with a hint of yummy gourmand notes. It's made to make you feel good and connected.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: High Frequency

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Lift Me Up aims to capture the feeling of sunshine in a bottle. This fragrance is designed to boost your mood and wake up your senses. It blends floral and amber styles to create a warm, glowing effect. The goal is to make you feel happier and more energetic, like a bright summer day. It settles on the body as a comforting skin scent that feels alive.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Lift Me Up

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Magnetic Blend 7 is made to make you stand out. Wear it alone to show off your unique scent. Or, layer it with other Initio perfumes to boost your style. It works with your skin to create a special magnetic feel. This is a musk scent. It also has hints of spice and powder.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Magnetic Blend 7

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Musk Therapy is like a warm, comforting hug in a bottle. It blends creamy sandalwood with soft white musk and a touch of pink musk. This mix feels truly addictive and velvety. Bright magnolia and zesty blackcurrant add a spark of energy. This musk and woody scent helps you relax. It makes you feel good, like a day at a fancy spa. It's a perfume that feels both cool and very calming.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Musk Therapy

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Step into mystery with MYSTIC EXPERIENCE, a fragrance of intensity and intrigue. It's mysterious and bold, giving off a mystical energy where what you see meets what you don't. This scent awakens attraction and curiosity. Dark Coffee and sensual Musk create a magnetic pull. Warm Vanilla and earthy Patchouli add rich depth. Amber Woods leave a hypnotic trail, inviting you to go beyond the ordinary. MYSTIC EXPERIENCE is for those who dare to explore the unknown. This fragrance is a journey through gourmand, spicy, and woody notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Mystic Experience

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Narcotic Delight targets the sensual Vanilla Bean, sparked by Pink Pepper, and soaked in Cognac. It then yields to the captivating allure of a cigar. A playful touch of juicy Cherry marks a refined indulgence. Desire intensifies. NARCOTIC DELIGHT takes hold. It's an overwhelming sensuality, an intoxicating pull that fuels the fire. A provocative thrill. The skin embraces it, the heart desires it. The obsession is total. This fragrance is a gourmand journey, with boozy and spicy dimensions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Narcotic Delight

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Experience **Oud for Greatness**, a scent that captures the essence of Oud wood with majesty and raw power. This bold fragrance features Patchouli and Musk, creating a powerful, natural feel. The Oud is handled with strength and grace. It's a captivating scent, made even better with fresh Lavender, warm Nutmeg, and rich Saffron. **Oud for Greatness** is a thrilling perfume that inspires bold dreams. It's a journey into woody, spicy, and amber notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Oud for Greatness

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Experience Oud for Greatness NEO, a fragrance that feels both powerful and uplifting. It's a modern take, blending natural essences like bright bergamot and soothing lavender in its opening. The heart features the signature depth of oud, complemented by a touch of saffron. As it settles, warm fir balsam and musk create a confident and captivating aura. This woody scent has distinct spicy and aromatic undertones, designed to enhance your presence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Oud for Greatness NEO

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Oud for Happiness is your modern key to joy. It's a fresh take on Oud, boosted by a hint of narcotic grass. This scent feels liberating and energizing. It helps you relax and feel confident. Bright notes of Bergamot and Ginger add a spark of joy. The Oud wood is softened by Cedarwood and Liquorice, creating a calm, enveloping feel. It's more than just a dream; it's a journey to real harmony. This woody and spicy fragrance makes every moment feel like a win. Some also find a gourmand touch in its sweet development.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Oud for Happiness

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Paragon by Initio is like a special journey. It uses Palo Santo and White Sage. These plants were used by old shamans to clean and protect. The scent starts with calm Bergamot and Lavender. Black Pepper gives it a little kick. It's a mix of woody, fruity, and aromatic smells. Paragon wants to make you feel peaceful and balanced. It's like a shield for your good feelings.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Paragon

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Power Self is a special perfume. Initio says it's made to help your mind and feelings. They use something called 'neuroscent technology' to make you feel good and strong. It's a woody and floral scent for everyone. It aims to make you feel comfortable and like your true self. Initio calls it more than just a perfume, saying it helps you be your best.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Power Self

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Psychedelic Love is a bold and unique scent. It's like a secret thrill. It mixes soft rose and heliotrope with bright hedione. These notes shine together. The scent first brings a personal joy. Then, it grows stronger, creating a captivating feeling. Obsession begins. Psychedelic Love is enchanting and hypnotic. It's a gentle, endless fascination. Time seems to stretch, and your mind and body feel connected. This fragrance is a journey through floral, gourmand, and powdery worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Psychedelic Love

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Rehab by Initio is like a calm retreat for your senses. It's a perfume that feels natural and pure. It starts with a bright mix of Bergamot and Black Pepper. Then, soothing Lavender and a hint of spice join in. The scent settles into a creamy Sandalwood and soft Musk base. It's a gentle yet lasting fragrance that brings a feeling of peace. Discover this aromatic, woody, and subtly spicy creation.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Rehab

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Side Effect grabs you from the first spray. It's a scent that sparks desire and excitement. Imagine a captivating mix of Tobacco, Vanilla, Rum, and Cinnamon. Hedione adds an extra touch of magic. This boozy and woody fragrance also has hints of leather from the Vanilla Bean. It gives you a magnetic, almost otherworldly charm. Perfect for anyone, made in France.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Side Effect

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Feel the rush of joy with Sugar Blast. This warm and playful scent is a return to pure fun. It is a sweet gourmand treat that gives a quick hit of dopamine. The blend is designed to wake up your senses. Wear it for a confident and happy vibe.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Sugar Blast

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.description: Flip the switch and own the rush. Wild Rush is pure joy and unstoppable energy. It gives you an instant boost of confidence. This scent reinvents the classic fougere style. It is not just a perfume that stays on your skin. It moves and breathes with you. Get ready for a powerful and dynamic vibe.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ini.name: Wild Rush

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.description: 1A-33 is the first reinterpretation and one of the most successful fragrances from J.F. Schwarzlose Berlin. Already a bestseller in the 1950s, the composition remained popular for decades. The extraordinary fragrance formula combines the delightful linden blossom, magnolia, and jasmine, along with a fresh top note of mandarin and spicy red pepper. The name of the fragrance embodies the German capital, based on the former Berlin car license plate. 1A stood for Berlin, and the number 33 represented the company's location in Moabit.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.name: 1A-33

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.description: 20|20 celebrates the anniversary of the Golden 1920s, the legendary era of glamour, excess and extravagant freedom - internationally known as 'The Roaring 20s'. A sparkling 'Feel Good' fragrance for a golden start to the 2020s: pure hippie patchouli is juxtaposed with cool, velvety freshness of rose and geranium and warmed by noble woody notes.

ETRANGO is a complex scent - vibrant, self-confident, exotic and irreverent - just like the city of Berlin. The 11th fragrance from J.F. Schwarzlose is a kaleidoscope for all senses. Each and every olfactory note is an invitation into the vaudeville of imagination.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.name: Etrango

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.description: The curtain falls. The applause begins. FINALE is the peak of an unforgettable night. Inspired by Berlin's iconic stages, this scent is your grand finale. It's an opulent and warm fragrance that leaves a lasting impression. A modern take on a classic 1914 formula. This is a truly woody and spicy experience, with a touch of resinous depth.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.name: Finale

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.description: FOUGAIR raises its green fist in a revolutionary greeting and takes us into open spaces where nothing is clear-cut. Anything can be. Identity becomes fluid and a playground for self-confident interpretations begins. With a resinous, fresh fern explosion, FOUGAIR with its visionAIR direction and gender-neutral composition is given contour by refined urban jungle essence and clean chords of pink pepper.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.name: Fougair

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.description: Leder 6 is inspired by classic leather perfumes and the wild Berlin club scene. It is a reinterpretation of the early J.F. Schwarzlose Berlin fragrance "Spanisch Leder" from 1921, bringing its traditional character into the modern era. The perfume captures the provocative eroticism of old days with a wild base note of incense and Japanese storax resin, combined with sensual leather notes and saffron blossom.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.name: Leder 6

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.description: To celebrate the 10th anniversary of LEDER 6, the Anniversary Edition 'LEDER 6.9 - EXTRAIT DE PARFUM' is a new adaptation of the original Eau de Parfum, which reinterprets, enriches and develops the most important olfactive attributes of the original. Its luxurious high Extrait concentration makes LEDER 6.9 EXTRAIT DE PARFUM even more intense, darker, warmer, enveloping and longer lasting - 'LEDER JUST GOT WARMER AND WILDER'.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.name: Leder 6·9

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.description: Rausch is an exciting and sensual fragrance by J.F. Schwarzlose Berlin, which depicts the legendary nightlife of the German capital. With spicy chords and a hint of the noble oud the new composition embodies the dark and mysterious club scene of Berlin.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.name: Rausch

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.description: A new way to experience rose. Rosa Centifolia lasciviously reveals her body, striving towards light and life with her cool buds. She shines, blooms, and reigns. She is the rose that came to conquer and stay. This new Rosa Centifolia blossoms coolly above the warmth of woods and spices and it comes with a message: Expect the unexpected!
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.name: Rosa Centifolia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.description: Trance is a hypnotic fragrance that reflects Berlin: modernity versus tradition, man or woman … like the transformation from innocence to guilt. It captivates with magical notes of Turkish rose, rose absolute and a precious hint of oud.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.name: Trance

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.description: Treffpunkt 8 Uhr (Rendez-vous at 8 o'clock) is a fragrance that captures the thrilling anticipation of a rendez-vous. Originally a sporty men's fragrance from the golden twenties of Berlin, it is now an officially unisex perfume.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-f.name: Treffpunkt 8 Uhr

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: An elegant and sophisticated fragrance inspired by the incense-filled atmosphere of Japanese temples. This modern interpretation of agarwood focuses on refinement rather than animalic intensity. The composition artfully combines transparent citrus sweetness with warm spices and noble woods, creating a meditative and balanced oriental experience that pays homage to traditional Japanese incense culture.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Agarwood

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: A nostalgic journey to a Showa-era coffee shop in Japan, where the aroma of freshly roasted coffee mingles with delicate florals. This fragrance captures the essence of romantic memories and vintage charm, blending the bitterness of coffee with the sweet embrace of orange blossoms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Café

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: Hanamachi, the historic geisha district, comes alive in this elegant fragrance that captures the essence of traditional Japanese beauty. This perfume embodies the sophisticated duality of a high-ranking oiran - both innocent and alluring. The composition masterfully balances powdery iris with luxurious florals and the mysterious depth of agarwood, creating a scent that bridges past and present.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Hanamachi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: Hanamizake captures the cherished Japanese tradition of drinking sake under blooming cherry trees. This fragrance embodies the magical moment when delicate cherry blossom petals drift into sake cups during hanami celebrations, creating a perfect harmony between nature's beauty and cultural tradition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Hanamizake

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: J-Scent's Honey & Lemon is a delightful Japanese fragrance that captures the essence of sweet honey intertwined with fresh citrus. This nostalgic scent evokes memories of warm lemon tea with honey, combining traditional Japanese simplicity with modern perfumery. The composition perfectly balances sweetness and tartness, creating a comforting yet refreshing experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Honey & Lemon

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: Koiame, meaning 'Love Rain' in Japanese, captures the magical moment when a rainbow appears after rainfall. This fragrance from J-Scent embodies the delicate balance between rain-washed air and blooming flowers, creating an atmosphere of romantic nostalgia and fresh beginnings.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Koiame

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: Paper Soap by J-Scent is a nostalgic fragrance that captures the essence of traditional Japanese paper soap. This unique creation combines fresh aldehydic notes with a delicate floral heart and a creamy musk base, creating a clean and sophisticated scent that evokes memories of simplicity and purity.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Paper Soap

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: Ramune is a nostalgic tribute to the iconic Japanese soda pop, capturing the exciting moment of pushing down the marble seal of the distinctive blue glass bottle. This refreshing fragrance embodies the essence of traditional Japanese summer festivals, where the fizzy, sweet drink provides relief from the sultry heat.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Ramune

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: A premium Japanese fragrance that captures the essence of hojicha (roasted green tea), a beloved beverage in Japan. This unique scent combines the roasted crispness of tea leaves with creamy steamed milk, while subtle notes of gyokuro and seaweed create an intriguing depth that gently diffuses through the composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Roasted Green Tea

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: The scent of warmth that emerges from the shaft of light from heaven to nature. Inspired by the scenery where lights shine like a ladder straight down from the clouds to the ground in the forest. This light represents warmth and life that are shed on grasses and trees, which are bathing in nature. The light showers down upon grapefruit and lemon trees, and creamy white flowers like magnolias and gardenias.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Shaft of Light

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: A unique Japanese fragrance inspired by the dignified sumo wrestlers and their traditional hair oil 'bintsuke'. This aromatic-powdery composition captures the essence of strength and gentleness, combining fresh eucalyptus and anise with soft floral notes and warm woody undertones.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Sumo Wrestler

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: Tender Peach by J-Scent captures the essence of Japanese peach cultivation, representing the delicacy and thoughtfulness of Japanese culture. This fragrance tells the story of a peach's journey from unripe fruit to perfect maturity, embodying the meticulous attention to detail characteristic of Japanese craftsmanship.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Tender Peach

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: Inspired by Yasunari Kawabata's novel 'The House of the Sleeping Beauties', Yawahada is a delicate and intimate fragrance that captures the essence of soft skin. This subtle composition invites you into a dreamy world where reality gently fades away, creating a sensual yet comforting atmosphere that stays close to the skin.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Yawahada

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.description: Yuzu is a quintessential Japanese citrus fragrance that captures the authentic essence of the yuzu fruit, combined with aromatic thyme. This refreshing scent perfectly balances the astringency of citrus peel with the sweet-sour notes of the fruit pulp. The composition features a fine citrus accord of bergamot and orange, with yuzu taking center stage, while herbal thyme adds a distinctive aromatic touch.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/j-s.name: Yuzu

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.description: Askr emerges from the water, a scent of rugged Scotland. It's a story of ancient trees and wild coasts. Imagine peppered air, smoky resins, and salty driftwood. This fragrance is a journey through woody and aquatic landscapes, echoing with the voices of the ancients. A truly unique and wild scent experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.name: Askr

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.description: Let's dance around a smoked-out beach bonfire, skin anointed with sticky citrus char. Place reference: Corryvreckan Whirlpool, Isle of Jura.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.name: Firewater

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.description: Gorseland by Jorum Studio is a contemporary impressionist interpretation of the Scottish mountain landscape, focusing on sun-blazed yellow gorse bushes at Salisbury Crags, Edinburgh. Released in 2022 as part of the Scottish Odyssey collection, this niche fragrance captures where beauty and dereliction coexist as neon gold blooms erupt from sun-bleached concrete crags.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.name: Gorseland

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.description: Smashed to a pulp in a timeworn pestle and mortar, a tannin-sweet concoction equally fit to heal or harm. Place reference: Valley of Strathmore.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.name: Healing Berry

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.description: Paradisi is a beacon in the green. It opens with exotic, hard-to-describe fruity notes and bright citrus oils. It feels both new and strangely familiar, like a fruit you've never tasted before. The secret is a special mix of citrus and a unique berry extract, creating a scent full of hidden surprises.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.name: Paradisi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.description: The kelpie haunts a lochside sauna, hissing out a steamed-wood and pink-edged sour lotus haze. Place reference: Loch an Dùin, Uist. A unique Scottish niche fragrance that combines fruity, green, and earthy elements in an unconventional way.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.name: Pony Boy

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.description: Sunbeams filter through light linen. The air is cool and fresh. Risso brings the crisp scent of clean fabric and bright citrus. Majestic fir and fresh cypress evoke the quiet early morning. Sweet pear and bitter orange add bright clarity. The heart shines with a rush of vibrant neroli and delicate orange blossom. It is a truly radiant floral blend made in Scotland.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.name: Risso

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.description: A paper cut-out of a rose, tossed in saline sea air and blasted on jagged coastline rocks. Place reference: Buachaille Etive Mòr, Glencoe.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.name: Rose Highland

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.description: Held in the customs house, the wistful spiritmaker plunges their head into the last empty barrel, where cooper-fired sweet nothings whisper and swirl. Place reference: Queen's Dock, Glasgow
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jor.name: Spiritcask

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: Forget everything you already knew about lavender! Jovoy's '21 Conduit St' revisits a great classic of English perfumery while giving it a modern twist. The fragrance combines lavender with bright citrus notes, tangy rhubarb, and warm resinous elements. Created by Marie Schnirer and Oli Marlow, it features a dual lavender accord enriched with citrus freshness, fir balsam, and a soft amaretto note, all grounded in a woody base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: 21 Conduit St

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: Beware of first impressions… A sweet whisper brings to mind cotton candy - simple innocence, and yet Ambre Premier hides its real intentions and lives up to its name. Grandiose and out to conquer, it tattoos the skin with a voluptuous and indelible mark that leaves nothing to chance and even less to weakness. Night time is its preferred domain, passionate nights that are profound and sensual, where the heat of its lingering wake collides with the first light of dawn, as if to better defy the day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Ambre Premier

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: Aqua Memorabilis by Jovoy is a citrus-woody Eau de Parfum launched in 2024, created by perfumer Vanina Muracciole. This modern interpretation of a citrus fragrance combines juicy clementine and bitter citrus notes with spicy peppers and a sophisticated woody-ambery base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Aqua Memorabilis

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: Fire At Will by Jovoy is a gourmand fragrance launched in 2021. Created by perfumer Vanina Muracciole, it features an ethereal vanilla composition complemented by honeyed mimosa and brown sugar notes, creating a sophisticated and modern interpretation of vanilla.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Fire At Will

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: Ha Long Bay is a tribute to Vietnam. It captures the soul of the legendary bay with a rare sand mango. This scent is more than a perfume; it's a memory. It blends precious ingredients into a powerful, bright trail. The juicy mango is lifted by lively spices, soft leather, and an elegant woody base. A living fragrance that changes on your skin and leaves a mark.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Ha Long Bay

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: We brush by it, we risk it, without ever thinking about the consequences… Incident Diplomatique clearly possesses its share of superb provocation - bold, owned, and entirely inevitable when desire exudes from our every pore. As unexpected as it is audacious, the fragrance refuses convention and knowingly parades itself. Just as we might give into a staggering impulse too strong to resist, it declares its urges, teasing tension to the breaking point…
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Incident Diplomatique

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: A venerable Roman chapel in the south of Italy or a monastery lost in the perfumed hills of Greece… Here, time has no importance. There is only eternity. On the cool flagstones, worn to a satiny polish over the centuries, the Mediterranean summer's burning caress exalts an infinite love, almost holy. Suspended in the air a perfume of mysticism and mystery, hinting at a torrid, almost violent fever. Incense, olibanum and myrrh, immemorial aromas for entire, impetuous passion, ready for communion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: La Liturgie Des Heures

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: A clean perfume with powdery, floral, and fruity echoes, Musc Pallas is an original creation that gives pride of place to intense musks and a memorable trail. A resolutely iridescent bouquet with velvety peach notes, posed on a base of tonka and musk. A modern and heady powdery perfume that imparts a unique aura: your signature.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Musc Pallas

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: As daylight starts to decline, a schooner is busy readying itself to dock. "This one must be a privateer..." mumble the old people assembled in the port. Sucked in by the promises of the amber and vanilla aromas of rum and whiskey, a buccaneer rushes out onto the dock and blends into the crowd. A perfume of conquest and adventure, Pavillon Rouge is an ode to life. It invites conquering both day and night, without any fear and with the confidence of those who have braved death for some long-lost fortune or legendary glory.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Pavillon Rouge

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: This ideal and contemporary oriental fragrance's trail is as elegant as it is powerful. Both leathery and smoky, it is a highly recognizable signature scent that is exclusively for strong personalities, men and women, confident of who they are in all circumstances. A restricted circle of people who are passionate about life, who don't need recognition from others to exist and who stand by their choices with unshakeable self-assurance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Private Label

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: Peace and love forever... This 'revival' perfume pays homage to the '70s, the decade that transformed patchouli into the legendary scent of the counterculture. At all the festivals, from Wight to Woodstock, patchouli's woody and mysterious richness sang the backup vocals for the rock mindset of a new generation of rebellious youth. Today, it has made its comeback, more hippie chic than ever and the boho-glam idol par excellence. It is a classic in its own right, with all of its audacity intact. Retro-nostalgia has never been so modern.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Psychedelique

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: How many times have you let yourself be taken by surprise and found yourself enticed by a fragrance wafting from a café terrace, captivated by scent of a secret garden — or perhaps beguiled by an unforgettable perfume worn by a stranger in a crowd? And how many times have you secretly wished to be that anonymous stranger who captivates merely by virtue of a perfume? Like perfectly formed exotic dancers, frangipani flowers engage in an elaborate, spellbinding choreography. As the enchantment takes hold, a plume of traditional chai tea perfects the charm. Ginger and cardamom set ablaze an irresistible cloud of milky, gourmand notes. A spell in the guise of a perfume that murmurs Remember Me.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Remember Me

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.description: Whenever it appears that an artist's work is finally finished, there is always a moment where a sense of doubt overwhelms the artist. Should they change a note? Do they need any more of this? Or a little less of that? But when the artist trusts their vision and makes their final stroke, any sense of doubt is replaced by an ultimate satisfaction. Then the only desire that follows is the will to reveal it to the world. This is the exact moment when a master decides that their work is finished. And this is the very moment that Jovoy has grasped and put into a bottle.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/jov.name: Touche Finale

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.description: 10 a.m. Flirt by Kierin NYC is a modern niche fragrance created by perfumer Jérôme Epinette in 2018. This urban scent tells a story of New York City's vibrant atmosphere through a sophisticated blend of fig, gardenia, and woody notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.name: 10 a.m. Flirt

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.description: Nitro Noir by Kierin NYC is a remarkable and decadent spicy-floral fragrance launched in 2018. Created by perfumer Mathieu Nardin, this intoxicating and hypnotic composition is designed for individualists looking to get noticed. The scent combines Italian bergamot, pink pepper, iris (orris), and patchouli in a sophisticated blend that bridges classic and modern sensibilities.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.name: Nitro Noir

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.description: Inspired by the vibes of New York City piers, where the ocean meets the streets, this urban fragrance story is as refreshing as it is soothing. A salty aquatic scent with a complex blend of notes evoking feelings of hope, comfort, and elation. Made for inspiring moments of peace, liberation, and reunion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.name: Pier NY

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.description: KIERIN NYC ROSE INK is a scent that embodies a wild heart in a city that works, plays and loves hard. This New York story is a remarkable, woodsy floral that blends the memory of deep devotion and deviant desire. A sultry, lusty, unisex 2.0 scent made for memorable men and women.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.name: Rose Ink

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.description: Santal Park is a seductive, enveloping yet refreshing scent inspired by a mindful appreciation of sunny days spent in a cultivated, city rooftop garden. This unique scent is an urban escape to a lofty, verdant, peaceful oasis amidst a concrete cityscape.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.name: Santal Park

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.description: Santal Sky is an amazing, thoughtful scent with a touch of irreverence. Woody, intimate and serene fragrance and bound with earthy vibrancy, it refreshes the soul and embodies a calm heart in the fast beat of city streets.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.name: Santal Sky

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.description: SCENTXONE is an olfactive symphony by Kierin NYC, crafted by perfumer Jérôme Epinette. This fragrance artfully blends strength with smokey, smooth, and sweet essences in perfect proportions. It features a delicious infusion of cognac combined with wild honey, davana, myrrh, and hints of licorice, bringing vibrancy and fruity notes to the composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.name: Scentxone

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.description: Sunday Brunch by Kierin NYC is a celebratory fragrance that captures the essence of a perfect weekend morning. Created by Mathieu Nardin in 2018, this citrusy and cheerful composition centers around a unique blend of Earl Grey tea, Italian bergamot, lemon, and jasmine, creating a luminous and uplifting experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/kie.name: Sunday Brunch

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.description: Imagine if the cosmos had a scent. Altamura captures a revelation from the stars in a bottle. This fragrance feels like a journey through a nebula. It mixes bright light with deep, mysterious darkness. The experience is warm, spiritual, and truly unique. It is a masterpiece for lovers of boozy and resinous perfumes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.name: Altamura

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.description: Blanc Sada is a tribute to fragile beauty and hidden passion. It feels like soft porcelain skin. The scent mixes the tangy taste of lychee with smooth milk and powder. It brings to mind a geisha resting on a tatami mat. Hints of straw add a dry, natural touch. This fragrance is a blend of powdery comfort and green freshness.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.name: Blanc Sada

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.description: Dawn Whispers feels like a memory you can't quite place. It captures the feeling of a cool morning breeze. The scent mixes cold synthetic vibes with soft comfort. It balances lactonic creaminess with clean musk. It is distinct, modern, and invites you to dream.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.name: Dawn Whispers

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.description: Dorian lives in eternal boredom. Nothing moves him anymore. But this scent is different. It starts with a glow of rich whiskey. Sweet caramel and coffee mix in. It smells like a sophisticated dandy. Hints of dark chocolate add depth. Then, the darkness takes over. The sweetness fades into ash and smoke. It is a unique boozy and gourmand experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.name: Dorian's Spleen

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.description: Ensang Noir is a bold declaration of love. A deep red rose mixes with smoke and rare incense. A touch of black ink makes it poetic and daring. It is perfect for those who are not afraid of intense emotions. This perfume explores floral, smoky, and resinous styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.name: Ensang Noir

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.description: Jodhpur 6am captures the feeling of dawn in India. You step off the bus into the blue morning light. A vendor hands you a hot cup of chai. The scent of ginger and cardamom wakes you up. It mixes with the smell of fresh flowers nearby. You get a burst of fruity notes and apricot. Then, the creamy scent of tuberose appears. Finally, the aroma of black tea and warm milk calms your soul. It is a spicy and floral journey.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.name: Jodhpur 6am

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.description: Semence Douce is a tribute to the eternal cycle of life. Created by Bertrand Duchaufour, this scent explores the balance between birth and decline. It mixes the comfort of almond with the raw freshness of nature. The name implies a "sweet seed," hinting at the sticky sap of life. It feels like a futuristic mix of green and gourmand styles. This perfume is for those who want a scent that is both abstract and deeply human.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.name: Semence Douce

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.description: White Blood comes from an imaginary flower with glowing petals. It looks pure, but holds a thousand colors inside. It is a living, breathing scent. Watch the petals turn to sap, and sap back to petals. Solid and liquid blend in a beautiful dance. Experience this moving floral and fruity masterpiece.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/l-e.name: White Blood

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: Evoking a long winter's day spent by the fire. Imagine aromas of apple and cinnamon pie and gingerbread wafting in from the oven. Oriental notes of spices and honey introduce character and softness into this comforting moment. The harmony of rum and tobacco adds a sweet and intense touch to the enchanting elixir. As we wrap ourselves in this perfume as if snuggling into a velvet armchair, we wish for time to stand still.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Ambre

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: Ambre Supermassive, an extrait de parfum, draws inspiration from the mystical allure of red amber, embodying the depth and warmth of this precious stone. This sophisticated creation combines fruity and spicy elements in a syrupy composition that captures imagination and captivates senses, while black vanilla and tobacco notes create an infinite magnetic trail that transcends space and time.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Ambre Supermassive

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: Cèdre by Les Eaux Primordiales takes us on a journey to the Atlas Mountains at dusk, where the powerful yet sophisticated scent of cedar mingles with aromatic rose and immortelle. The composition unfolds to reveal velvety plum notes, while an addictive mist of vanilla and saffron creates a warm, enveloping presence that brightens the experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Cèdre

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: Couleur Primaire by Les Eaux Primordiales captures the essence of freshly laundered clothes drying in the open air. Created by perfumers Arnaud Poulain and Anne-Sophie Behaghel, this modern interpretation of cleanliness combines sharp aldehydes with subtle fruity notes and a sophisticated musky base, offering a contemporary take on the classic clean scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Couleur Primaire

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: Arnaud Poulain celebrates ten years of creation with this unique scent. It captures the feeling of rising up. The fragrance blends the bright sweetness of fruit with the warmth of roasted seeds. It feels like a cottony, milky cloud on the skin. This perfume explores gourmand, spicy, and woody notes to lift your spirit.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Elevation

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: IRIS PALLADIUM represents a rare combination of flower and precious metal. Opening notes of iris and cardamom reveal all the mystery and power of this blend. Like a silk scarf, this smooth fragrance diffuses warmth and sensuality over every inch of skin. A base of woody, vanilla-like sandalwood brings delicacy and emotion to this unique olfactory mechanism.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Iris Palladium

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: An evocation of a Mediterranean wedding at the end of winter. The last snowflakes land on the mimosa flower like a cloud of icing sugar. Fragrant hints of jasmine escape from this delicate, sunny bouquet, and spring is here.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Mimosa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: The resin extracted from oud wood is one of the most noble and sought-after materials in perfumery. This composition combines Laotian oud with the freshness of bitter orange and the warmth of precious woods. Enhanced by spicy benzoin, sesame, and black vanilla, it creates a memorable oriental experience that bridges traditional Middle Eastern perfumery with contemporary Western aesthetics.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Oud

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: Oud Supermassive feels like a collision of two worlds. It mixes deep traditions with a modern twist. Dark woody notes meet bright, fruity sunshine here. This perfume sits in the trendy fruit-leather-oud family but feels calmer than others. It balances raw power with elegance. You get a perfect mix of leathery depth and fruity joy.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Oud Supermassive

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: The first perfume in the Supercritique collection, Rose showcases an innovative CO2 extraction process that captures the essence of rose in its purest form. This majestic flower is reimagined in an oriental setting, where spiced tea, incense, and vanilla create a sophisticated composition fit for a Queen of Sheba.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Rose

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: Saffron is the red gold of the Middle East, derived from the beautiful Crocus flower. This precious spice is first adorned with aromatic notes of thyme and sage. Then raspberry, round and sensual, enters the scene and lifts the veil on the precious woods of guaiac and cedar. The scent of suede puts the final touch on a perfume that looks like a work of art.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Saffron

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: Superose is a bold take on the classic rose. It starts with a fresh, fruity sparkle from peach, pear, and lychee. The heart unfolds with rich Damask rose and warm saffron. This perfume is a dance of contrasts—delicate yet powerful. It's an unforgettable mix of floral elegance and bold character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Superose

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.description: Les Eaux Primordiales' Vanille is an intense and mysterious fragrance that explores the depths of vanilla's dark and spicy facets. This extrait de parfum masterfully combines resinous elements with a sophisticated vanilla accord, creating an enigmatic atmosphere that bridges classic and contemporary perfumery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/les.name: Vanille

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.description: Bo by Liis is a niche fragrance inspired by a hidden coastal artist enclave. Created by Jérôme Epinette in 2021, this woody-spicy composition features redwood pine, cedar, and guaiac wood that evoke a coastal forest, while incense, tobacco, and vanilla beans bring warmth and character to the composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.name: Bo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.description: We are all made of stardust. Celestial Object captures this cosmic connection between body and sky. It's a scent that reflects our place in the universe. This fragrance is a journey through gourmand, powdery, and resinous worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.name: Celestial Object

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.description: Choux Choux is a whimsical and fluffy treat. It's inspired by the French pastry choux à la crème. The name also comes from "chouchou," a French term of endearment like "darling." This is a true gourmand delight.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.name: Choux Choux

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.description: A fragrance inspired by opposites — celestial allure and emotional depth. Bergamot and cardamom sing atop white tea, and black tea absolute, cascading into a luscious tapestry of blonde woods and velvet musk.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.name: Ethereal Wave

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.description: Floating by Liis is a modern fresh and airy fragrance launched in 2022. Inspired by the weightlessness of a day without plans or obligations, it features effervescent top notes of ripe peach and bergamot that levitate over wild orchid, crisp linen and sequoia wood.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.name: Floating

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.description: In This World by Liis is a lush, ethereal fragrance that captures the essence of a coastal California garden. Created in 2024, this minimalist composition combines aromatic herbs, fresh citrus, and woody notes in a dreamy, nature-inspired blend.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.name: In This World

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.description: Inspired by new ways of seeing, Lucienne — meaning light — is an exuberant moment of clarity. Pomelo, lemon zest, and dragonfruit glimmer through impressions of crisp magnolia, waterlily and salty marine waves.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.name: Lucienne

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.description: Inspired by a cherished love poem, Of True Minds is a tribute to deep connection. This fragrance celebrates love in all its forms. It's a beautiful and complex blend of leathery, resinous, and spicy notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.name: Of True Minds

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.description: Inspired by flowers frozen in ice and dramatic winter skies transforming into spring — a fleeting moment captured in scent. A study in contrasts and impermanence, a modern, reimagined rose.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.name: Rose Struck

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.description: Inspired by Virginia Woolf's A Room of One's Own, Studied by Liis is a delicate and thoughtful fragrance that creates a personal space for creativity and reflection. Created by Jérôme Epinette in 2021, this modern composition combines bright pear and ambrette with carrot seed, orris, and warm cashmere notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lii.name: Studied

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: The heart is indeed a powerful symbol of life and love. The heart has been associated with love, passion, emotion and romance for centuries, with Cupid's arrow piercing the heart being a well-known image in art and literature. The heart is the source of our deepest emotions and desires, or that it is the place where our truest self resides. Ame du Cœur is love, the soul of the heart. Precious as a ruby, explosive as a bomb and bold as spice.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Âme du Cœur

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: Âme du Fleur tells the story of the anemone flower, born from Aphrodite's tears. It represents eternal love and change. This scent combines narcotic floral notes with a sturdy woody base. It unveils the silent language of flowers.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Âme du Fleur

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: Blanche Bête is the fragrance that will transport you to an enchanted garden, where a mythical creature roams. With notes of white flowers and opaline light, this fragrance embodies the purity and magic of the legendary white horse with a single horn. Blanche Bête represents the power of imagination and creativity, a symbol of love and mystery. Let yourself be enchanted by the elusive presence of Blanche Bête, and let its magic take you to a world beyond the ordinary.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Blanche Bête

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: Bloody Wood by Liquides Imaginaires is a unique fragrance inspired by grand cru Burgundy wine. Created in 2013 by perfumer Shyamala Maisondieu, it explores the rich mythology and duality of wine and life. This sophisticated composition combines metallic and floral top notes with a wine-soaked heart of cherries and raspberries, all resting on a foundation of oak barrel and sandalwood.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Bloody Wood

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: Experience the enchanting scent of Dom Rosa - a beguiling scent that features champagne sparkling notes, adding a touch of effervescent magic to its already enchanting aroma. Inspired by the queen of flowers, this seductive fragrance captures the magic and beauty of the Rose, with fruity and woody notes that evoke the tranquil vineyards and chalky soil where it grows.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Dom Rosa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: Experience the exotic and rare with Fleur de Sable fragrance. Born from the whims of the desert wind, this fragrance is a treasure hidden in plain sight. The salty and crystal petals, baptized with dew and delicate spices, create a unique scent that is as rare as it is bold. Be transported to the dunes and experience the queen of the desert with Fleur de Sable.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Fleur de Sable

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: Fleuve Tendre is a sophisticated niche fragrance that explores the boundaries between tenderness and passion. Inspired by the Map of Tendre, a legendary allegory of love, this scent creates an olfactory journey through a landscape of sensual pleasures. The fragrance leads you along a path lined with blue thistles and peppery shrubs to a secret cave guarded by wild rose bushes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Fleuve Tendre

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: Experience the transformational power of Fortis fragrance, like a regenerating fire that rejuvenates and revitalizes, leaving you feeling renewed and refreshed. Its encompassing warmth reassures and its sparks of energy ignite new life within. Just as a fire brings forth new growth from the ashes, Fortis has the power to regenerate and revitalize your spirit.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Fortis

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: In the heart of LIQUIDE lies a tale of alchemical marvels, inspired by the Tarot's symbolic journey of transformation. This enchanting fragrance beckons you to embark on a transcendent odyssey, where earthly richness meets spiritual enlightenment. As the story unfolds, notes of Mandarin and Saffron dance together, weaving a tapestry of exotic allure and vibrant warmth. Followed by the intriguing essence of Carrot Seed and Coriander Seed, evoking ancient wisdom and mystique.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Liquide Gold

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: Lunatique invites you to embrace your darker, hidden aspects, revealing the depths of your personality. This unique fragrance is a journey of contrasts, from bright top notes to deep, mysterious undertones. It opens with a refreshing blend of juniper, pear, and the bold kick of Sichuan pepper, lifting your senses and preparing you for the adventure ahead. The heart reveals unexpected twists of iris, carrot, and neroli, blending a soft floral sweetness with earthy warmth. As the fragrance lingers, it transitions into a sultry base of leather, oud, and ambergris, underscored by rich sandalwood and a whisper of vetiver.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Lunatique

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.description: Sancti by Liquides Imaginaires is a sacred and mystical fragrance created in 2011 by perfumer Sonia Constant. It represents holy water and serves as a symbol of purification of body and soul. This treasure, traditionally gifted to kings and gods, combines aromatic vapors with cypress and rosemary to energize and illuminate the spirit.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/liq.name: Sancti

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Like a snapshot, Adam & Eve's Dress captures the totality of olfactory nuances of a fig tree: from the juicy freshly picked fruit to the scent of leaves, from the milk to the wood of the tree. It is a fragrance where green and aromatic notes are expressed in many nuances, enriched by the exotic and voluptuous richness of tuberose and jasmine. An invitation to the good life made of simple things that enrich the world.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Adam & Eve's Dress

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: An icy sea, like a lime granita sprinkled with salt, followed by yuzu, arctic wisteria, and suspended dreams. A sea that knows how to overwhelm you with elegance. A sensual and magnetic embrace. One of the most beautiful olfactory paintings ever created.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Artik Sea

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: The sky darkens and the sea is quiet, a moment before the storm. The wind arrives with its load of flowers and aromatic herbs, and the threatening sky reflects in the leaden water that looks like ink. It's a moment: the waves slap against the rocks with such force that they saturate the air, and the saltiness fills the lungs. Nature is demonstrating its immense power. Black Sea is a perfume that releases the power of the elements, a fragrance for those who fearlessly throw themselves into the arms of a creation yet to be discovered.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Black Sea

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Bloody Smoke is a fragrance of contrasts: the opening is marked by the opposition of cold mineral notes, reinforced by the spicy nuances of elemi, to the voluptuous scents of jasmine and lily of the valley. As it opens, the perfume reveals incense and ferrous notes supported by the salty shades of gray amber that stand against the soft and warm notes of resins and woods. The whirlwind of challenging and provocative notes creates a singular harmony. Bloody Smoke is not just a perfume, it is a battlefield where the clang of swords becomes one with the cries of warriors, the smell of smoke mixes with the smell of blood.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Bloody Smoke

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Carbonara is a symbolic homage to the signature dish of Chef Lorenzo Pazzaglia. The skillful mix of spices and exotic notes stimulates the imagination of those who wear it. Coconut and Davana, with their fruity character, blend into the amber sweetness of cane sugar and bourbon vanilla. Sandalwood adds softness and creaminess, while oud creates an unexpected twist.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Carbonara

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: A unique and sophisticated cherry fragrance that combines sweet and boozy notes with an unexpected ink accord. The composition opens with amarena cherry, rum, and bergamot, evolving through a complex heart of red wine, flowers, and ink, before settling on a base of precious woods, amber, and tonka bean.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Cherry Ink

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Coffee is more than a drink. It's a ritual, a memory, a warm welcome. Coffeee Passion captures this feeling in a bottle. It's an irresistible gourmand scent for those who live intensely. Intense coffee notes blend with sweet hazelnut and creamy coconut milk. It's a delicious and unforgettable fragrance that leaves a trail of pure passion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Coffeee Passion

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Night falls with its cocktail of luxurious spices and sweet white flowers that blend with the vivid green notes of vegetation hidden by darkness. The unmistakable scent of the sea merges on skin painted with crystalline salt of bright stars and algid moon. Embraces are tinged with love and the rustle of waves rocks between breaths while the magical call of enchanting sirens rises.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Dream Sea

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Esco Pazzo ('I'm going crazy!') was an exercise in patience and perseverance. Lorenzo Pazzaglia had a perfect image of the fragrance in mind that seemed reluctant to be translated into reality. With tenacity and certain obstinacy, not wanting to give up, he managed to transform the idea into reality. A modern interpretation of the classic fougère structure, enriched with oriental touches and amber nuances.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Esco Pazzo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: In my heart, I have the wind whispering clear and pure mint. In my eyes, I have sails unfurled, seas of Whisky to navigate and lands of Absinthe to discover. I unsheathe my sword and find justice in the arms of sweet myrrh and vanilla while my rebellious soul finally finds peace. Thus, night comes as a source of peace, and I, a warrior, rest on a bed of flowers and woods because tomorrow is a new day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Evil Angel

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Extreme Passion by Lorenzo Pazzaglia is an Extrait de Parfum that captures the essence of passion through a masterful blend of fruits and flowers. This modern creation combines tropical fruits with elegant white florals, supported by a sophisticated woody-musky base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Extreme Passion

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Gin Fusion changes the mood the moment it hits the air. It opens with a bright and bold citrus blast. You get the instant, fresh feel of a classic gin and tonic. In the heart, the scent shifts to a calmer vibe. Green tea and mate bring a smooth, relaxing touch. Finally, warm woods, vetiver, and cardamom add a cool, rebellious edge. It is fresh, surprising, and full of energy.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Gin Fusion

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Green Island is more than a perfume. It is a heartfelt memory of Ischia. Lorenzo Pazzaglia captures the scent of a happy childhood in this bottle. Imagine sunny streets and the soothing sound of waves. The wind smells of salt and freedom here. You get the aroma of ripe citrus fruits and wild mountain herbs. It feels like a warm hug at sunset. This scent is for anyone who cherishes memories like a jewel. It is a beautiful mix of woody, citrus, and aromatic notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Green Island

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: In my garden, only roses bloom that merge and blend with passion fruits, and my scent is released, predatory, rippling with leather and black currant sensuality, leaving a trace of me with every step.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Passion Rose

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Pax is an olfactory self-portrait in which Lorenzo Pazzaglia reveals himself and his culinary art through his personality. Contrasts and oppositions of notes recreate the facets of a multifaceted person. The sparkling and cordial opening of citrus and pepper introduces a heart of fruity notes whose sweetness is tempered by crystalline incense. Precious woods, together with leather, form an unexpected background on which a bouquet of white flowers with fruity and spicy nuances rests. Each note, every raw material used, is a hidden symbol but also a key to interpretation. Pax is Lorenzo Pazzaglia's immense HEART.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Pax

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: What do the stars smell like? Imagine an enchanted evening under a deep blue sky. The air blends fresh citrus with velvety rose petals, all dipped in creamy milk. A sweet cookie accord and a hint of coconut make it even cozier. Pink Milk is a galaxy of bright scents, a new star leaving a captivating trail. It's an invitation to dream and always look up. This fragrance is a journey through gourmand and floral notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Pink Milk

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Que Chimba is bold and sensual. It captures the essence of life and passion. Picture a warm Colombian afternoon, the sun dancing through palm leaves. A glass of Aguardiente is raised, a companion for parties and celebrations. A fresh bouquet of star anise invites you to let go and dive into the country's vibrancy. Notes of guava, passion fruit, and orchid make it lively and engaging. Que Chimba is the soul of a land full of passion and tradition, a call to celebrate life to the fullest. A spicy, fruity, and boozy scent that stays in your heart.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Que Chimba

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: The sky turns red and plunges into the sea. The heart ignites with contrasting feelings and fades into loving eyes that quench their thirst with poetry.
