Mint and Bergamot dance barefoot on the beach wet with ozone and myrtle, and that's how making love in a bed of white flowers becomes a hymn to life that can sometimes be dry with Patch, algae, salty but also sweet.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Sex Sea

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: If Speachless were a song, it'd be pure rock: loud, unapologetic, and impossible to overlook. A wild wave of sound that crashes into your senses and hijacks your mood. This isn't background music. It's the anthem of your better, bolder self. It kicks off with a citrusy blast—sharp, juicy, electric. A punch of peach joins the chaos, diving headfirst into a swaggering, rebellious blend of raw cannabis and cool vetiver. It's not just a fragrance; it's a hit, a solo, a full-blown jam session of scent. This is the kind of fragrance you don't wear—it wears you. Speachless doesn't speak. It screams freedom, it roars emotion. It's not a perfume, it's a mosh pit of feelings wrapped in a bottle. This fragrance is a journey through fruity, citrus, and aromatic realms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Speachless

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Think of the sweetness of a sudden caress, the warmth of home when you return chilled, a slice of panettone dipping in hot and foamy milk with hazelnuts and chocolate. Feel the scent of toffee candies and dates on the table while orange peels crackle on the welcoming fire... Can you feel it? There's a festive scent in the air
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Sugar Kisses

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Summer in a bottle to be experienced 365 days a year at all latitudes, even when it's cold outside and warm temperatures are just a mirage. A fresh and juicy mango piña colada enriched with warm and tropical vibes, supported by an airy floral bouquet and a solid base with green notes and enriched with the creaminess of sandalwood. An immediate and playful fragrance, designed to convey happiness, carefreeness and joie de vivre!
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Summer Hammer

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Sun-gria is an olfactory symphony that projects into a picture overflowing with life: a fresh and juicy opening, given by red orange and citrus, with a dusting of spices, is submerged by a hot and intense heart composed of peach, black currant, apple, raspberry and red wine. The drydown is sweet and sensual, with woods and vanilla covered by cane sugar that will make everything irresistible and create a magnetic trail.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Sun-Gria

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Sweet Xplosion is a masterful composition that creates an explosion of olfactory sensations, joy, and serenity. This fragrance lifts the spirit and provides a precious moment of wellbeing away from daily life. Opening with spicy citrus notes of lime, tamed by the sweetness of coconut and honey, it evolves into a radiant blend of perfectly harmonized notes creating a spicy, aromatic, floral, and sweet composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Sweet Xplosion

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Imagine a drink you can wear. **Tropikalys Karma** is like a thick, fresh, and colorful tropical smoothie. It bursts with joy right from the start. Creamy coconut meets soft papaya and bright pineapple. The heart is a juicy blast of mango, lychee, and yellow pitaya. The colors feel deep and lively, wrapping you in pure happiness. As it dries down, it gets warm and sweet. Amber woods and musky vanilla blend smoothly. A touch of plantain adds a sunny feel. This is a full, gourmand, and highly fruity scent. Wear it like a smile on your skin.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Tropikalys Karma

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Van Exstasyx is a luxurious gourmand fragrance that celebrates different varieties of vanilla. Created by Lorenzo Pazzaglia, this extrait de parfum features a complex blend of various vanilla types (Bourbon, Madagascar, Tahitian, and Black Vanilla) complemented by white flowers, caramel, tonka bean, and a subtle touch of oud. The composition creates a sophisticated sweet and creamy experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Van Exstasyx

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Van Py Rhum is a luxurious extrait de parfum created by Lorenzo Pazzaglia that masterfully combines drops of rum with soft vanilla on a bed of patchouli and white flowers. This fragrance tells a story of warm elegance through its rich and sophisticated composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Van Py Rhum

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.description: Dive into a world of intense emotions and vibrant scents with the Lorenzo Pazzaglia Parfinity Box! Created by the passionate Lorenzo Pazzaglia himself, these five Extrait de Parfums are designed to evoke unforgettable moments and feelings. This box is your perfect opportunity to explore his unique creations before choosing your favorite full-size bottle. Plus, you get a €40 coupon towards your next purchase! Inside this box, you'll find: Summer Hammer: Experience summer 365 days a year! This fruity, woody, and aquatic scent is a juicy mango piña colada with tropical notes, marine notes, and a creamy sandalwood base. Pure happiness in a bottle! 🥭🍍🥥 Sun-Gria: A vibrant fruity cocktail! This boozy and spicy fragrance opens with blood orange and citrus, leading to a heart of red wine, grape, and peach. A sweet and sensual drydown with vanilla and amber. 🍷🍊🍑 Extreme Passion: Passion captured in a bottle! This fruity, floral, and woody Extrait de Parfum blends intense passion fruit and pear with elegant magnolia and white musk on a smooth sandalwood base. 🔥🍐🌸 Dream Sea: The magic of the night sea. An aquatic, spicy and woody scent combining ozonic and marine notes with warm spices, white flowers, and a base of sandalwood, vanilla, and black sea salt. 🌊✨🧂 Sex Sea: Sensual and refreshing. This aquatic, citrus, and aromatic fragrance features sparkling pink grapefruit, cool mint, intense marine notes, and a base of ambergris and salt. A passionate embrace by the sea. 💖🌊🌿 Explore these captivating scents and find your next signature fragrance!
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/lor.name: Lorenzo Pazzaglia - Summer Vibes

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine drinking icy absinthe under the Northern Lights. That's the adventure of Absinthe Boréale. It's a scent of surprising contrasts. Frosted artemisia meets the soft comfort of musk. Think of crunching snow and a cozy shelter. This aromatic and green fragrance is a hypnotic, verdant whisper.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Absinthe Boréale

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Inspired by a trek through a vibrant jungle. Ambre Chromatique is a colorful and surprising scent experience. It captures the search for precious benzoin resin. This fragrance is a journey through amber, spicy, and resinous worlds. A modern twist on a classic theme.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Ambre Chromatique

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine tasting spicy black tea and wild berries deep in a forest. Bois Datchaï is a scent of contrasts. Crisp, lively berries meet smoky and enchanting woods. It's an adventure in a bottle, blending fruity and spicy notes perfectly.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Bois Datchaï

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine tasting a citrus cocktail with a kick of chili in a vibrant tropical market. This scent captures that adventure. It's a surprising mix of cool, juicy bergamot and the warm, earthy notes of vetiver and myrrh. A truly unique citrus and spicy experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Citrus Batikanga

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: The defining adventure: a night of electronic music, illuminated by raspberry cocktails and colorful neon lights. The surprising contrast: supple leather illuminated by a fluorescent raspberry. A journey into fruity and leathery worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Cuir Infrarouge

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine sipping a vibrant hibiscus tea in a bustling gemstone market. That's the adventure of Hibiscus Mahajad. It's a scent of surprising contrasts. A bright floral duo of hibiscus and rose meets the smooth touch of leather and the sweet warmth of vanilla beans. This fragrance is a unique journey, blending fruity and leathery notes into an unforgettable experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Hibiscus Mahajad

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Iris Malikhân is a scent of beautiful contrasts. It captures the image of wild irises blooming in a sun-scorched desert. This fragrance is a surprising blend of delicate flowers and raw, powerful elements. The result is a unique journey that is both powdery and leathery, with a touch of gourmand sweetness. It's a bold statement for those who love a complex and unforgettable scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Iris Malikhân

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine a pure lily blooming by a Swedish fjord. That's Lys Sølaberg. It's a scent of contrasts. You get the graceful flower, but also something smoky and earthy. This depth comes from roasted oakwood and spicy calamus. It starts fresh and light, then reveals its deeper, spicier side. A truly unique fragrance that is both elegant and profound. A journey through floral, woody, and fruity worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Lys Solaberg

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Experience the awakening of the senses with Musc Nurāsana. This scent captures the feeling of a quiet morning. It is a radiant musk fragrance filled with pure vitality. The blend perfectly balances openness with a return to yourself. It leaves a long-lasting, comforting trail that feels incredibly warm.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Musc Nurāsana

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine a walking safari. The sun is warm. You discover a field of orange blossoms. That's Neroli Nasimba. It's a surprising mix of fresh neroli and a smooth leather accord. A truly unique floral and leathery adventure.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Neroli Nasimba

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine tasting a juicy passion fruit deep in a mysterious forest. Oud Maracuja captures this surprising moment. It mixes the deep, rich scent of oud wood with bright, exotic passion fruit. This perfume is a bold adventure, a journey into contrasts. It's a mix of fruity, leathery, and woody worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Oud Maracuja

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine the thrill of a horse race. The air is filled with the scent of rich oud wood. Oud Stallion captures this moment. It's a bold mix of smoky leather and deep, dark woods. A truly surprising and powerful scent. This fragrance is a journey through leathery, woody, and spicy worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Oud Stallion

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine meeting tattooed women weaving papyrus leaves while smoking cigarillos. That's the adventure behind this scent. It's a surprising mix. You get a milky, powdery and woody papyrus. This contrasts with a deep, rebellious tobacco note. A truly unique experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Papyrus Moléculaire

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine riding a motorcycle through patchouli fields during a tropical storm. That's the adventure behind Patchouli Magnetik. It's a scent of contrasts. Dark, woody patchouli gets an electric shock from a creamy, bright mix of sandalwood and gardenia.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Patchouli Magnetik

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine a walk by the sea, surrounded by fields of fresh roses. A cool ocean breeze drifts through the petals. **Rose Saltifolia** captures this very moment. It's a surprising blend of sparkling rose and salty, smooth seaweed. This fragrance is a journey through floral and aquatic worlds, with a hint of spice. It feels like a perfect day at the coast.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Rose Saltifolia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Safran Secret tells the story of a mysterious adventure. Imagine discovering a saffron field hidden in a thick fog. This deep, sensual scent is captivating and enigmatic. It blends bright, comforting saffron with warm, powerful woody notes. A truly unique spicy and woody experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Safran Secret

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine scorched sandalwood on the slopes of an erupting volcano. That's the adventure Santal Volcanique takes you on. It's a surprising contrast. You get potent, addictive sandalwood brightened by vibrant, spicy coffee. A truly unique woody experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Santal Volcanique

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Imagine smelling tuberose under a sky full of stars. That's the feeling of Tubéreuse Astrale. It's a surprising mix of bright, sparkling floral notes and a smooth, velvety leather accord. A truly unique scent for a special night out.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Tubéreuse Astrale

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Alter Ego 786 is a sophisticated woody-oriental fragrance from Maison Noir that masterfully combines a solid oud wood base with smoky accents and an unexpected twist of raspberry liqueur. Created by Alexandra Monet, this eau de parfum showcases a harmonious blend of spicy and sweet elements, making it a perfect choice for fall and winter evenings.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Alter Ego 786

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Bohemia 265 is a citrus-woody fragrance created by Alexandra Monet for Maison Noir. Fresh bergamot and aromatic cardamom are balanced with woody notes on a foundation of subtle amber vetiver.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Bohemia 265

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Icarus 347 by Maison Noir is a modern fruity-green fragrance created by Michel Almairac in 2023. Inspired by the legend of Icarus' bravery, this fresh and sophisticated scent combines juicy fruits with green elements and a warm base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Icarus 347

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Quandoley 805 by Maison Noir is a sophisticated fragrance inspired by a journey on the Orient Express. Created by perfumer Guillaume Flavigny in 2024, this luxurious composition features a unique blend of olive oil, ylang-ylang, and vanilla, balanced with resinous notes of benzoin and frankincense.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Quandoley 805

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Rosaeterna 163 is a timeless tribute to the eternal rose. This fragrance captures the flower's classic beauty but gives it a modern, mysterious twist. It blends bright bergamot and a hint of pink pepper with a deep heart of rose absolute. The scent settles into a warm, captivating base of smoky oud and earthy patchouli. It's a journey through floral, woody, and resinous worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Rosaeterna 163

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Edgy vanilla forms the base for a bouquet of plumeria and cistus, sprinkled with juicy Italian bergamot.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Somnia 517

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Vertigo 236 by Maison Noir, created by Alexandra Monet in 2022, is a modern citrus-woody fragrance that combines fresh mint and bright lemon with sophisticated spicy and woody undertones. The composition features a refreshing top of mint, lemon, and saffron, transitioning through a heart of Ambrox and clary sage, before settling on a base of musk, vetiver, and patchouli.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Vertigo 236

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.description: Volantis 685 by Maison Noir is a sophisticated woody-spicy fragrance created by Alexandra Monet in 2022. This Eau de Parfum features a rich and warm composition built around ambroxan and cedarwood, complemented by delicate leather accords and an intriguing saffron twist.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mai.name: Volantis 685

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mdc.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mdc.name: MDCI Voyage

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mei.description: Dive into my September obsessions! 🤩 This Parfinity Box is a curated selection of 5 fragrance discoveries I couldn't resist sharing. Each scent is a journey, a story waiting to unfold on your skin. Plus, you'll get a discount code equal to the box price to use at parfinity.com! Inside, you'll find: Cuir Infrarouge by Maison Crivelli: A vibrant leathery and fruity adventure with notes of raspberry and oud, crafted by Jordi Fernandez. Qalbi by Attar Collection: An opulent oriental fragrance, a woody, spicy, and floral blend with bergamot, ylang-ylang, and oud, also by Jordi Fernandez. Criminal Lipstick by Simone Andreoli: A bold fruity and floral rebellion, a powdery scent of red grape, iris, and oud, created by Simone Andreoli. Cognac Reign by D.S. & Durga: A boozy, woody, and gourmand journey to a baroque ballroom with notes of cognac and tonka bean, by David Seth Moltz. Finale by J.F. Schwarzlose Berlin: The grand finale of your night! A woody, spicy, and resinous fragrance with pink pepper, tobacco, and guaiac wood, created by Veronique Nyberg.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mei.name: September's Finest

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: From the enchanting balance between sea and desert emerges Abu Dhabi, a fragrance that captures the essence of the Emirates. Centered around a precious date accord, this composition weaves together the warmth of the desert with the freshness of the Arabian Gulf. The architectural magnificence of the Sheikh Zayed Mosque finds its olfactory parallel in the masterful blend of cardamom, frankincense, and multiple vetivers, creating a monument of scent that pays homage to this magnificent city.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Abu Dhabi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: African Leather by Memo Paris is a luxurious and sophisticated fragrance that captures the essence of the African continent. Released in 2015, this exceptional creation by perfumer Aliénor Massenet combines warm spicy notes of cardamom and saffron with a floral touch of geranium, which harmoniously blend with a refined leather accord to create a wild and captivating leather fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: African Leather

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: Cappadocia by Memo Paris is a luxurious fragrance from the Graines Vagabondes collection that features saffron as its keystone note. Released in 2023, this sophisticated composition combines floral sweetness with creamy woods and resins for a delicately ambered, enveloping experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Cappadocia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: A solar perfume from Memo Paris, as vibrant as the Greek sky, leaving on the skin a warm trail, like a memory of a dive in the Ionian Sea. A modern chypre overdosed with musk.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Corfu

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: L'Eau de Memo, created to celebrate Memo Paris' 10th anniversary, embodies the brand's essence. The bottle features birds symbolizing travel and freedom, soaring across a Parisian sky. This unique composition combines fresh citrus notes with an elegant green tea heart and a sophisticated leather base, creating a harmonious blend of freshness and refinement.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Eau de Memo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: A fragrance that brings to mind the magnetic energy of the northern lights alongside the protective warmth of a cozy wooden house. The marriage of natural ingredients including bergamot, bitter orange, aromatic clary sage, and sambac jasmine creates a rush of bright freshness. They whirl around suave, vibrant notes of cedarwood. Then emerges that pleasant feeling of well-being at home, as Mother Earth generously provides ingredients such as tonka bean and vanilla pods, paired with comforting mineral amber and sweet white musk.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Flåm

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: French Leather by Memo Paris is a sophisticated fragrance that captures the essence of French elegance. A modern interpretation of the classic leather-rose combination, it embodies the refined spirit of Parisian fashion and luxury leather goods. The scent tells the story of a French rose finding its perfect match in smooth suede, creating an olfactory journey through the streets of Paris.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: French Leather

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: A beautifully enticing Brazilian island fragrance that immerses the soul in delicious dreams. This honey-inspired perfume sends an urgent message to surrender to desire and lose yourself.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Ilha Do Mel

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: A fragrance inspired by the Scottish Highlands, capturing the essence of Inverness with its deep forests, bare moors, and mysterious landscapes. A woody scent that evokes the region's natural beauty, with a striking and pervasive trail that keeps its mystery intact.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Inverness

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: Irish Leather by Memo Paris is a unique leather fragrance launched in 2013, created by perfumer Aliénor Massenet. It captures the essence of Ireland's wild countryside through a blend of juniper berries, green mate, and leather, inspired by the Irish origins of Memo Paris' co-founder.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Irish Leather

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: A memory of India, steeped in the rich and airy fragrance of jasmine sambac and the creamier scent of sandalwood, is what guided the composition of Madurai. A fragrance that stirs the senses with vibrant notes of citrus and turmeric, like a colourful market stall.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Madurai

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: A beautifully bewitching fragrance inspired by Marfa, Texas. Tuberose & Orange blossom create a sensual, lingering scent that evokes the singular nature of a white-hot land.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Marfa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: Ocean Leather by Memo Paris is a unique fusion of oceanic freshness and leather, launched in 2020. Created by perfumer Aliénor Massenet, it combines Madagascan mandarin oil and elemi essence with a sophisticated leather accord, vetiver, and cedar essences. This versatile fragrance bridges the gap between fresh aquatic notes and deeper leather undertones.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Ocean Leather

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: Russian Leather by Memo Paris is a sophisticated journey through the vast Russian wilderness. This fragrance captures the essence of Siberian forests, combining aromatic herbs with leather and woods. Created by Sophie Labbé in 2016, it embodies the spirit of Russian landscapes with its blend of fougère elements, green notes, and a refined leather accord.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Russian Leather

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: Sherwood by Memo Paris is a sophisticated woody fragrance that pays homage to the legendary forest. This modern interpretation features a harmonious blend of creamy sandalwood and oakwood, enriched with blackcurrant bud absolute and delicate florals. While it may not capture the dark, mysterious essence of its namesake forest, it offers a refined, contemporary take on woody fragrances with its soft, approachable character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Sherwood

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: Solar and invigorating, Sicilian Leather captures the essence of Sicily with its volcanic energy and Mediterranean spirit. A composition carried by sea winds, island vegetation, and the sovereign presence of Mount Etna, this fragrance masterfully combines fresh citrus notes with refined leather accords.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Sicilian Leather

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: Sweet spirale Sintra, like a reminiscence of childhood with its marshmallow note brought by Orange blossom absolute, Petitgrain, Vanilla Madagascar absolute. Both mellow and airy, thanks to the presence of musks, it is very round, with a floral and fruity sweetness. Gourmet yet light, resolutely addictive.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Sintra

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: Vanilla and cereal volutes. The sweetness of love, under the burning sun of the world's largest sand desert, a touch of vanilla slips into the comforting embrace of a cereal. In the distant oasis of Siwa, anyone can consult the oracles, just as Alexander the Great and Cleopatra once did, to discover what their destiny holds and make it come true.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Siwa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: Tamarindo is lined with lush wilderness, surrounded by turquoise waters beyond the primal forest and mountains. Giant tamarind trees are home to colourful parrots, their cries ringing through the jungle, the warm forest air made humid with forgotten scents. A round of captivating notes, a dizzying dance beneath the sun. Tamarindo is a well-guarded secret, a joyful landscape, a trail of happiness, a solar scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Tamarindo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: Tiger's Nest from Memo Paris emerges from the sacred mountain of Bhutan. A tiger's lair, nestled between the forest and the impenetrable clouds, overlooks the abyss of the valley. This sacred incense fragrance captures the mystical essence of the Himalayan monastery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Tiger's Nest

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.description: A fresh and spicy scent that is a powerful contrast between fire and ice. Inspired by the hypnotic energy of China and its imperial palaces, the first impression is of fresh bergamot and oil of orange that bring a sheer and invigorating power.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mem.name: Winter Palace

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: A journey to Morocco in a bottle. This scent is a tribute to joy and new encounters. 'Shukran' means 'thank you' in Arabic. It captures the ritual of sharing mint tea, a beautiful gesture of welcome. This fragrance is an aromatic and citrus experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: 2# Nota di Viaggio (Shukran)

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: A perfume dedicated to the love for Sicily, roots, and childhood memories. It tells a story of youth, a tribute to the perfumer's mother, grandmother, and father. This fragrance is a journey through floral, green, and woody landscapes, capturing the essence of a cherished homeland. It's a scent of joy and contentment, a beautifully balanced and refined memory in a bottle.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: 3# Nota di Viaggio (Ciavuru d'Amuri)

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: It is night. It is dark. Thoughts wander. *Buio* captures the moment of searching for light within yourself. It's about finding hope and letting the darkness go. This is a scent for sleepless nights, where fears seem huge but shrink in the daylight. A journey through woody, smoky, and leathery notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Buio

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Encore du Temps is a tribute to timeless love, inspired by a journey to Laos. It captures a moment of peace, like a flower falling into a cup of tea. This fragrance is about places where time slows down, and everything is found in a simple smile. It's a slow, beautiful memory in a bottle. A journey through floral, tea, and woody landscapes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Encore du Temps

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Imagine a hot August afternoon. A cool yuzu lemonade in your hand. **Isola** captures this moment perfectly. It's a journey from Japan to Sicily, bringing together the warmth of the wind and the light scent of citrus fruits. This fragrance is like a cool drink in the summer heat, with the sea on the horizon. It's a happy scent, bathed in sunshine and salty sea water. A beautiful mix of citrus, aquatic, and green styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Isola

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: L'Oblio is a journey into forgetfulness. Inspired by a trip down the Mekong River, it captures the feeling of a memory slipping away. It's like standing in a quiet, abandoned room, filled with the ghosts of the past. This scent is a spiral of stillness, a meditation in a bottle. It blends powdery, woody, and smoky notes to create a calm, melancholic, and deeply personal experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: L'Oblio

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Last Season captures a peaceful trip to Sweden. Imagine a warm August morning on a pristine island. The scent tells a story of mossy landscapes and dark Baltic rocks. It's a fragrance inspired by still woods and quiet waters, a distant, serene world. This perfume is a journey through chypre, aromatic, and earthy notes, creating a truly unique experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Last Season

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Little Song captures the feeling of time passing. It's a perfume about quiet moments and memories. Imagine a cup of coffee left on a desk, its rich aroma filling the air. Picture a bouquet of roses, their petals slowly drying. A hint of a cigarette lingers, a mix of pungent tobacco and smoke. This scent is a journey through woody, gourmand, and spicy notes, telling a story of elegant solitude.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Little Song

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: In perfect balance, between silence and stillness of the soul. Luce draws inspiration from the perfect harmony of Louis Kahn's architecture, a meeting point between silence and light. The sensory translation of this perfume opens with the harmony of Birch and Fir notes, like a plant song at dawn. The intensity and harmony of Sandalwood, Patchouli and Tobacco warm the soul. Quietness finds its fulfillment in the deep base of this creation, a precious bed of Amber and Musk, enveloping the warm notes of Cedarwood. Vanilla, Benzoin and a superfine Leather celebrate this journey. A fragrance that envelops, protects, and spreads its Light far away. This is a truly woody and resinous experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Luce

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Narcotico takes you on a spiritual journey through Palermo. It's a scent about the soul and its connection to the sacred. Imagine walking through ancient alleys and quiet churches. This fragrance captures that feeling. It's a deep and thoughtful blend of earthy, woody, and resinous notes. A tribute to the artist Pier Paolo Pasolini, it tells a story of memory and silence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Narcotico

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Notturno is a tribute to the night and to poetry. It's like a quiet journey into your own thoughts. Imagine a dark room, the smell of old books, and the creative spark of inspiration. This scent captures that moment, a word written in ink, a memory held dear. It's a fragrance that explores woody, leathery, and boozy notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Notturno

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Odor 93 is a journey into a fairy-tale world. An emotional dedication to the band Current 93 and its founder, David Tibet. The odorous fairy tale opens its curtain between smoky and spicy notes. The ritual of the tale is celebrated; the fog hides the event from view, enhancing our imagination on this dreamlike journey. Our steps become slower and slower, and the perfume opens the heart of the fairy tale. A unique floral and woody experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Odor 93

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Sogni, which means 'Dreams' in Italian, captures the hazy moment between dream and reality. It's a feeling of being suspended, inspired by a love for Japan, travel memories, and the art of bonsai. Sogni tells a new story through a warm, woody and subtly smoky scent. A Japanese dream in a bottle.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Sogni

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Spirito represents the spiritual bond between man and nature, between spirit and poetry. It's an olfactory harmony that captures you from the first notes. Think bright and intense angelica, chamomile, and carrot seeds. The heart is a loving botanical poem of cypress, myrtle, and lavender. The base features immortal notes of cedarwood, vetiver, guaiac wood, and elemi. This fragrance is a journey through aromatic, woody, and green landscapes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Spirito

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Varanasi is a journey to the heart of India, inspired by a trip to the holy city. It captures the city's contrasts, the sacred and the profane. Imagine the feeling of the holy Ganges water in your hands. This fragrance is an olfactory mandala, a complex and spiritual experience. It's a powerful blend of animalic, spicy, and smoky notes that tells a unique story.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Varanasi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.description: Viole Nere tells a story of love for a garden, a place for the body and soul. It's about the famous Violet, a flower that is both delicate and strong. The scent captures cool March mornings, when the earth is still damp and cold. It's a modern take on a classic, a 1920s Violet for the new century. This fragrance is a journey through floral, powdery, and earthy worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/meo.name: Viole Nere

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.description: Café Défendu takes you to a secret café in Tangier. Imagine the rich smell of fresh coffee mixed with the mysterious smoke of cannabis. This aromatic and woody scent also has a touch of gourmand sweetness. It's a journey for your senses.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.name: Café Défendu

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.description: Meet Cuir de Pastèque, a perfume that plays with summer's favorite fruit, Watermelon. It cleverly turns the idea of watermelon skin into a cool, leathery scent - and it's all vegan! Imagine a touch of Paris with fancy Iris, a special flower from the Ourika Valley. This fragrance is a surprising journey, blending leathery notes with fruity freshness and a hint of floral elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.name: Cuir de Pastèque

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.description: Step into the magical world of Moroccan weddings with DATTE OPALINE. This cozy gourmand scent honors the tradition of giving newlyweds dates and milk with orange blossom. These gifts symbolize purity and kindness. Enjoy a warm, spicy, and slightly fruity fragrance journey.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.name: Datte Opaline

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.description: Remember the special way of making mint tea, like kings and queens did. **MENTHE ENIVRANTE** is inspired by a secret old way of mixing tea with special ambergris. This perfume catches the magical smell that filled homes long ago. It's an aromatic scent, with warm amber and rich resinous touches.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.name: Menthe Enivrante

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.description: NÉROLI CUIVRÉ is a cheerful perfume. It honors Moroccan welcomes. Guests get splashes of orange blossom water from a copper flask. This inspired the perfume's special copper note. It gives the scent a real and strong feel. You'll smell lots of Moroccan Neroli. Fresh cardamom and sweet hazelnut make it even better. It feels like a warm hug. This perfume is mainly floral with a hint of spicy.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.name: Neroli Cuivre

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/mez.name: Mezel's Sensory Journey

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: As-Suli's Diamond conjures feelings of an ancient and mystical time, using notes that are at once intense, carnal, smoky, and luminous. Notes of fruits and flowers from the middle eastern region waft deliberately above the resinous woods, and smoky hints of incense, instantly taking you on a journey to an exotic place and time.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: As-suli's Diamond

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Blockade by Mind Games is a sophisticated fruity-woody fragrance launched in 2022. Created by perfumer Christelle Laprade, it features an innovative combination of mango skin, tomato leaf, and bergamot in the top notes, transitioning to a heart of star anise and mango blossom, before settling into a base of oud, ambrostar, and suede.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Blockade

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Descending from the heavens in an inspired bouquet, Caïssa demonstrates the lengths we will go for love. The black licorice notes express an inner mystery that seduces the heart and mind as the flames of passion ignite. Infatuation unfolds in opulent notes of florals, cascading into a sensual, musky ambrosia fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Caissa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Castling is a fragrance defined by its rare ability to eclipse expectations, advancing its cause effortlessly in a fragrance that is bright, elegant, and refined. Notes of bergamot and luminous florals float above a solid composition of white woods and earthy musks.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Castling

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Check Please paints a portrait of stylish charm. It has a refined twist like a fine apple cognac. The scent unfolds with bold and sweet layers. It speaks to a sophisticated spirit. Rich woods and creamy vanilla make a lasting statement. It is a celebration of bold, unforgettable nights. This fragrance takes you on a journey through fruity, gourmand, and woody notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Check Please

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: An effervescent burst of champagne rushes to action in a dazzling sparkle of hope in Checkmate. Succulent and seductive fruits and florals follow, drawing on their reserves of willpower. As you experience the bliss of surrender, an intoxicating blend of tobacco and bourbon emerge. The memory of the battle fades as the ground cradles you in potent and rugged notes of earth, moss, and patchouli.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Checkmate

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Inspired by a perfectly ripe cantaloupe on a sunny summer day. Counterplay by Mind Games is made to shake up your routine. It bursts with pure joy. This fragrance is a fun trip through fruity and floral vibes. It brings a sophisticated twist to sweet summer days.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Counterplay

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Double Attack utilizes the multifaceted notes of chocolate to deliver a medley of bittersweet, woody notes that drive the fragrance. Exceptionally effective in breaking down defenses, all who experience it are enveloped in an opening of spices and florals that give way to the underlying base notes of bourbon and vanilla fragrance, captivating the sense of smell on multiple levels.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Double Attack

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: En Prise presents itself as a multifaceted and sophisticated fragrance inviting you to explore the seductive side of vulnerability. A captivating opening of crisp, effervescent grapefruit gracefully yields to the voluptuous sweetness of crystalline sugars and the intimacy of saffron at the heart. As this dynamic interplay unfolds, earthy layers of vetiver and moss crown En Prise into an exquisitely nuanced fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: En prise

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: A sophisticated fragrance that exudes true confidence, French Defense takes control in a tantalizing scent of succulent black cherry, seductive notes of smooth liqueurs, and a bed of velvety woods and ambers. Soft florals are woven throughout the composition bringing a quiet grace and natural beauty to its structure. Completely captivating, French Defense is a black cherry fragrance that rises to every occasion, with a scent that sets the tone for success.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: French Defense

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Gambit is designed for the modern player, daring and inspiring, with virile energy that takes command and pursues victory from the out-set. A confident and unapologetically fiery scent with distinctive notes of spice tossed with hints of fruity sweetness and wrapped in a soothing warmth.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Gambit

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Gardez reveals the willing sacrifices we make to secure our love, our freedoms, our future. Gardez perfume dexterously blends opening cologne notes of sharp pepper and spice, with the redolent and heady notes of jasmine, orris, and juicy fruits, its range on full display, before establishing itself with a base of leathers and woods, revealing the tenderness and strength at its core.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Gardez

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Grand Master strikes swiftly as the softness transforms into unmatched strength. Opening notes of exquisite floral fragrance soar willfully while rich and energizing coffee notes, mingle with the spicy seduction of incense, myrrh, and dark wood. The flawless harmony of power and tenderness astonish the senses, awakening the knowledge of our own divine potential.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Grand Master

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: J'adoube begins with a whisper of warning. An intriguing sensation engulfs us in an opening of pomegranate fragrance, rouge groseille, and mandarin, as the fragrance surges forward in a wave of tantalizing sweetness. Its evolution towards a bold and deep base of leather, patchouli, and ambrostar, brings focus to chaos while remaining wholly spontaneous and free.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: J'Adoube

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Confident and captivating, Kingside is a tribute to quiet power. It opens with vibrant cardamom and fresh grapefruit. The scent is softened by the creamy sweetness of pistachio gelato and pink peony petals. At its heart, the fragrance deepens with rich tonka bean and warm vanilla. This amber and woody scent leaves a lasting impression of sophisticated charm.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Kingside

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: The elusive scent of Lionora celebrates the seductive allure of grace, beauty, and wisdom. Indulgent bursts of fruits and florals soak into the honeyed, animalic notes of Osmanthus fragrance, before melting into the soft and creamy notes of sandalwood fragrance. Powerful in its delicacy, and completely enchanting, Lionora captures the passion and romance of new love, and the strength and sweetness of true love.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Lionora

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Mentor is a fragrance that celebrates contrasts. It is a blend that is both indulgent and complex, offering a unique take on the classic gourmand profile. At its core is Boya Oud, a smoky and sophisticated ingredient that provides an earthy base. This is complemented by the warm, honeyed tones of Amber and Tonka Bean, creating a rich and grounded base that sets the stage for the fragrance's development.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Mentor

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Drawing inspiration from the opulent Paris Opera house, Opera Mate by Mind Games is the perfect match for a special night out. It takes center stage with a rich, gourmand profile. This scent leaves a long-lasting and memorable trail. It invites you to explore its deep, amber warmth and effortless charm.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Playmate by Mind Games is a thrilling companion. The scent opens with a bright burst of sweet lemon and soft coconut milk. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Prodigy

This exquisite fragrance combines the royal scent of Orris with the sweetness of vanilla, creating an uplifting opening, followed by aged rum and saffron. Dedicated to daily successes, major accomplishments, and the rewards they bring, this captivating vanilla rum fragrance empowers all current and aspiring Queens.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Queening

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Queenside by Mind Games is the scent of being present. It finds beauty in the moment. Luminous top notes bring an air of fresh vitality. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Queenside

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Ruy Lopez captivates as a distinctive and enthralling fragrance, designed for inquisitive visionaries. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Ruy Lopez

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Surrender your senses and allow Sans Voir to guide you on a transcendent odyssey that awakens your imagination and liberates your intuition. In a symphony of contrasts, Sans Voir leads you along a coastal dream with nuances of sea salt, grapefruit, and jasmine, drenched in a cascade of cypress and freesia. As the olfactory narrative unfolds, your inner vision awakens to the mystical rose and palo santo, unveiling the possibilities that lay concealed mere moments ago. An enigmatic trail of guaiac wood and smoky incense hints at more to discover as the unseen becomes tangible, and a new way of experiencing the world unfolds before you.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Sans Voir

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Scholar's Mate is an ode to partnership, a harmonious testament to the intense connection that occurs between those who share a common goal. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Scholar's Mate

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: A profound scent, Sissa embodies the power of exponential growth, opening with full-bodied notes of toasted sesame to awaken the senses before unfolding in a sultry, resonant flourish. Mirroring the promise of boundless potential, Sissa captivates gradually with each fleeting moment, revealing notes of luscious gourmands and delicate florals, mesmerized by the warm, earthy foundation of labdanum and musks.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Sissa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: A modern and unisex perfume scent that ignites the senses and commands attention, the Forward leads with a blend of vibrant, shimmering citruses in a bold and unforgettable opening which sets the stage for the smooth and subtle appearance of florambers and gourmands. Captivating from the first move, and further enthralling with each move after, the Forward reveals its depth and sophistication as multifaceted subtleties of salt, jasmine, and vanilla join the movement. Regal and daring, yet soft and refined, The Forward goes beyond expectations, a fragrance that sets a new standard.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: The Forward

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.description: Vieri, the nobleman who captivated Lionora's heart with grace and prowess, transports you to the breathtaking Mediterranean landscape where their love story flourished. A surge of crimson lemongrass, vivacious citron, and effervescent pink pepper initiates the fragrance. As the scent evolves, floral notes of lush peony and camellia tea emerge against a backdrop of enticing musks, mystical incense, and rich Amberwood, reflecting Vieri's subtle virility and avant-garde approach to love.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/min.name: Vieri

The lingering trail of the perfume is a deep, rich balance in which musk pairs with vanilla to offer a creamy, enveloping texture.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/not.description: Five guys in a car. The night creeps over the hood. The empty road stretches out. Tires whisper to the asphalt. The leather creaks. A bad turn. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/not.description: An embrace you never want to leave. Bare feet hit red earth, sending up a warm cloud. Suddenly, it fades into cold, hard asphalt. Two worlds meet, blend, and balance each other out perfectly. This amber fragrance is truly unforgettable.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: The time-tested accord of roses and jasmine with fresh notes of orange blossom and bergamot, softened and deepened by patchouli and cedarwood, enriched with a hearty, warm amber molecule, skillfully combined synergistically to create a perfectly balanced yet hypnotic and opulent perfume. Ambre Royal is to be treasured and trusted, for it is both strong and sensual, warm yet powerful.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Ambre Royal

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Arabesque takes you on an olfactory journey through the enchanting and mystical Middle East, based on intertwined flowers, fruits and woods found in Islamic art. A heart of rose and jasmine absolute plays beautifully together creating a sense of well-being and serenity, patchouli and oudh transport you to another world.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Arabesque

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Babylonia by Ormonde Jayne is a sophisticated modern fragrance that combines gourmand sweetness with delicate florals. This elegant composition represents a perfect balance between fruity freshness and powdery warmth, making it versatile enough for any occasion while maintaining its luxury appeal.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Babylonia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Bijou Zafran is a spell in a bottle. It feels like red gold on the skin, trailing fire spun in silk. This amber fragrance does not shout, but smoulders with a quiet intensity. It is a presence designed to make the world lean in closer. The composition blends sophisticated gourmand tones with a distinct leathery character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Bijou Zafran

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Bukhara, a luxurious creation from Ormonde Jayne's Route de la Soie collection, represents the epitome of refined elegance. This opulent fragrance captures the essence of an exotic journey along the ancient Silk Road, blending precious ingredients with masterful sophistication.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Bukhara

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Modern magic and the bridge between East and West, where soft leather meets gourmet notes. Intricate labyrinths full of intrigue. Soft and velvety at the same time, refined and full of inner passion - an imaginative perfume. The amber-colored overture of Byzance leads you closer to its sultry depths.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Byzance

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Champaca by Ormonde Jayne celebrates the sacred Indian flower of the same name, a relative of magnolia known for its heavenly and elegant fragrance. This distinguished perfume combines the creamy floral essence of champaca absolute with fresh neroli and bamboo, while unique basmati rice notes and green tea create an intimate Oriental atmosphere.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Champaca

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Damask by Ormonde Jayne is a sophisticated floral-fruity fragrance that centers around the majestic Damask rose. This modern interpretation combines the classic rose note with contemporary fruity accords, creating a luxurious and refined olfactory experience that appeals to those seeking both tradition and innovation.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Damask

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: With its large elegant cream-colored petals, frangipani is perhaps the queen of all tropical flowers. The heart of the structure is a fabulous heady fusion of frangipani, jasmine and tuberose absolutes, elevated with plum, water lilies and green orchid oil. The scent has great foundations and architecture, the notes are soft, captivating and unforgettable.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Frangipani

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: 4000 metres above sea level, with its snowy glaciers and pristine lakes, rivers gush through deep Himalayan valleys, densely forested with majestic towering Deodar trees. At this high altitude, the Valley of Kashmir presents a uniquely breath-taking terrain. Home to a diverse array of plants, meadows are blanketed with wild, rare blue poppies and Kashmiri saffron each summer.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Kashmir

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: A bottle of happiness that aims to be nothing but captivating and beautiful. An innocent peony note beloved by all flower enthusiasts, a singing lily note, and a garland of orange blossoms and jasmine. Brilliant, appealing, coquettish, and full of jubilation.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Levant

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Montabaco Intensivo captures the essence of Latin America: leather, suede, wood, and tobacco leaves create a suggestive sensuality and Latino temperament. It floats above the rich floral presence of magnolia, jasmine, and rose. Everything is shamelessly seductive yet deeply likable.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Montabaco Intensivo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Muscat Eau de Parfum wraps around you like a second skin. Skip the usual springboard of citrus and flowers and instead go straight to the main notes of amber conviction; sensual, sultry and smoldering. Enticing oudh notes sweetened with rose, dates, vanilla and halwa. Wear it with light silk as you flit through the medina, ball or soiree leaving an emotional atmosphere that is both mysterious and enchanting.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Muscat

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Nawab of Oudh Intensivo is a masterful creation inspired by the rulers of the Oudh province in Central India. This sophisticated fragrance achieves perfect harmony between contrasting elements, combining green freshness with spicy warmth and subtle floral notes. The composition demonstrates exceptional refinement where no single note dominates, creating an aura of quiet power and elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Nawab of Oudh Intensivo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Ormonde Man is a sophisticated and elegant fragrance that masterfully combines woody and spicy elements. Created by perfumer Geza Schön in 2004, this distinguished scent features an unconventional blend of black hemlock and precious oudh oil, creating a mystical and refined masculine aura.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Ormonde Man

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: A masterful creation from 2002 by perfumer Geza Schön, Ormonde Woman is a mysterious and sophisticated woody fragrance that centers around the rare Black Hemlock absolute. This unconventional composition seamlessly blends forest-like elements with refined florals and warm amber, creating an enigmatic aura that transcends traditional gender boundaries.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Ormonde Woman

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Like a deliciously crisp spring day, this uplifting creation with Japanese Osmanthus absolute is a beautifully composed bouquet of flowers, embellished with golden citrus notes. Layered on a bed of Egyptian sweet herbs, it is intense, fresh and yet uncomplicated.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Osmanthus

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Every note acts like a flirtation. It seduces rather than speaks. This amber scent is deep and evocative. It unfolds like a whisper, mixing smoke and silk. Oud Liaisons balances power with grace. It clings to the skin with elegance, capturing the essence of a true connection.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Oud Liaisons

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Patchouli d'Atlas is a scent that feels grounded and strong. It takes the classic smell of patchouli and makes it modern. Imagine standing in a cedar forest at the foot of a mountain. It is earthy yet fresh. The perfume balances raw nature with a smooth elegance. This fragrance fits perfectly into the woody and amber families.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Patchouli d'Atlas

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Qi (pronounced 'key' or 'chi') means breath of life, an ancient concept central to Chinese culture. This perfume embodies the Chinese appreciation for delicate fragrances, crafted not to make bold statements but to leave subtle, lasting impressions. Like a spectacular dawn or a fragile breeze, it offers an honest, open, and natural presence that complements rather than overwhelms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Qi Intensivo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: A truly elegant, gentle whisper of a perfume that captures the essence of Japanese Hanami tradition. This elaborate and individual creation celebrates the fleeting beauty of cherry blossoms, with countless pale pink petals dancing in the spring breeze. A symbolic moment of reflection, where no single note dominates, creating a reserved yet mysterious composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Sakura

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Tolu by Ormonde Jayne is a masterful interpretation of the oriental genre, created by perfumer Geza Schön in 2002. This opulent composition centers around the precious Tolu resin, harmoniously blended with golden frankincense and amber. The fragrance showcases a modern take on classical oriental perfumery, offering luminous transparency while maintaining rich depth.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Tolu

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: The very definition of pedigree and heritage with its precious contents of Orris butter and an abundance of the aphrodisiac, Madagascan vanilla absolute. Vanille des Afriques Intensivo is a balmy evening, enjoying the sunset whilst the warm breeze billows through your silks and linens. Its smooth radiance soothes and relaxes you - a level of comfort and quiet contemplation.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Vanille des Afriques Intensivo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Montabaco Verano, meaning 'summer' in Spanish, is a sophisticated interpretation of Latin American spirit captured in a stunning azure blue bottle. This modern creation combines refreshing citrus elements with refined leather and tobacco notes, creating a versatile and distinguished fragrance suitable for both casual and formal occasions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Verano

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Inspired by the lush islands of Indonesia, Vetiveria is a vibrant tribute to the elegant vetiver plant. It's a celebration of nature's finest grass. This fragrance feels both modern and classic, blending green, woody, and aromatic elements. It's a perfect choice for those who appreciate a fresh, yet sophisticated scent with a timeless character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Vetiveria

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.description: Find your inner peace with Xi'an, a masterfully crafted fragrance from Ormonde Jayne's La Route de Soie collection. This hypnotic blend of cedarwood, musk, and Indian sandalwood creates a calming and meditative atmosphere. The fragrance invites you to close your eyes, breathe deeply, and let its serene composition slowly penetrate your soul, bringing tranquility and peace.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/orm.name: Xi'an

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.description: Bergamask is a fragrance that reveals itself very slowly - it settles in and begins its play without haste. A component that penetrates everything, another that intoxicates itself with the smell of freshly hunted prey. The cycle of life.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.name: Bergamask

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.description: A fragrance like dark chocolate-covered: a stolen kiss whose piquant taste lingers long. Boccanera holds a confusing balance between scent and taste, between love and fear.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.name: Boccanera

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.description: Who thinks ahead and seizes the moment, recognizes eternity in the here and now. Brutus is a fragrance that asserts itself by remaining steadfast and unchanging. A man whose actions were accompanied by few words. A man who was terrifying and yet full of kindness.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.name: Brutus

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.description: Cuoium embodies love and respect for natural materials - a fragrance that manifests the legacy of leather.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.name: Cuoium

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.description: Horizons. It is an invincible depth, the unknown, a call to everything and nothing - here, there, everywhere. The sea is a unity. It needs no explanation.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.name: Megamare

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.description: The scent of awakening, an inhale that fractures the ordinary and exalts the extraordinary. It draws from the unseen forces that bind the earthly and the ethereal, a bridge between the tangible and the transcendent. The soul’s journey is both the question and the answer. RISVELIUM IS A CEREMONY.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.name: Risvelium

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.description: Seminalis is our first stimulant, packaged in a fragrance flask. An aromatic aldehyde that guides the sperm to the egg to bring forth new life. Life is initiated by the scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.name: Seminalis

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.description: A fragrance that evokes an end and a new beginning. Representing the infinite cycle of life, inspired by natural indicators of health and intact body functions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.name: Stercus

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.description: Feeling this soil between your hands has something powerful and fulfilling about it - the feeling of being part of this earth. Roots play an important role in the growth and development of character. They are deeply anchored in your being.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.name: Terroni

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.description: Viride has a powerful green expression. It evokes the character of a Yemeni person wearing the traditional flower crown. The fragrance is like a garden that is cultivated, made fertile, and cared for. From the deepest and strongest roots of an herb, the path now leads to the sky.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ort.name: Viride

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/oud.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/oud.name: Oud Masterpieces

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Aqua de Dora is a refreshing summer fragrance for men. Inspired by the natural beauty of Öland Island in Sweden, it took nine months of dedicated work to compose this fresh perfume that combines the scent of fresh citrus and the sea. The natural and sea scents are complemented by a dry, warm, and woody Cashmeran and pine resin. Men who wear Aqua de Dora feel their magnanimity and confidence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Aqua de dora

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Dorasima is a special and unique scent inspired by the Swedish holiday of Midsommar. The name comes from the Latin phrase 'Lacrima Doris,' which means 'tears of a goddess' - tears of joy, love and happiness. In Sweden, the longest day of the year marks the beginning of Midsommar, a festival celebrated by friends and families alike, gathering around Maypole, singing songs, and dancing to celebrate the joy of life.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Dorasima

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Ibrahim was no ordinary perfumer, he was a dreamer, a historian of scents, and a custodian of cultural heritage. His fascination with the tales of kings and conquerors led him to an extraordinary discovery in the pages of Eastern history, the legend of Odaenathus, the King of Kings of the East. Inspired by Odaenathus's remarkable journey, Ibrahim embarked on a quest to encapsulate the spirit of the king in the form of a perfume. It was to be a sensory odyssey, a tribute to the golden sands of Palmyra and the indomitable spirit of its people.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Dux Orientis

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Emanuele, an alluring perfume, draws its inspiration from Milan's renowned Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Imagined by perfumer Ibrahim Al-Zoubi, this fragrance is a harmonious blend of timeless sophistication and modern allure. The fragrance opens with a burst of Turkish rose and tuberose, like a blooming garden within the splendid gallery, leading into a heart of delicate Italian florals, reminiscent of the stunning mosaics that adorn the gallery's walls.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Emanuele

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: In the heart of the enchanting Swedish countryside, where meadows meet tranquil lakes, there exists a fragrance that captures the essence of pure and enduring love. Pana Dora Sweden's "Forever Love" perfume is a poetic ode to love's timelessness, weaving a fragrant tale that unfolds like a romance amidst nature.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Forever Love

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Hundreds of Years ago, Perfumers discovered that some of Animal Pheromones enhance the coherence of their Fragrances. Musk, that is extracted from the Musk deer, has become the definition of vast array of animal scents. Grand Musk is inspired from the vigor of wild life, Rural intimacy as the grand Forests engulfed with Mist. Grand Musk is an earthly, organic, woody and animalistic Fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Grand Musk

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Imperial Wood is the fragrance of Swedish rustic life. A revolutionary Extrait De Parfum containing the highest concentration of aromatic compounds, featuring a unique composition that combines natural cocoa with Indonesian agarwood. This masterful blend represents the essence of traditional Swedish lifestyle, crafted with exceptional attention to detail.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Imperial Wood

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Kropp & Själ, translated into body and soul, is a gift for the body and sets deep into the soul. The Swedish culture has always had a passionate interest of healing the body and the soul, by finding treasures provided by nature and combining them in the perfect way to achieve a final product with healing power. This perfume is rich with the wonders of nature, and takes you on an intimate journey deep into the Swedish nature.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Kropp & själ

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Majestic Amber by Pana Dora Sweden is a luxurious extrait de parfum that embodies grandeur and opulence. Crafted by perfumer Ibrahim Al-Zoubi, this rich oriental amber composition combines precious ingredients into an unforgettable sensory experience. The fragrance evolves beautifully over time, offering both empowerment and comfort to its wearer.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Majestic Amber

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Moonlight perfume is a magical elixir that transports you to the enchanting Nordic nights, where the moon's radiance outshone all others. It is a fragrance that captures the essence of those ancient northern landscapes, where wildflowers and crisp air filled the night with their invigorating aromas, and where untold tales and wonders were hidden in every shadow.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Moonlight

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: **Onyx Black** by Pana Dora is a masterful creation that embodies the essence of modern oriental perfumery. This spicy and resinous composition showcases the artistry of perfumer Ibrahim Al-Zoubi, who has crafted a fragrance that seamlessly blends warmth and sophistication. The scent perfectly balances its oriental character with contemporary refinement, making it particularly suited for cooler seasons and evening wear. Its impressive performance and carefully orchestrated evolution from spicy opening to resinous depth make it a standout addition to the house's collection.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Onyx Black

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Opuluxe: A Noble Fragrance for the Modern Gentleman. Crafted by the niche house Pana Dora Sweden, this scent embodies opulence and luxury, and the spirit of nobility, honor, and the gracious gentleman. This perfume is a tribute to the modern man who values tradition, integrity, and the superior things in life.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Opuluxe

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Orchestra is a fragrance that truly lives up to its name, inviting you to experience a harmonious blend of emotions and sensations. Each note plays its part in creating a rich and multi-layered fragrance experience, just as a symphony is masterfully composed of various instruments playing together in perfect harmony.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Orchestra

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: In the heart of a crisp Scandinavian winter night, where the fire crackled and ancient myths came to life, master perfumer Ibrahim Al-Zoubi embarked on an olfactory journey inspired by the rarity and allure of Oud, which he lovingly referred to as 'liquid gold.' In the cozy embrace of his hearth, he envisioned a warm fragrance designed to melt away stress, calm the heartbeat, restore inner peace, and spark the flames of happiness, drawing inspiration from the regal scents that adorned princes, kings, and nobles of the Middle Ages.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Oud Republic

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Amidst the serene embrace of the Swedish wilderness, "Patchouli Dust" by Pana Dora Sweden emerges as a fragrant revelation, an embodiment of the untamed beauty that surrounds it. This perfume captures the essence of an earthy, smoky serenity, akin to standing amidst the woods after a gentle rain shower. The scent, a meticulous blend of earthy notes, is reminiscent of damp soil, reminiscent of a thriving forest floor, and the subtle smokiness of charred wood, reminiscent of a cozy cabin hearth.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Patchouli Dust

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Scandic: A Day In Scandinavia. In the heart of Scandinavia, where the air is brisk, and the landscapes are painted with serene beauty, lies the inspiration for a remarkable fragrance "Scandic" by Pana Dora. Scandic, a fragrance born of the Nordic spirit, weaves a narrative of nature's beauty and the timeless allure of the region, and evokes a sense of serenity, purity, and elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Scandic

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Named for the Norse goddess of winter and mountains, Skadi is a fragrance that captures untamed beauty and quiet strength. The fragrance tells a tale of contrast: of icy landscapes warmed by fire, of solitude touched by sensuality, of a warrior spirit cloaked in elegance. It is the essence of a goddess who walks alone, fearless, serene, and undeniably unforgettable. This fragrance is a journey through floral, fruity, and spicy realms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Skadi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Born from a series of trusting conversations, this fragrance elegantly captures the soul of the Orient. Created through a unique collaboration between Herbert Stricker and master perfumer Ibrahim Al Zouabi of Pana Dora, this olfactory masterpiece represents refined oriental elegance. The composition showcases the harmonious blend of traditional Middle Eastern perfumery with modern sophistication, creating a scent that bridges cultural aesthetics with contemporary elegance. The fragrance maintains a delicate balance between opulence and refinement, offering a unique interpretation of woody oriental perfumery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Stricker

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Sweden was distinguished in the seventeenth century by its wonderful dense forest that still characterizes it today. This forest danced with the fertile land of Sweden to generate types of flowers and woods that crept into our group, emitting a scent that expresses the beauty of the Swedish geographical nature. In this fragrance, Bulgarian roses were mixed with pink pepper and ended with a base consisting of oud and patchouli in addition to the distinctive and penetrating caperpol oil, to form for us in the end a distinctive mixture of woods and natural roses that was hidden within these wonderful dense forests.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: Swedish Wood

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.description: Royal fragrance inspired by the 17th century Drottningholm Palace in Stockholm. The fragrance represents the grandeur of Swedish palatial architecture, with its marble columns and decorative paintings. A unique composition of patchouli, woods, and coriander that invites a spiritual journey through noble elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pan.name: XVI

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Amalaya is a seductive magic potion. A rebellious scent that sparks the imagination. The endless magic of pure floral blossoms, wrapped in radiant amyris, sets heart and skin ablaze. A rush of exalted passion. The impression intensifies on the skin. Be careful!
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Amalaya

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Dalika is an invitation to pure indulgence. Imagine a cozy evening, wrapped in warmth and comfort. This fragrance is a delicious spectacle, a story told in sweet whispers and rich aromas. It's a journey into a world of decadent treats and luxurious moments. A perfect blend of gourmand, spicy, and boozy notes that creates an unforgettable, comforting embrace.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Dalika

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Elixir d'Amour is a true love potion in a bottle. It's a fragrance fit for modern royalty, telling a story of romance and passion. This scent weaves together sweet fruits, delicate flowers, and rich woods. A journey through fruity, floral, and woody notes creates a magical experience. It's elegant, soulful, and simply unforgettable.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Elixir d'Amour

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Kaya is an irresistible, addictive scent that makes you want to cuddle. It's a sensual and playful fragrance. A warm tonka bean note is touched by a hint of rum, then wrapped in a swirl of amber. A cheeky note of juicy raspberry adds a touch of refined seduction. This is a wonderfully soft amber scent, with tonka bean taking center stage.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Kaya

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Leilani, meaning 'celestial flower,' is your ticket to a sun-drenched paradise. This fragrance is a rich bouquet of soft, elegant flowers and juicy fruits. It feels like a warm sea breeze on a perfect day. A beautiful blend of fruity, floral, and woody notes creates a scent that is both fresh and comforting. It's an escape in a bottle.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Leilani

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Mahina captures the energy of a blood moon. It's a scent that glows like a sunset. This fragrance is a vibrant journey. It blends bright citrus notes with soft floral touches. A warm woody base completes the experience. Perfect for those who love a fresh yet powerful scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Mahina

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Momona means harmony and peace in Hawaiian. This scent is a mysterious mix of exotic spices and woods, designed for everyone. Created by master perfumer Christian Carbonnel, Momona offers a unique journey from the very first spray. It's a beautiful blend of gourmand, fruity, and spicy worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Momona
