https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Purple Rain captures the soul of the rain. It's a scent that blends the sky's tears with life's joys. This fragrance takes you to a world of emotion and memory. It's an experience that touches the heart, a symbol of life's beauty and nature's power. A journey through floral, fruity, and woody realms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Purple Rain

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Rouge Mystique captures the glow of seduction, power, and inevitable desire. This intoxicating Extrait de Parfum from the Swiss maison Parfums d'Elmar opens with a flare of ginger, softened by creamy almond milk and delicate orange blossom. The heart weaves a sweet, dangerous melody of exotic ylang-ylang, powdery heliotrope, decadent praline, and luscious dark cherry. A journey through gourmand, woody, and floral notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Rouge Mystique

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: The scent of 'Velvet Paradise' tells of the beauty of dreams. It envelops you like a gentle embrace, letting you forget the worries of everyday life. This fragrance embodies the softness of velvet and the warmth of a dream. Let your dreams guide you. Close your eyes and imagine a paradise where everything is soft, colors shine, and the air is filled with the sweetest aroma. This is a journey through floral, spicy, and woody realms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Velvet Paradise

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Yara is a modern take on timeless, noble leather. This super sexy fragrance captures the raw, animalic scent of exclusive leather, softened to a lush, supple texture. It's a mysterious and refined scent. The addition of vetiver, saffron, and jasmine gives it a unique, modern feel that is both sophisticated and deeply sensual. A journey through leathery, woody, and spicy notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Yara

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Yaringa means 'by the sea', and this fragrance is your personal tropical escape. Picture yourself on a warm, secluded beach, surrounded by coconut trees. Feel the ocean breeze on your skin. This scent captures that moment of pure bliss. It's a unique blend of aquatic, woody, and fruity styles. Wear it to feel refreshed and transported to paradise, any time of year.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Yaringa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Zaya is a scent of hope and comfort, like a warm embrace on a cold day. It captures the feeling of a delicious apple pie, fresh from the oven. This fragrance is a journey into a world of sweet and spicy delights. It's a perfect blend of gourmand, spicy, and boozy notes. Imagine cozy winter evenings and the joy of simple, beautiful things. Zaya brings that feeling to life, wrapping you in a scent that feels like a happy memory.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Zaya

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Althaïr is a modern tribute to a classic perfume ingredient: Bourbon vanilla. Julien Sprecher, the brand's founder, envisioned a majestic and surprisingly fresh vanilla. The result is an elegant, generous, and charismatic scent. It's a journey through warm amber, sweet gourmand, and smooth woody notes. This fragrance offers a unique contrast of warmth and freshness, creating a captivating and addictive trail.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Althair

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Athalia feels like a soft velvet dress on the skin. It is a tribute to feminine grace with a touch of mystery. This scent is deep, sophisticated, and comforting. It brings out a sense of delicate opulence. Athalia fits perfectly for those who want to feel confident and mature. It blends floral, woody, and powdery styles effortlessly.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Athalia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Athénaïs by Parfums de Marly is a bright and cheerful scent. It brings to mind warm beaches and glowing sunsets. The perfume starts with a fresh burst of citrus. Soon, creamy white flowers take over. It feels sweet, airy, and fluffy. As it dries down, a warm and cozy base hugs your skin. It is a simple but beautiful floral fragrance with a touch of powdery softness. If you love sweet orange blossoms, this is a great choice for sunny days.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Athénaïs

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Carlisle is a sunny and radiant scent. It feels warm and rich on the skin. This fragrance is a journey through spicy, gourmand, and woody notes. It's a sensual perfume for those who love unique scents and appreciate a powerful presence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Carlisle

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Cassili is a happy, sparkling, and fun perfume. It's a delicious mix of soft fruits and light flowers, with a touch of vanilla and wood. This scent is made for those who love modern elegance. The famous plum note makes it special and lively. It's a perfect blend of playful and classic, a truly fruity and floral experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Cassili

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Castley is a modern fragrance for the man on the move. It strikes a perfect balance between bright freshness and spicy energy. You'll find breezy citrus notes mixed with a kick of spicy Timut Pepper. The scent settles into a noble woody base with Akigalawood. It's a vibrant and confident scent, perfect for making a bold statement.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Castley

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Delina is a modern floral bouquet, full of charm. It's a scent that is both sweet and sensual. It celebrates flowers like rose, lily of the valley, and peony. Tangy notes of lychee and rhubarb add a fruity twist. The base is warm and soft, with vanilla, musk, and cashmeran, creating a beautiful powdery finish.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Delina

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: This is a captivating take on the famous Delina. It opens with fruity notes of pear, lychee, and grapefruit. The heart is a beautiful bouquet of Turkish damask rose mixed with a touch of incense and vetiver. The scent settles into a warm and soft base of vanilla and musk. Delina Exclusif is a luminous and passionate fragrance, a deeper and more sensual version of the original. It's a journey through floral, fruity, and powdery worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Delina Exclusif

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Delina La Rosée is a fresh and bright take on the classic Delina. It feels like a rose garden after a gentle rain. This scent mixes clear aquatic flowers with soft peony. It starts with a zesty kick of Italian bergamot, which is sweet and fruity. The heart is all about the beautiful Damascena rose. The base is a smooth mix of Haitian vetiver, soft woods, and white musk. It's a modern and very feminine floral perfume.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Delina La Rosée

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Galloway is a breath of fresh air. It's a clean and crisp scent that feels like putting on a fresh shirt. Perfect for any day, it mixes sharp citrus with a kick of pepper. This perfume is a hidden gem in the Parfums de Marly collection. It's a unique take on a fresh fragrance, blending citrus, spicy, and musk styles. If you want to smell clean and confident, Galloway is for you.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Galloway

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Godolphin is named after a famous Arabian stallion, a founder of the modern Thoroughbred. This distinguished scent captures a sense of power and refinement. It's a journey through leathery, fruity, and woody notes. The fragrance is complex yet easy to wear. It creates a sophisticated and masculine aura, perfect for those who appreciate classic elegance with a modern twist.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Godolphin

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Greenley is a breath of fresh air, a pure burst of energy for spring. It's a happy mix of fruit, citrus, and wood sap. The scent surprises you with a crisp, tangy green apple note. It's a bold yet natural fragrance that feels both modern and timeless. This scent is a journey through green, fruity, and woody landscapes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Greenley

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Haltane is a scent of light and shadow. It blends rare ingredients, inspired by 18th-century French perfumery. Fresh, herbal top notes give way to a warm, smooth feel of leather and precious woods. A sweet praline note, guided by saffron, offers a modern twist on the legendary oud. This fragrance is a journey through woody, spicy, and gourmand worlds, leaving a refined and lasting impression.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Haltane

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Herod is named after a legendary 18th-century horse. This fragrance captures a sense of old-world sophistication. It's an elegant and discernible perfume, perfect for anyone who loves a rich, complex scent. Herod is a journey through smoky, spicy, and woody notes, creating a truly memorable experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Herod

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Kalan is a scent of contrasts. It's both intense and subtle. It opens with a bright flash of blood orange and sharp black pepper. This energy settles into a heart of orange blossom and lavender. The base is a warm, rich blend of white sandalwood and moss. This creates a unique story on the skin. It's a modern take on a spicy and woody fragrance. Some find it bold and challenging, others find it captivating. A truly unforgettable signature scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Kalan

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Layton is a modern classic. It's a scent that gets noticed and loved by many. It captures a sophisticated vibe without being too serious. This fragrance mixes fresh, fruity notes with a warm, spicy heart. It all rests on a deep, amber base. Perfect for many occasions, Layton is a versatile and addictive choice. It's a crowd-pleaser for a reason.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Layton

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Layton Exclusif is a bold and powerful scent. It's a new version of the famous Layton, but deeper and richer. This fragrance is for someone who wants to stand out. It's a mix of woody, spicy, and amber notes that create a strong and memorable impression.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Layton Exclusif

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Dive into the world of Parfums de Marly with our exclusive Parfinity Box! 🐎 This collection features five of the house's most coveted fragrances, known for their elegance, sophistication, and unparalleled quality. Each scent tells its own story, taking you on an olfactory journey inspired by royal grandeur and timeless beauty. Discover your new signature scent and get a discount voucher equal to the box price for your next full-size bottle! ✨ The Fragrances in Your Box: Althair A modern tribute to Bourbon vanilla. Althair is a majestic and surprisingly fresh interpretation of this classic ingredient. Experience an elegant, generous, and charismatic journey through warm amber, sweet gourmand, and smooth woody notes. A unique contrast of warmth and freshness, creating a captivating and addictive trail. Created by Hamid Merati-Kashani and Ilias Ermenidis. Herod Named after a legendary 18th-century horse, Herod captures a sense of old-world sophistication. This elegant and discernible perfume is perfect for anyone who loves a rich, complex scent. Immerse yourself in a journey through smoky, spicy, and woody notes, creating a truly memorable experience. A masterpiece by Olivier Pescheux. Greenley A breath of fresh air, a pure burst of energy for spring! 🍏 Greenley is a happy mix of fruit, citrus, and wood sap. The scent surprises you with a crisp, tangy green apple note. It's a bold yet natural fragrance that feels both modern and timeless. This scent is a journey through green, fruity, and woody landscapes, created by Nathalie Templer. Layton A modern classic that gets noticed and loved by many. Layton captures a sophisticated vibe without being too serious. This fragrance mixes fresh, fruity notes with a warm, spicy heart, all resting on a deep amber base. Perfect for many occasions, Layton is a versatile and addictive choice. It's a crowd-pleaser for a reason, composed by Hamid Merati-Kashani. Oajan Oajan is like a warm, comforting hug in a bottle. It's an unforgettable journey that starts with sweet honey and spicy cinnamon. The heart is a rich mix of amber and resinous notes. It all settles into a cozy base of vanilla and tonka bean. This is a perfect gourmand and spicy scent for cold days, feeling luxurious and special. Created by Shyamala Maisondieu. Discover the world of Parfums de Marly and find your signature scent with this exclusive Parfinity Box! 🎁
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Best of Parfums de Marly (Men)

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Meliora is a delicate cocktail of fruit and flowers. It has an enchanting, romantic feel. Imagine dreamy rose, jasmine tea, and ylang-ylang creating a clean floral scent. This mix stirs and enchants the mind. It opens with fruity berries and lemon essence. The freshness of the flowers is enhanced by sweet vanilla, musk, and cedarwood at the base. This fragrance is a journey through fruity, floral, and green styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Meliora

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Oajan is like a warm, comforting hug in a bottle. It's an unforgettable journey that starts with sweet honey and spicy cinnamon. The heart is a rich mix of amber and resinous notes. It all settles into a cozy base of vanilla and tonka bean. This is a perfect gourmand and spicy scent for cold days. It feels luxurious and special.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Oajan

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Oriana is a fragrance all about texture. Imagine a mille-feuille of sweetness, softness, and sensuality. It opens with a bright splash of citrus, then reveals a heart of joyful orange blossom and juicy fruits. The real treat is the base: a cloud of fluffy marshmallow and sweet Chantilly cream. This perfume is a true delight, a perfect mix of gourmand, fruity, and floral notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Oriana

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Palatine is a modern and sophisticated perfume. It feels empowering and free. The scent is a beautiful mix of floral, fruity, and powdery notes. It's designed to give you confidence. A perfect choice for feeling assertive and elegant.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Palatine

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Pegasus is a distinguished and woody scent, perfect for a modern gentleman. It starts with a mix of cypress, bergamot, and heliotrope. The heart is a fresh, powdery blend of jasmine, lavender, and bitter almond. The scent settles into a warm base of vanilla, amber, and sandalwood. A true journey through gourmand, powdery, and woody notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Pegasus

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Pegasus Exclusif is a scent of power and confidence. It's a unique fragrance that mixes warm vanilla with rich amber, sandalwood, and natural oud. At its heart, you'll find a blend of flowers like jasmine and lavender, spiced up with bitter almond and pink pepper. This perfume is a journey through woody, spicy, and gourmand notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Pegasus Exclusif

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Percival is the definition of a versatile signature scent. It's a fresh, clean, and refined fragrance you can wear anywhere, anytime. With a subtle balance of bright citrus and aromatic notes on a warm, woody base, it's an unforgettable scent. This fragrance is a modern journey through aromatic, woody, and citrus styles, making it a perfect choice for daily wear.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Percival

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Perseus is a bright and fresh scent that lasts all day. It feels like the first rays of sun in the morning. The scent opens with a burst of grapefruit that wakes you up. Then, an earthy vetiver heart adds a refined and comforting touch. The base is a mix of ambergris and dry woods, making it last long. A perfect morning ritual for a day full of sunshine. A journey through citrus and woody notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Perseus

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Safanad is named after a legendary mare, a gift to a king, meaning 'the pure one'. This perfume captures that noble spirit. It's a warm, velvety scent that feels like sunshine in a bottle. It opens with bright fruitiness and blossoms into a rich floral heart. The fragrance settles into a comforting, warm embrace, blending fruity notes with a deep amber base. Safanad is elegant, bright, and full of happiness.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Safanad

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Sedley is light, forceful, and fresh. It captures watery and aerial scents for a true olfactory journey. This fragrance offers a freshness that follows you everywhere. It's a classic yet modern blend perfect for warm days. It feels like stepping out of a luxury shower, full of positive energy. This scent is a journey through citrus, aquatic, and woody styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Sedley

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Valaya feels like a crisp, white cotton shirt. It's a radiant and soft scent that plays with contrasts, feeling both fresh and comforting. Imagine your skin warmed by the sun, wrapped in clean linen. This fragrance is a modern take on floral, musk, and fruity styles. It's for those who love a clean, elegant, and long-lasting aura.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Valaya

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Valaya Exclusif is a scent of pure luxury. It wraps you in an intense, elegant aura. This unique fragrance blends floral and woody notes perfectly. Imagine the soft touch of velvety almond and light white flowers. Creamy white woods add a refined strength. With added powdery notes, it feels warm and soft, like a gentle hug for your skin.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Valaya Exclusif

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Fresh, woody and spicy - and at the same time highly unusual due to the strong herbal notes right at the beginning. A familiar heart of leather and woods is carried by a hint of black tea, and everything is held together by a base of musk, vanilla and amber with a suggestion of jasmine. Pierre Bourdon's goal was to create a men's fragrance that evokes the classic masculine ideals of strength, power and wealth, while also allowing complex emotionality to resonate... the contrast between the traditional masculine leather, wood and spice notes and the gentle, almost feminine floral hints perfectly symbolizes this field of tension.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Ambre Topkapi

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Chypre Palatin by Parfums MDCI is a luxurious and complex fragrance created by Bertrand Duchaufour in 2012. This masterful composition represents a modern interpretation of the classic chypre structure, combining rich florals, herbs, and resins with a sophisticated animalic base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Chypre Palatin

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Cio Cio San by Parfums MDCI is a delicate and refined fragrance inspired by Puccini's Madama Butterfly opera. Created by Cécile Zarokian in 2015, this elegant composition opens with bright citrus notes and ginger, evolving into a heart of cherry blossoms, peony, and oolong tea, before settling into a soft base of woods and musk.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Cio Cio San

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Cuir Garamante by Parfums MDCI is a luxurious leather fragrance launched in 2013. Created by perfumer Richard Ibanez, it draws inspiration from the ancient Berber people of the Sahara desert. This sophisticated composition masterfully blends spicy saffron and nutmeg with a refined leather accord, complemented by rose and oud in the heart. The base features rich labdanum, sandalwood, and vanilla notes that create an opulent oriental atmosphere.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Cuir Garamante

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Enlèvement au Sérail by Parfums MDCI is a luxurious fragrance created by Francis Kurkdjian in 2006. This elegant composition is a sophisticated blend of white florals centered around jasmine sambac, supported by ylang-ylang, tuberose, and Turkish rose. The fragrance opens with fresh citrus notes and develops into a rich floral heart, finally settling into a warm base of patchouli, vanilla, vetiver, and sandalwood.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Enlèvement au Sérail

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Fêtes Persanes by Parfums MDCI is a sophisticated oriental-spicy fragrance created by Cécile Zarokian in 2016. This complex composition celebrates Persian festivities through a masterful blend of spices, resins, and woods.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Fêtes Persanes

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: A barbarian invasion - while this might evoke images of fierce warriors in martial attire pursuing the treasures of civilization, it also represents authenticity, originality, honor, and straightforwardness. Invasion Barbare opens with fresh bergamot, violet leaf, and grapefruit, quickly transitioning to dominant spicy notes of cardamom, thyme, and ginger. In the base, musk combines with cedar wood and a touch of vanilla to add warmth, sensuality, and restrained sweetness - literally an olfactory invasion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Invasion Barbare

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: La Belle Hélène by Parfums MDCI is a sophisticated fragrance created by Bertrand Duchaufour in 2011. Inspired by both the legendary beauty Helen of Troy and the classic dessert Poire Belle Hélène, this perfume masterfully combines gourmand and floral elements. It's a complex composition that showcases the delicate balance between fruity sweetness and refined elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: La Belle Hélène

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: A memory of an old barbershop in Morocco, where the scent of aromatic oils and soaps lingers in the air. A childhood memory of when a father took his little boy to a barber. It was a completely new experience, incomparable to European hair salons. A memory that hasn't faded over decades and has been composed into an olfactory time capsule in Le Barbier de Tanger! Le Barbier de Tanger is a 'retro' green-fougère and vetiver fragrance, created by Anne-Sophie Behaghel.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Le Barbier de Tanger

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: As in the novel of the same name by Julien Gracq, this fragrance deals with the tension between fate and chance, nearness and distance, an uncertain future and the legacy of a glorious past - all against the dreamlike backdrop of the North African coast.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Le Rivage des Syrtes

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Les Indes Galantes is a sophisticated invitation to journey into an imaginary land full of exotic spices, flowers, and fruits. Like an olfactory cornucopia that intoxicates all senses - evoking images of gentle hills covered with flowers opening their petals to the sun and shining in the most beautiful colors. It also forms images of an oriental-style market before the imaginary eye, where all kinds of exotic and fragrant spices are offered for sale.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Les Indes Galantes

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: A warm Spanish summer night... mild air, cicadas, and a potpourri of different scents and flowers surround us... we hear soft singing and the rhythmic staccato of dancers... Nothing disturbs the harmony and joy of this night... life is beautiful. The magic of southern nights has captivated people for a long time - immortalized in songs, captured by painters, eternalized in great novels, and repeatedly captured in fragrances. Among all the wonderful olfactory homages to the South, Nuit Andalouse is a timeless gem.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Nuit Andalouse

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Péché Cardinal by Parfums MDCI is a sophisticated fruity-floral fragrance launched in 2008. Created by perfumer Amandine Clerc-Marie, this luxurious composition centers around a realistic peach note complemented by tuberose and coconut, creating a sweet yet elegant blend.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Péché Cardinal

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Rose de Siwa is a woody-floral fragrance created by Francis Kurkdjian for Parfums MDCI in 2006. Named after the roses in the Siwa Oasis of Egypt, this perfume represents a fresh oasis in the middle of a hot desert. It's a delicate and fresh composition that combines Turkish and Moroccan roses with fruity lychee, hawthorn, and peony notes, supported by a clean base of musk, vetiver, and cedar.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Rose de Siwa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Un Cœur en Mai (A Heart in May) is a sophisticated niche fragrance from Parfums MDCI, created by Patricia de Nicolaï in 2009. This elegant green-floral composition captures the essence of a spring meadow in full bloom, combining fresh green notes with delicate flowers and subtle spices.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Un Cœur en Mai

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Vêpres Siciliennes by Parfums MDCI is a luxurious and sophisticated fragrance created in 2009 by perfumer Jeanne-Marie Faugier. This elegant composition masterfully blends citrus, floral, and fruity notes with a gourmand base, creating a refined and complex scent that embodies Mediterranean sophistication.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Vêpres Siciliennes

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Inspired by the African philosophy 'I am because we are,' this fragrance connects people. It is a powerful woody scent with a bright soul. Perfumer Nathalie Feisthauer creates a journey of joy and emotion. This is not a typical vetiver. It mixes fresh notes with a surprising gourmand warmth. It feels luminous, modern, and deeply inviting.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Vétyver Messager

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: For men who are proud of their addiction to woody notes, are crazy about them, want them, would even almost eat them! Nothing else matters, just that intense, woody and velvety harmony. A unique blend of different cedarwood essences, combined with iris to create that perfect elegance and seduction.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Cedar Woodpecker/10

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Chypre Mojo/45 is a modern interpretation of the classic chypre theme created by Michel Almairac in 2017. After 45 experiments, this perfume emerged as a unique blend that combines traditional chypre elements with contemporary fruity notes. The fragrance features a sophisticated combination of bergamot, carnation, mango, and patchouli, creating a seductive and addictive scent that bridges the gap between classic and modern perfumery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Chypre Mojo/45

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: She strides long-legged through the city streets, leaving behind her a sugary trail. Her eyes are shiny and black, almost liquid. Her irresistibly sweet and reassuring smell makes her close, almost familiar. She clings to skin, meddles with hearts and lingers in boys' dreams. Flavia is a dark and sugary vanilla. Sweet, fascinating and totally seductive.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Flavia Vanilla/82

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Gardens of India/79 by Parle Moi de Parfum is a luxurious floral fragrance launched in 2019. Created by Michel Almairac, this perfume is a tribute to India's rich aromatic heritage, featuring precious ingredients like Indian tuberose, Jasminum auriculatum, and sandalwood from New Caledonia. The composition offers a sophisticated blend that captures the essence of blooming Indian gardens.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Gardens of India/79

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Christmas celebrations, bursts of laughter, delicious treats to eat... The comforting scents of childhood, immediately identifiable fragrances that take you by the hand and plunge you into your earliest memories… Carefree days, undiluted joy, immediate and absolute trust. The orange blossom and vanilla-scented sugar in Guimauve de Noël (Christmas Marshmallow) offer an instant of respite, of letting go, of tender and reassuring memories.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Guimauve de Noël/31

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: We all have a memory in Provence, child or adult, this region is synonymous with lightness, letting go and holidays. Haute Provence / 89 is our tribute to it. The beauty of its lavender fields perfectly aligned as far as the eye can see. A plant which by its flower alone floods a region and colors it for eternity. It is the most beautiful thing, its simplicity renders the superfluous old-fashioned and makes it an icon which crosses the world.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Haute Provence/89

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Forget travelling to the end of the world, to heavenly beaches or to the top of the highest peaks. Mile High / 38 promises more than that: a one-way trip to the high spheres, a high altitude sniff. Pineapple from the Indian Ocean, Tonka bean from Venezuela, Immortelle from Corsica and Patchouli from Indonesia: let yourself be guided through this olfactory carnival, a trip around the world in search of the best. A long-haul flight leading straight to 7th heaven, at 38.000 feet exactly.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Mile High/38

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Rare wood in a pool of musk. Supple and unctuous, musk and sandalwood hug the skin, becoming one with it. Even the slightest movement triggers a waft of milky woody air. Milky Musk becomes your olfactory shadow, flowing and elusive, evolving throughout the day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Milky Musk/39

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: A return to the hallmarks of classic perfumery, a tribute to one of its rarest natural ingredients: iris. Florists love its gorgeous flowers, but we're all about the root, left to grow deep underground for three years before being dried for another three years. It's then ground up and transformed into iris butter, probably the most expensive butter you'll ever encounter! Orris Tattoo is a permanent scented reminder, a universal symbol, a unique self-expression like an invisible tattoo that withstands the test of time.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Orris Tattoo/29

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Papyrus Oud/71 is a meeting point between two spaces of time, created by Michel Almairac. It represents a modernized version of a past success, combining Middle Eastern and Western influences. The fragrance features spiritual tradition of incense and precious woods, including Papyrus from Lower Egypt, worked with subtle Western accords.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Papyrus Oud/71

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: London on December 19th, Big Ben rings 9 o'clock. The hustle and bustle of the horns has subsided. A rainy mist colors the grey cobblestones of the streets of Soho and I soak up this damp and surprisingly calm atmosphere. The frenzy of the day has given way to crowded restaurants with the smells of spices merging with those of fashionable tailors. The power of the Saffron and the verticality of the Cedarwood combine with the Rose and her timeless elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Saffron Wood/91

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Tousled hair, white T-shirt, faded jeans, sneakers... She's got such style; he looks like an angel. Neroli and amber notes give this fragrance a careless sophistication that boys and girls adopt with the same ease. A novel creation starring orange blossom. A burst of freedom and modernity that spurns all codes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Tomboy Neroli/65

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Parc Monceau, Paris, on a spring morning. Pure whites and tender pastel shades of lilac, syringa, hawthorn and wisteria mingle in the transparent light. Insistent and unsettling, the fragrance of flowers fills the entire park, enveloping passers-by and inspiring them with the strong and fresh energy of nature reborn.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Totally White/126

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Loves me, loves me not… Rose blooms unrestrainedly in this fragrance. Masses and armfuls of roses, a crazy shower of petals to celebrate the rose in a joyful olfactory fiesta. Roses in hair, roses inhaled, roses distilled by the magic of the still, extracting just a few grams from a ton of petals. The spirit of the rose is captured in those precious drops. Add a teardrop of Patchouli to give her an untamed and elegant twist.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Une Tonne de Roses/8

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Wake Up World/∞ is a fresh and modern fragrance created by Michel Almairac for Parle Moi de Parfum in 2022. It combines synthetic freshness with natural ingredients, featuring a prominent dihydromyrcenol opening balanced with bergamot, followed by green apple and Turkish rose heart notes, and grounded by a base of tonka bean, ambroxan, and bourbon vanilla.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Wake Up World/∞

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.description: Coffee aromas, vetiver roots, infusion of leather. These three notes sketch out the unique silhouette of a Perfecto. For a split second, just imagine being a rock idol and experiencing the passion of legendary concerts, all-night parties and adoring groupies. Woody Perfecto symbolises freedom. It is the fragrant key to a horizon that knows no limits.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/par.name: Woody Perfecto/107

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Flash 0021 is a provocative fragrance that explores the theme of addiction and substance abuse in modern society. Like a chemical rush, it delivers an unconventional blend that challenges traditional perfumery, creating an olfactory experience that's both intriguing and unsettling. Part of the Conspiracy Line, this fragrance serves as a commentary on consumption and its consequences.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Flash0021

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: FUEL 0987 reminds us that we are racing at full speed into the abyss because we cannot do without petrochemical products and still waste these resources at the eleventh hour. The journey starts with old gold from the Middle East (petroleum) and ends with new gold (oud). BON VOYAGE!
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Fuel0987

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: HUMAN 0233 reminds us that we are human and should act humanely. The perfume is 100% natural and is meant to remind us of the warmth and closeness of our loved ones. At our core, we are all the same and have the same needs. Let's not forget what it means to be human - in the midst of war, a society full of hate, surrounded by algorithms and artificial intelligence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Human0233

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: To be carefree like a child again. LOVE 6567 catapults us back to our childhood. Sitting in the cinema between our parents, with soda and popcorn. Back to the feeling of endless security and unconditional love. Let's remember and pass on this love, day by day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Love6567

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: A fragrance developed in collaboration with artist Sasha Frolova, inspired by her work with oversized, inflatable latex sculptures. This provocative scent embodies the essence of her artistic vision, combining the synthetic allure of latex with luscious berries and dark leather undertones. Created for those who dare to be different, it challenges conventional perfumery while paying homage to Frolova's avant-garde performances and installations.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Perfume.Sucks x Sasha Frolova

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: WEALTH 4181 challenges our perception of wealth and opportunity through a unique olfactory experience. Based on a headspace analysis of freshly printed 200 Swiss Franc notes, this fragrance creates a thought-provoking statement about social inequality while delivering a luxurious scent experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Wealth4181

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Amoral by Pernoire is a complex oriental fragrance launched in 2022. Created by perfumer Andreas Wilhelm, it represents immorality and the relentless pursuit of goals free from social norms. The fragrance comes as a 50ml Extrait de Parfum in a luxurious heavy bottle with high-quality wooden packaging.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Amoral

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Inspired by sailors exploring distant lands, ANELO captures the enchanting aromas of tropical shores. Named after its key ingredients pineapple and pomelo, this fragrance embodies the fearless spirit of discovery, inviting wearers to embark on their own olfactory journey through exotic fruits and fresh marine breezes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Anelo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Kama symbolizes the essence of desire, igniting our pursuit of pleasure and connection, often dimmed by life's routine. Named after the Sanskrit word for desire, Kama encourages living life to the fullest. The bow and arrow symbolize the power of attraction and seduction.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Kama

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Mansa Musa, the ruler of the Mali Empire in the 13th century, is considered the richest individual in history. He was known for his generosity, sharing a significant portion of his wealth with his people. "Mansa" means "king" or "ruler" in Maninka. The golden staff symbolizes wealth and generosity.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Mansa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Masar, meaning 'path' in Arabic, is a self-confident fragrance from Swiss niche house Pernoire. Created by perfumer Vincent Micotti in 2020, this extrait de parfum represents metamorphosis and the journey to becoming one's true self, symbolized by a dragonfly.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Masar

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Embrace the legacy of **Cleopatra VII**, the legendary queen of Egypt whose unmatched allure captivated the world. Her secret ritual - immersing in rose-petal baths and savoring rose tea sweetened with pure Nile honey - not only infused her with grace but also made her smell so enchanting, becoming a symbol of irresistible charm. Melos, named after the main actor in the scene and short for honey and rose tea - a metaphor for timeless charm.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Melos

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Naki means 'pure' in Arabic. The lotus flower symbolizes the pure soul. Every soul starts pure but can get spoiled by outside forces over time. Remembering our initial innocence and sincerity, which tend to diminish with age, is essential for a healthy society and represents the essence of eternal good.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Naki

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Otimo by Pernoire is a luxurious oriental-gourmand fragrance that embodies pride and excellence. Like a phoenix rising from defeat, this perfume represents resilience and the pursuit of greatness. It's a sophisticated blend that combines boozy, spicy, and sweet elements into a masterful composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Otimo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Power isn't given, it's taken. Oudian is a scent for those who lead. It's a bold statement of strength and presence. Named for its two stars, Durian fruit and Oud, this fragrance is a symbol of pure dominance. A truly woody and spicy experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Oudian

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Poka is a sophisticated gourmand fragrance that aims to create the ultimate dessert in scent form. With an exceptionally high oil concentration of 30%, it offers an intense and long-lasting experience. Limited to 100 bottles online, this extrait de parfum transforms the essence of indulgence into a sweet and gourmand adventure.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Poka

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Tierra by Pernoire captures the joy, passion and warmth of South American people in a perfume. It is an elixir of passion designed to bring joy and warmth. While 'Tierra' means 'earth' in Spanish, it metaphorically represents 'home' - a place of origin, comfort, and happiness. The sun symbolizes profound positivity and vitality.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Tierra

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Vitias by Pernoire represents the deepest point in the ocean, symbolizing the longing for a deeper connection. It's a fresh, aquatic fragrance that opens with citrus and pepper notes, evolving into a marine heart with woody undertones, and settling into a musky base with ambergris.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Vitias

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Balance is a state of being: poised, calm, and mindful. Like the Swiss Alps, it rises above the clouds yet remains deeply rooted in the earth. It preserves the stillness of lakes, the purity of air, and the quiet strength of mountains, while the scent of Swiss mint drifts through the Alpine breeze. In this balance, nature and self become one. YUMA, named after its key ingredients, is short for Yuzu-Mint – a metaphor for freshness, clarity, and harmony.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Yuma

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/per.name: Pernoire's Vault

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.description: Ad Libitum by Pigmentarium is a chypre fragrance inspired by the sunset over Prague Castle. Created in 2018 by Jakub Florian Hiermann, it captures the transition from day to night in Prague's historic setting. The fragrance pays homage to the architectural vision of Adolf Loos and Le Corbusier.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.name: Ad Libitum

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.description: The fragrance born from the creative collaboration with fashion designer Arturo Obegero is the embodiment of the world of imagination of a young Spanish creator working in Paris. The elegant perfume intentionally blends feminine and masculine olfactory notes and is equally extroverted as it is introverted. The scent notably opens with geranium and pink pepper, transitioning immediately to the opulent scent of rose. The initial floral chords symbolizing lively society transition into meditative balsamic tones of labdanum, olibanum, and myrrh, evoking a sense of solitude in a church. The full and warming composition is underscored by cedar and amber.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.name: Azabache

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.description: Step into a modern era. Think amber-hued lights and fresh magazines. The air smells of dark coffee, rich tobacco, and white florals. Brutal is a fragrance that feels both architectural and poetic. It's a bold statement, a scent that wears you as much as you wear it. This perfume is a journey through boozy, floral, and woody styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.name: Brutal

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.name: Pigmentarium Explorations

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.description: Erotikon is a delicate gourmand perfume inspired by Gustav Machatý's once scandalous film of the same name. It tells a story of love and, may you wish, lust. The first notes of chocolate, ginger, and pink pepper are a prelude to the sensual warmth of vanilla and powdery tonka bean at the heart. The erotic charge of the composition is enhanced by magical amber together with musk, patchouli, and sandalwood in the base. Elegant or seductive, you decide.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.name: Erotikon

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.description: A perfume as refreshing as an intense gasp. The first contact with the perfume stirs laurel dreamily rounded with aldehydes. Verbena, lily of the valley, and green apple symbolizing fragile innocence sparkle in its heart. The scent of fig leaves, rosewood, musk, and ambergris develops in the base of the perfume. Together they evoke a sense of knowledge. Genesis evokes the innocence each of us used to have inside.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.name: Genesis

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.description: A perfume that, like a whisper in society, floats on a cloud of mystery. The unmissable, monumentally seductive, fusion of oud, ambergris, and sandalwood is complemented by damask rose and a sensual charge of pulsating musk and civet.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.name: Murmur

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.description: An olfactory work that was created on real and imaginary journey between Prague and Paris. The perfume drawing contrast between the dynamics of the city, where the day already belongs to tomorrow, and the space of old church, under whose vaults time has stopped. The contrast of two moments that can be connected in one moment. The moment of becoming present.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.name: Oratorio

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.description: A scent that evokes a holiday on the Cote d'Azur. The shade of the trees protects a cool pool from the hot rays of the sun. Ice sparking in glasses. The fresh scent of grapefruit and mandarin, evoking a feeling of happiness, is enhanced by the sparkle of pepper and juicy rhubarb. These are developed by green "smoky" vetiver and highly elegant, showy patchouli. Ambra closes the whole composition and adds an irresistibly seductive animalistic character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/pig.name: Paradiso

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.description: Imagine a secret written in the stars. A mysterious force pulling you closer. Enigmatic Aura captures this cosmic energy. It's a scent that draws you in and stays with you. A journey into woody and amber depths.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.name: Enigmatic Aura

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.name: Reinvented Discovery Set

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.description: Epiphany by Reinvented is a luminous and sophisticated fragrance created by perfumers Douglas Morel and Cristian Calabrò in 2023. This versatile scent combines fresh citrus notes with spicy elements, floral heart, and a rich woody-musky base, making it suitable for various occasions throughout the year.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.name: Ephiphany

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.description: Ethereal Soul is a fruity oriental fragrance from Reinvented featuring a blend of citrus and cherry top notes, a floral-fruity heart, and a warm ambery-musky base. The composition creates a modern, sweet, and sophisticated scent experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.name: Ethereal Soul

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.description: Eureka by Reinvented is a sophisticated oriental spicy fragrance launched in 2023. Created by perfumers Douglas Morel and Cristian Calabrò, it represents the energy of joy and enlightenment, inspired by Archimedes' famous exclamation. The composition masterfully combines aromatic spices, subtle coffee notes, and a resinous-sweet base, creating a unique and modern interpretation of an oriental fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.name: Eureka

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.description: Illusion by Reinvented is a captivating Oriental Fruity fragrance launched in 2023. Created by perfumers Douglas Morel and Cristian Calabrò, this modern composition balances sweetness with spicy and woody undertones, making it suitable for fall and winter wear.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.name: Illusion

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.description: Discover Lucid Dream, a scent that starts like a magical whisper. Bright saffron, sweet raspberry, and juicy plum create a radiant opening. The heart unfolds with soft rose, delicate white flowers (floral-notes), and a hint of saffron blossom, like a beautiful dance. The dream is grounded by warm sandalwood, earthy patchouli, and a gentle touch of oud. Experience this captivating woody and spicy fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.name: Lucid Dream

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.description: Ode to Psyche is a sophisticated woody-oriental fragrance that combines classic barbershop elements with a creative modern twist. Released in 2024, this limited edition perfume features a harmonious blend of geranium, juniper, and pink pepper in the top notes, transitioning to a heart of cashmere wood, patchouli, and cedarwood, before settling into a base of white musk, vetiver, and amber.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.name: Ode To Psyche

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.description: Pheromones by Reinvented is a sophisticated fragrance released in 2023, created by perfumers Douglas Morel and Cristian Calabrò. This sensual composition balances spicy, floral, and woody elements, making it suitable for evening wear and intimate occasions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.name: Pheromones

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.description: Sacred Bond by Reinvented is a modern floriental gourmand fragrance released in 2023. Created by perfumer Hüseyin Erdoğmuş, this composition masterfully combines fruity, floral, and sweet gourmand elements. The fragrance has received high praise from the fragrance community for its unique and appealing blend.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rei.name: Sacred Bond

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: 17 Rosso refers to the address of Roberto Ugolini's workshop in Florence at Via dei Michelozzi 17 R, where 'R' stands for Rosso (red). This Extrait de Parfum features an exceptionally high concentration of 30% fragrance oil, emphasizing the house's dedication to extraordinary craftsmanship.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: 17 Rosso

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: 4 ROSSO embodies uncompromising quality and offers fantastic performance with its fabulous fragrance oil concentration of 35%. Perfumers Cristian Calabrò and Maurizio Cerizza present an enchanting Extrait de Parfum that pays homage to the beautiful artistic metropolis of Florence with lasting and overwhelming impression.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: 4 Rosso

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: Azzurro, inspired by the iconic 1968 hit song, captures the essence of Italian summer with a modern twist. This Roberto Ugolini creation combines sparkling champagne notes with fresh fruits and delicate florals, creating a sophisticated summer fragrance that embodies the Mediterranean dolce vita.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Azzurro

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: Blue Suede Shoes is not just about blue suede or, as most people say, buckskin shoes - it's also a legendary piece of music history. The rock 'n' roll song of the same name by Carl Perkins was released in 1956 and is one of the most successful singles ever.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Blue Suede Shoes

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: Casentino is a unique fragrance. It draws inspiration from a famous Tuscan wool fabric. The scent is intense and full of character. It brings an unmistakable warmth. The special bottle is wrapped in real wool yarn. This honors old Italian craftsmanship. As an Extrait de Parfum, it has amazing depth. It wraps around you like a fine warm cloth. This spicy and woody scent tells a story of history and comfort.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Casentino

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: Derby by Roberto Ugolini is a reliable navigator for the style-conscious and goal-oriented man. A universally wearable perfume that makes a fitting and self-confident olfactory statement for any occasion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Derby

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: Giardino di Boboli is part of the Extrait collection by Roberto Ugolini. It is a green, fresh floral fragrance that reflects the plant and tree diversity of the Boboli Park. It starts with strong green notes and piquant geranium. The spiciness of mint is complemented by fresh apple notes. The iris quickly emerges, the quintessential Florentine essence, building a bridge with its powdery floral character to rose and jasmine notes. Ozonic notes spread out, symbolizing the fresh air in the park. The final elements like musk, powdery notes, and various woods interwoven with amber round out this extremely elaborate and successful composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Giardino di Boboli

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: Experience the magic of a Renaissance garden at dusk. The Giardino di Boboli Limited Edition takes the bright freshness of the original and makes it deeper. It is an aromatic and woody journey that feels like a walk through Italy's most famous park. You will smell incredibly clean, like you just stepped out of a luxury hotel shower. This scent is fresh, elegant, and very long-lasting.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Giardino Di Boboli Limited

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: High Heels represent pure femininity. They are mostly elegant women's shoes that achieve ultimate chic through their high heels, after which they are named. Whether on the runway, in business, or in private life, high heels are the epitome of femininity, seduction, elegance, and grace. Nothing surpasses emancipated worn high heels... The wearer of High Heel White has her grand entrance. All eyes are focused only on her. She radiates greatness, strength, confidence, and style. She is thoroughly feminine, the embodiment of sovereignty and beauty; she is surrounded by a touch of seduction.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: High Heel White

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: Kitten Heels are the small sisters of high heels, with a maximum height of five centimeters. Popularized in the 1950s by Audrey Hepburn, they have recently made a comeback. The fragrance KITTEN HEEL by Roberto Ugolini was inspired by these advantages: significantly more comfortable than high heels, suitable for everyday and office wear, feminine and extremely elegant, easily combined with various looks.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Kitten Heel

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: Der Loafer is a unisex fragrance that is versatile and elegant, inspired by the comfortable and easy-to-wear loafer shoe. The scent is designed to be light and adaptable, much like the shoe it represents.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Loafer

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: Every Florentine knows this special lion: Marzocco. The noble heraldic animal, and one of Florence's landmarks, holds a shield with its paw showing the Florentine lily. The mane of the proud MARZOCCO shines in bright colors under the Italian sun, with the fruity and zesty citrus notes of mandarin, lime and lemon, embodying the spirit of the Italian summer.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Marzocco

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: The Oxford shoe model is one of the most widespread men's shoe styles, especially when it comes to formal occasions and making a grand appearance. A particularly classic shoe model, traditional, and especially in black, it is the perfect shoe for a suit. 'Oxford' by Roberto Ugolini stands for understated, naturally worn class, for the noble that doesn't make much fuss about itself. Pure understatement!
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Oxford

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.description: Patina is a luxurious extrait de parfum from Roberto Ugolini with a 30% fragrance oil concentration. This unique creation represents the concept of aging and transformation, inspired by the natural patina that develops on well-maintained objects over time. Released in 2024, it was created by perfumer Christian Carbonnel.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/rob.name: Patina

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Inspired by London's punk scene. Think cool kids with bleached hair, swapping vinyls in distressed denim and hand-painted leather jackets. This is the scent of that rebellion. It's loud and powerful, yet sweet and romantic. A youthful dream wrapped in a heavy leathery jacket, with a bold, fruity twist.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Cherry Punk

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: This is where it all begins. 430 King's Road, London. Vivienne Westwood's store, SEX. Imagine cool kids with bleached hair, swapping rare vinyl records. They wear distressed denim and hand-painted leather. This scent is for them. It's loud, like a rehearsal in a room without sound isolation. It's powerful, like a youth riot. But it's also sweet and romantic. This is the idealism of youth wrapped in a heavy leather jacket. A bold, disruptive, and truly individual fragrance that blends fruity, leathery, and spicy styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Cherry Punk Extrait

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Electric Wood Extrait is a wilder, deeper take on Room 1015's first scent. It's a tribute to the founder's first guitar. This isn't just a perfume; it's a performance. Imagine a guitar solo so intense it bursts into flames. This woody and spicy scent is pure adrenaline and rebellion. It's for those who aren't afraid to be the main show.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Electric Wood Extrait

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: A black leather rose for the muses of Sunset Boulevard. Fearless icons who mixed fashion, music, and rebellion. This scent honors the women who made rock gods fall to their knees. It's a symbol of boldness, freedom, and raw power. A mix of floral and leathery notes, where elegance meets rebellion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Hollyrose

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Jasmine Freak is a wild party in a bottle. It's all about expressing yourself, loud and proud. Think vibrant mango, exotic jasmine, and creamy tuberose. This scent breaks the rules. It's for anyone, anytime. A true celebration of freedom and creativity. This is a floral and fruity explosion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Jasmine Freak

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Inspired by laundromats, Love-O-Matic finds magic in everyday places. It's about connection, romance, and a little bit of rebellion. This scent is a playful mix of fruity and musky notes. It captures the fun of the unexpected. Think of it as a smile in a bottle.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Love-O-Matic

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Poppy Riot is the scent of a new generation - for the restless, the bold, and the effortlessly cool. Inspired by youth culture, it pulses with the raw energy of an era defined by style, sound, attitude, and an ever-shifting beauty code. Every generation reinvents itself, pushing boundaries, breaking rules, and leaving its mark. From the rise of video games to the explosion of punk, grunge, and hip-hop, Poppy Riot embodies that fearless creative spirit. As founder Michael Partouche puts it: "Unapologetic. Vibrant. Iconic. Poppy Riot isn't just a fragrance, it's a movement in a bottle."
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Poppy Riot

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: When sound and spirit collide, creativity flows. Inspired by the eternal search for higher consciousness, PURPLE MANTRA invites you to step out of the noise and into a space of pure clarity. An olfactory experience designed to awaken intuition, calm the mind, and reconnect you with your inner rhythm. This is a deeply aromatic and spicy fragrance. Let it amplify the voice within and carry you into a state of effortless creativity and deep calm. The unexpected blast of incense purifies your thoughts, while the purple scent of lavender touches your senses and calms you down.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Purple Mantra

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Sonic Flower is a tribute to the powerful women in music. The frontwomen who changed the game. Like Blondie or Joan Jett, these women broke barriers and owned the stage. This scent captures their unique voice and spirit. It's a vibrant, sophisticated, and charming fragrance that blends floral, musk, and powdery notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Sonic Flower

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Room 1015: Mood Explorer

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Cannabis has long been a key to spiritual journeys. It became a symbol during the 1960s counterculture. People expressed themselves through art, music, and words. Smoking a joint meant finding new freedom. Sweet Leaf is a fragrance that can lift your senses. It's like the universe in a bottle. A truly mind-bending experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Sweet Leaf

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Let's capture the spirit of the legendary Room 1015. It witnessed wild nights, crashing guitars, and stories that shaped music forever. Inside these walls, sound and passion collided, creating something electric and unforgettable. A tribute to freedom, chaos, and the fearless drive to break all the rules. This fragrance is a journey through woody and floral realms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Ten Fifteen

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Immerse yourself in a tribute to Surf Culture. Ride the olfactive waves of Orange, Watermelon, Coconut and Ambergris. From Huntington Beach to surf gangs and bikers, Wavechild celebrates the art of surfing. This perfume is a raw, rebellious burst of energy. Open your nostrils, expand your mind, and become the Wavechild. A truly aquatic and fruity experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Wavechild

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Master perfumer Dominique Ropion created this artistic scent. It focuses on the Monterosa Rose in all its glory. Imagine the red light of Place Vendôme and the busy stalls of Venice. It blends floral beauty with distinct spicy energy. It captures the flower from fresh bloom to its final moments. A true amber experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Couleur Vendôme

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: This fragrance is inspired by the myth of Tiresias and the idea of tears as a precious essence. Created by perfumer Alexandra Carlin, it mixes ancient inspiration with modern style. The scent captures the feeling of Greek sap that perfumes the world. It is a unique journey through woody and lactonic notes, blending soft textures with bold contrasts.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Les Larmes de Tirésias

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Discover a scent that plays with light and shadow. Mentha Religiosa contrasts cool energy with warm mystery. It feels like a crisp morning turning into a cozy evening. The fragrance balances sharp freshness with deep, resinous warmth. Ideally suited for lovers of aromatic, woody, and smoky perfumes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Mentha Religiosa

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Nymphessence captures a slightly wild beauty. It plays with traditional ideas of femininity. The scent is inspired by nymphs and fairies in a morning garden. It represents the creative bond between mother and daughter. This floral fragrance balances fruity sweetness with woody depth for a fascinating elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Nymphessence

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Song for a Queen is a tribute to radiant beauty and confidence. It feels like a second skin full of character. This scent mixes bright floral notes with a warm amber glow. It is perfect for those who want a long-lasting and hypnotic fragrance that stands out. The perfume balances innocence with deep sensuality.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Song for a Queen

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.description: Discover a hymn to nature with **Woods in Love**. This fragrance captures the feeling of a sun-drenched forest. It balances sparkling citrus energy with delicate blooms. Created by Fabrice Pellegrin, it is a poetic mix of floral and woody notes. Perfect for those who love fresh and natural scents.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/roo.name: Woods in Love

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ros.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ros.name: Rosé Rhapsody

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: A refreshing cocktail on a Polynesian beach. Light and dark rum blend in a heart of orange curaçao and davana absolute. Patchouli and orgeat syrup embrace the vacation in paradise, creating an intoxicating journey through tropical flavors and exotic memories.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Blue Mai Tai

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Caviar Rosé is a luxurious and daring creation that challenges conventional perfumery by combining opulent ingredients. This sophisticated fragrance marries the effervescent sparkle of champagne with the exotic sweetness of dragon fruit and peach, while the unexpected addition of caviar adds a unique salty sophistication. It's a bold statement of modern luxury that perfectly balances gourmand sweetness with refined elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Caviar Rosé

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Cocoyster by Sãlum presents a unique marine gourmand experience that transports you to an exotic beach. This innovative creation by perfumer Sofia Bardelli combines the unexpected pairing of salty oyster notes with creamy coconut, creating a sophisticated summer fragrance that bridges the gap between gourmet and aquatic sensations.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Cocoyster

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Cocoyster Bananita takes the original's unique blend of coconut and oyster on a tropical vacation. It starts with a playful, tangy burst of green banana. This fresh start leads to a sun-drenched, sensual heart. The scent then settles into a surprisingly deep, resinous base. It's a bold, fruity and aquatic adventure in a bottle. Perfect for a warm, sunny day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Cocoyster Bananita

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Cocoyster Carambola sparkles like a tropical star. This fruity fragrance opens brightly with starfruit and lemon blossom, accented by a salty accord that recalls sun-kissed skin. The heart glides over you like a velvety embrace, with creamy coconut milk, ylang-ylang, and vanilla orchid. The base is an enveloping and creamy blend of amberwood, cedarwood, and a whisper of frankincense, creating a warm, woody finish.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Cocoyster Carambola

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Imagine a tropical escape in a bottle. Moorea Guava takes you to a sun-drenched beach with every spray. It's a vibrant dive into juicy fruit, warm sensuality, and golden light. This fragrance is a perfect blend of fruity and aquatic notes, creating an unforgettable summer experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Cocoyster Moorea Guava

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Delicious Bay is a unique fusion of aquatic freshness and oriental warmth. Created by master perfumer Luca Maffei in 2023, this fragrance masterfully combines marine elements with gourmand sweetness, creating an innovative and versatile scent suitable for both warm summer days and cool winter evenings.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Delicious Bay

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Dive into a world of pure sweetness. Exotic Chocolate, created by Sofia Bardelli, is a true gourmand delight. It starts with a spicy kick of Star Anise and Cinnamon. Then, it melts into a heart of a warm cookie dipped in creamy white chocolate. The scent settles into a cozy hug of warm milk, rich Madagascar Vanilla, and soft musks. An irresistible treat for your senses.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Exotic Chocolate

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Salty Tiarè by Sãlum is a modern interpretation of a tropical paradise, where exotic white flowers meet the salty breeze of the ocean. This unique creation by perfumer Sofia Bardelli captures the essence of a Polynesian beach, where tiare flowers bloom near the crystalline waters.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Salty Tiarè

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Sparkling waves in a sea of pure joy: Sparkling Tamarind releases its vivacity through an olfactory accord that vibrates with cheerfulness and vitality, imparting an immediate sense of well-being. The effervescence of the cola accord is enriched by sparkling lime nuances, while tamarind, unexpected and intriguing, emerges as an exotic protagonist, amplified by an explosion of spices that accentuate its lively and surprising character. At the base, baobab wood reveals a magnetic and enveloping trail, a drydown that invites you to immerse yourself in a unique atmosphere, filled with lasting emotions and sensations.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Sparkling Tamarind

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Strawberry Pool by Sãlum is a unique and innovative fragrance that captures the essence of a perfect summer day by the pool. This playful creation combines the sweetness of ripe strawberries with aquatic notes and a hint of chlorine, creating an unexpected yet delightful olfactory experience that transports you to luxurious pool parties and carefree summer moments.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Strawberry Pool

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: Tropylang is an immersion in a lush tropical forest, an explosion of fruits and flowers. The juicy scents of passion fruit and mango intertwine with the enveloping sensuality of ylang ylang, creating a surprising olfactory symphony that leads to an unforgettable journey.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Tropylang

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.description: A monsoon sweeps across the island: a completely new and disruptive accord, the Monsoon Accord, wrapped in the refined sweetness of vanilla flower. Juicy peach notes, bright orange blossom, and drops of velvety cocoa intertwine to create the perfect storm, an unexpected encounter of fragrances that will captivate and envelop you in a whirlwind of emotions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sal.name: Vanilla Monsoon

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Gold Spot is dark and dazzling. It blends pure natural oud with rich chocolate. Bright orange blossom and bergamot give it an instant lift. Then it melts into golden butterscotch and dark cocoa. A deep base of wood and sweet resins holds it all together. It feels like wearing black velvet and fine jewels. This is a bold cozy and sensual scent. It is perfect for those who love deep sweet perfumes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Gold Spot

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Jungle Jezebel is a bold tribute to the famous drag queen Divine. It is wild, loud, and totally over the top. This scent is not for the faint of heart. It mixes bright, flashy sweetness with dirty, deep notes. You get a huge blast of fun fruits that quickly turns into a fierce, dark roar. It is a true work of art that shocks and impresses. This brave blend walks the line between fruity fun and deep animalic magic. Expect a massive, room-filling floral experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Jungle Jezebel

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Loudo is deliciously sweet and devilishly woody. It offers a rich dose of real oud, highlighted by floral and gourmand touches. Enjoy bright neroli and juicy cherry. Then, get lost in chocolate drizzled over perfect blossoms. Amber and vanilla blend in the base. This makes it an oud scent like no other. It is a bold and amazing journey.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Loudo

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Sip a sweet milkshake and float away. Pastel Rumours is a creamy dream. It wraps gentle peach in soft milk and warm spices. A touch of caramel adds a rich twist. Crushed cookies and sweet cereal bring a playful vibe. Hidden musks give it a bold edge. This gourmand and fruity scent feels like a warm peach cobbler. It is sweet, cozy, and perfect for dessert lovers.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Pastel Rumours

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: A vivacious and sweet take on the classic peach. Peach's Revenge surprises you with a juicy blast of fruit. It feels like biting into fresh nectarine and gummy peach rings. A warm, spicy heart of amaretto and cinnamon adds a thrilling twist. Finally, it settles into a deep, comforting base of caramel and vanilla. It is a stunning, long-lasting scent. This fragrance is a journey through fruity, gourmand, and spicy realms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Peach's Revenge

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Step into a damp, dark forest right after the rain. Prism Head greets you with the deep scent of wet soil and fresh mushrooms. A bright splash of lemon cuts through the thick air. Underneath, sultry cannabis and patchouli bring a cool, herbal vibe. It feels like a memory from the 1970s. This is a highly unique, earthy and green scent that takes you straight to nature.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Prism Head

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Step into the great outdoors. Lush grass and crisp stems of lily of the valley crunch underfoot. You hold a ripe peach as the scent of horses fills the air. It is a true green equestrian blend. You smell dry hay, worn leather, and cold metallic notes from the tack room. A warm base of musk, fir, and tobacco adds rich depth. This animalic and leathery fragrance captures the wild spirit of a humid day on the farm.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Riders

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Spiced peaches and cream are a secret you can easily keep. This gourmand fragrance smells just like a warm, fresh peach cobbler. It is sweet but never too heavy. You get a crusty pie dough feel with melted vanilla ice cream on top. It is charming, fun, and very easy to wear. Perfect for casual days in the fall or spring.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Rococo Pie

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Oud meets West in this perfectly balanced perfume. It mixes dark, animalic oud with a fresh Mediterranean vibe. Blending these two is hard, but the result is beautiful. Bright bergamot and orange blossom throw light onto the darkest natural oud. It creates a striking mix of light and shadow. This fragrance shines bright, making it a truly unique woody and citrus experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Symmetry

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Experience the Scottish Highlands with **Tartan Cask**. It opens with peaty whiskey and wild heather. You will notice hints of fresh bread and toasted hops. Then, cedarwood, tobacco, and worn leather pull you inside a warm castle. Finally, thick smoke and dry woody notes settle by the hearth. This is a daring, highly smoky scent for bold souls.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Tartan Cask
