https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Dusk falls and the light fades. This is where the magic begins. An adult, seductive scent blends the dark edge of coffee with a sweet cocktail. Sparkles of cherry and warm cinnamon light up the night. Underneath, a creamy, milky vanilla takes over. This gourmand and boozy fragrance hums with rich leather and deep saffron. It is perfectly balanced and deeply irresistible.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Va Va Vanilla

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.description: Velvet Vendetta by Sarah Baker is a gourmand perfume with no manners. It rides in with dark vanilla and a bold flask of bourbon. The sweetness is laced with fierce gun smoke. A wild stampede of woods and resins drops into a dusty sunset of tobacco and dark molasses. Experience a wildly smoky and boozy fragrance adventure.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sar.name: Velvet Vendetta

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/she.description: Have you ever smelled the air after a summer rain? Ashar bottles that exact feeling. It's the calm, fresh scent of nature waking up. A mix of chypre and floral notes, Ashar brings a piece of that natural magic into your day. It's a pure and serene fragrance, perfect for finding harmony.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/she.name: Ashar

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/she.description: Sylhet pays homage to its namesake region in Bangladesh. It captures a landscape that is both calm and vibrant. Imagine the wind whispering through tea leaves and the earthy smell of wet grass after rain. This fragrance blends unique citrus notes with the grounding embrace of oud. Sylhet is a journey through green, woody, and tea realms, offering a sense of peace and renewal.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/she.name: Sylhet

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Apricot Innocence captures pure, childish joy. A juicy apricot note, mixed with sweet orange and creamy jasmine sambac, takes you to a world of wonder. It feels like happy memories that last forever. The scent settles into a warm hug of soft amber and fluffy white musk. It's like a trip back to childhood, running through sunny orchards, full of pure happiness. A truly fruity and floral experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Apricot Innocence

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: An intense and ardent sweetness, an exotic and seductive magma which unleashes the volcanic soul of a lush archipelago born from fire and from eruptions. The tropical hot vanilla bursts on spices and luxurious woods enveloped by sweet shades to recreate the smell of the legendary black sand beach of Honolokani in Maui.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Born from Fire

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: A selection of the finest woods in the world recreates the evocative atmosphere of Middle East expressing the night of Dubai. The magnificence of Oud vibrates in the extraordinary presence of sandalwood and ebony that confer a silky and elegant texture. The Moroccan Rose shades in the woody notes making Camouflage as intriguing and mysterious as the night.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Camouflage

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Criminal Lipstick is a scent rebellion. It captures the power of a bold woman. A mix of addictive red grape, tart pear, and seductive fig creates a fierce, unapologetic scent. It's for women who write their own rules. Behind a veil of precious flowers like iris and jasmine, a passionate blend unfolds. Intoxicating oud, vanilla, and musk exude confidence. This is a declaration of fearless femininity. It's an invitation to break free and live life on your own terms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Criminal Lipstick

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: An infusion of impudent beauty and cheeky femininity which flood in the pleasure of the wildest nights of Rio de Janeiro. Abandoning to the carioca groove and to the most libertine passions. The exotic and transgressive soul of Brazil surrounds the ambience with a sensual elixir of passion fruit and ylang-ylang meld in a magnetic oriental accord of amber, sandalwood and Cachaca.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Don't Ask Me Permission

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Eterno captures the essence of a sun-scorched pine forest, where warming resins and ancient woods create a sanctuary of belonging. This sophisticated fragrance combines precious resins with smoky incense and leather, creating a profound olfactory experience that speaks of eternal moments and timeless beauty.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Eterno Extrait

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Fico Nero is a tribute to Sardinia, capturing the essence of Mediterranean nature with its enchanting blend of fig and green accents. This fragrance embodies the island's protected beaches, wild landscapes, and unforgettable sunsets, creating a sensory journey through sun-drenched fig groves.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Fico Nero

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Kite in Crystal Reef is the feeling of pure freedom. Imagine riding the ocean waves on a kitesurf. This scent is like a powerful sea wind. It starts with a splash of aquatic notes, crisp green apple, and bright neroli. The heart feels like salty waves crashing on the shore. A warm base of tonka bean, vanilla, and cedarwood is like sun-kissed skin after a day on the water. It's a journey through aquatic, citrus, and woody sensations.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Kite in Crystal Reef

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: The essence of a Caribbean vacation captured in a bottle. Leisure in Paradise transports you to sun-drenched beaches with white sand, where tropical breezes carry the scent of sunscreen and exotic fruits. This fragrance embodies the perfect holiday moment, where time slows down and pleasure takes precedence.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Leisure in Paradise

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: A vibrant celebration of summer, Malibù - Party in the Bay captures the essence of a sunset cocktail party on the Californian coast. This fragrance recreates the delightful experience of sipping a perfectly crafted coconut Daiquiri, where an invigorating burst of frozen lime awakens the senses before melting into the sweet embrace of refined coconut rum.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Malibù - Party in the bay

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: The white foam of an overwhelming wave carries the oceanic freshness of a night sea illuminated by the moon's glow. A refined, rich and captivating fragrance that releases all the strength of the sea and its deep freshness in the nighttime. Marine scents and sparkling citruses join aromatic notes of mint, myrtle and juniper berries, while Mediterranean salt crystallizes on driftwood, beaten by the waves and shaped by the night sea of Formentera.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Ocean of a Midnight Moon

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Imagine a quiet beach on Saint Martin. Palm Oases is a relaxing escape from the busy world. It captures the feel of turquoise water and white sand. This scent blends gourmand sweetness with fresh tropical flowers. It feels like a luxurious holiday in a bottle, perfect for summer days.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Palm Oases

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: A flamenco of luxurious rose and silky oud dancing like unknown lovers in the warm Andalusian sunset of Seville, awakening a passionate seduction that aspires to sin. Hints of dates and dried fruit are grafted into a texture of spicy and woody tones recalling a whispered sweetness between the West and the Middle East.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Rose of Dangerous Flamenco

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Love smells like silence as you can contemplate its beauty only with silence. It is like awakening in the middle of the night beside the beloved partner and contemplate its beauty in that quite moment where everything stops. Silenzio is a tribute to the deepest and overwhelming love that evokes the sensation of a present embrace through its contrasts between sweet and smoky notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Silenzio Extrait

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Silver Marble captures the essence of the frozen Nordic landscapes of Niflheim, where ice reigns supreme. This contemporary fragrance embodies the sharp, crystalline purity of arctic winds and frozen elements, creating an invigorating olfactory experience that transports the wearer to the primordial realm of ice and frost.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Silver Marble

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Night time journey in the Oman desert, chosen land for the production of the most prestigious incense in the world. An extraordinary resin passed down from ancient times to communicate and pay tribute to gods. Smoke of Desert celebrates the most exclusive and pure incense, enriched with mysterious absinthe and warm cashmere notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Smoke of Desert

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: An explosion of vitality and energy embodying the Hawaiian sun. Surfers, massive waves, and the freedom feeling that you breathe on the magnificent beaches of Oahu. A celebration of Hawaii's local symbol fruit through a unique fragrance featuring the delicious Excel Mango from Makaha, combined with fresh lime and ripe mango pulp, enriched by hints of guava and transparent scents of coconut water.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Sunplosion - Aloha State of Mind

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Catch the ultimate California surf vibe with Surf the Ginger Wave. This scent brings the sunny beach right to you. Imagine hanging out by the coast with an ice-cold Moscow mule in hand. Salty ocean air mixes with zesty citrus and cool herbs. As the sun goes down, warm musk keeps the beach party alive. It is a thrilling mix of aquatic freshness and a sharp, spicy kick.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Surf the Ginger Wave

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Tulum Junglescape transports you to a place of lush natural wonder in the Yucatan Peninsula. This refined fragrance reveals in the fresh citrus burst of lime and mint, blended with sea salt and green tea. Delicate tiaré and ylang-ylang flowers join natural oils in an olfactory journey through the verdant tropical jungle and azure sea; as you inhale the heady floral notes, you can almost feel the warmth of Mexican sun on your skin and hear the calls of exotic birds in the treetops.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Tulum - Junglescape

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: Venom - Secret of Shaman evokes the mystery of ancient Mayan shamanic rituals with the 'sapo' bufo alvarius. An inner transformation ceremony that transports you on a journey of transcendence and spiritual rebirth, infusing a sensation of wild energy. The vibrant opening of psychedelic spices reveals an intense heart of tobacco, dark woods and sacred resins, leading into a mystical realm.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Venom - Secret of Shaman

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: An insatiable vice embraces sins of gluttony and lust with an intoxicating dark cherry that sinks impetuously on a creamy vanilla ice cream. Accents of salty caramel crystallize, teasing the palate and drag mind into temptation. A libertine sweetness enhanced by tonka bean, ylang-ylang and soft ambers sculpts sinuous shapes like sensual bodies that intertwine.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Vicebomb

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.description: A tribute to the finest citrus of the Amalfi Coast, Zest di Sorrento captures the essence of an Italian summer. This elegant fragrance embodies the romantic landscapes from Sorrento to Amalfi, offering an effervescent explosion of Mediterranean citrus notes that transport you to sun-drenched lemon groves overlooking the azure waters.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sim.name: Zest di Sorrento

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.description: Arena is the golden road to the desert. The warmth of the earth that awakens all your senses.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.name: Arena

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.description: Legend has it the Gods buried the most precious city ever discovered and with it, it's greatest treasure. The elixir of love made from the best nectar oils found within the Mediterranean lands that gives name to ATLANTIS, the Perfume of Love.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.name: Atlantis

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.description: Capriccio captures the first moments of happiness and joy. It is inspired by the tropics. It is the soul and spirit of Miami city when tolerance meets party and happiness.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.name: Capriccio

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.description: Eclair by Somens is a gourmand fragrance created by perfumer Christian Carbonnel (Chris Maurice) in 2024. This modern creation combines citrus freshness with creamy, sweet notes to create a dessert-like experience reminiscent of a lemon pastry filled with vanilla cream.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.name: Eclair

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.description: Jade by Somens is a vibrant and natural fragrance created by Lucas Sieuzac in 2020. It represents the vitality of Nature and the scent of roots that brings you back to the origin. This modern interpretation combines floral and fruity elements with woody undertones.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.name: Jade

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.description: Onice is inspired by the coldest places on our planet. It is peace and clarity. It is perfect in its pure state. The insight when you seek the best.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.name: Onice

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.description: Seda by Somens is a sophisticated fragrance created by Daniel Josier in 2020, where wildness meets romance. The elegance of this creation takes you to the brightest moments, combining fresh citrus notes with floral elements and a musky base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.name: Seda

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.description: Dive into the world of refreshing scents with the Parfinity Box "Fresh Kick". This carefully curated selection presents five invigorating perfumes that are perfect for giving you an energy boost every day. From sparkling citrus notes to fruity and woody accents – this box offers a diverse range of fragrances that awaken your senses and fill you with positive energy. In this box, you will find: Energizer by Boadicea the Victorious: A fragrance of positivity and reflection. Energizer captivates with its uplifting and dancing citrus tones that transport you away from the everyday. Its true beauty emerges in the calm and muted musky dry down, creating a lasting impression that leaves the soul yearning for more. Experience the vibrant burst of grapefruit and bergamot, followed by a heart of petitgrain and a base of musk and vetiver. Suits by The Nose Behind: Suits opens with fresh citrus notes that also have a classic, spicy touch. It's easy to see similarities to many popular men's scents – the theme is just that classic, like a cologne. Woody notes quickly blend in, giving a full picture of the fragrance in a short time. Its projection is present but not loud. The scent develops in a straight line, which fits its style. It's a fragrance anyone can wear and is usually found pleasant by those around, with hints of fruity and aromatic character. Discover notes of lemon, apple, pineapple, jasmine, sandalwood, and musk. Mefisto Gentiluomo by Casamorati: A refined Italian niche fragrance from Casamorati's collection. This elegant barbershop-inspired scent combines precious Italian citrus oils with Mediterranean lavender and iris, layered over a sophisticated base of woods and musk. It represents a modern interpretation of classic Italian perfumery. Experience the bright burst of lemon, bergamot, and grapefruit, followed by a heart of iris and a base of amber, cedarwood, and musk. Forever Love by Pana Dora: In the heart of the enchanting Swedish countryside, where meadows meet tranquil lakes, there exists a fragrance that captures the essence of pure and enduring love. Forever Love by Pana Dora Sweden is a poetic ode to love's timelessness, weaving a fragrant tale that unfolds like a romance amidst nature. A vibrant citrus opening of grapefruit and tangerine leads into a complex heart of tropical fruits and delicate florals. Melon and mango blend harmoniously with lily of the valley and subtle ginger, while the base notes of sandalwood, tonka bean, and amber provide a warm, sophisticated foundation. H¹ Heart by Eternal Journey: H¹ Heart celebrates love, that universal feeling. It's like a special energy turned into a perfume. This scent tells a story of the heart's wisdom. Imagine sweet fruits mixed with warm, woody and ambery notes. It's a unique smell that feels like a loving hug. This fragrance explores woody, chypre, and fruity worlds. Experience the bright splash of lemon, passion fruit, and pear, followed by a heart of caramel and sandalwood and a base of amber, ambroxan, and musk. Discover your personal fresh kick and find your new favorite fragrance! ✨
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/som.name: Fresh Kick

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.description: Son Venïn 0905 is a perfume with a strong, charismatic personality and a clear masculine leaning. It's a dance of contrasts: bright, sparkling spicy notes meet a deep, grounding base of leathery and ambery accords. This fragrance feels like a walk through an autumn forest, with the crisp air carrying the scent of pine resin and dry leaves. It's an intriguing and confident scent, perfect for those who appreciate a woody and aromatic profile.

Son Venïn 3007 is a sophisticated and feminine blend. It features fresh orange blossom mixed with some powdery notes. An addictive white bouquet of white jasmine is revealed, with soft touches of vanilla. This fragrance is a beautiful floral experience with a powdery and woody touch.

Discover Ambr Super by Son Venin, a clean and modern fragrance that reinterprets amber and woody notes. Inspired by pure Scandinavian aesthetics, this scent balances intimacy with strength. It features warm amber and the captivating molecule ISO E-Super. Ambr Super unfolds with a beautiful blend of plum, amber, and dry woods, offering a spicy, fruity, and woody experience. As it settles, it becomes increasingly fruity and calming, making it a unique and modern unisex choice.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.name: Ambr Super

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.description: Le Voleur, 'The Thief', moves silently. It's an elegant and seductive scent that steals your attention. This fragrance combines the freshness of white flowers and a modern iris with sensual incense and rich woods. It's a captivating blend of woody, spicy, and powdery notes, creating a mysterious and sophisticated aura. Perfect for those who appreciate a scent with a quiet confidence and a touch of intrigue.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.name: Le Voleur

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.description: Son Venïn PAIN NOUVEAU means "New Bread." It's a bold statement. This perfume reinvents how we think about bread, in life and in scent. Expect luxury, creativity, and a modern feel. It blends the earthy warmth of bread with the sweetness of ripe figs. Fine woods add a grounding elegance. The result is a scent experience that's both familiar and new. This is a truly gourmand and woody fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.name: Pain Nouveau

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.description: POSTHUME is the scent of Nordic heritage, a story told over thousands of years of cold climates and extreme nature. It captures the essence of tar from sacred buildings and the raw texture of the surrounding wilderness. We created a sensory reenactment of our heritage. This is where we come from; this is our inherent creature. This fragrance is a journey through spicy, smoky, and leathery realms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.name: Posthume

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.description: Son Venïn PUR 01 is the essence of a Mediterranean country. Rose, lavender and thyme blend together, reminding you of a warm sunset. Fresh notes of eucalyptus and sparkling spices pass by. A charismatic fragrance that finishes with touches of amber and wood for a long lasting and addictive effect.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.name: Pur 01

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.description: Son Venïn PUR 02 is a pure and simple scent. It's built around soft white jasmine and clean white woods. A touch of white musk makes it even softer. Think of quiet, fresh winter nights with snow covering the woods. This perfume mixes floral, aquatic, and woody smells for a modern, fresh feel.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.name: Pur 02

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.description: Santal Super by Son Venin is like a warm hug in a bottle. It's a pure, confident scent you'll want to wear all day. This woody perfume, launched in 2020, captures the spirit of Norway's untouched nature - think clear, cool air on a crisp morning. It's perfect if you love clean, green fragrances with a comforting woody base and a hint of spice. Modern, elegant, and great for any occasion.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/son.name: Santal Super

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Our immortal scent. Your essential quest. 7 - Chance. It empties in one go and drinks through the skin, in secret. Bottled aura, 7 only reveals itself in the heart of lost lands. And in the chances of mountains.

Brocéliande reveals itself as an enchanting and mystical concentrate. Delighting with its citrusy opening of citrus fruits and sweet notes on a caramel and cinnamon background, Brocéliande then reveals a fragrance of indecipherable power. Let yourself be seduced by the oak barrel bark. As it dries, this bark reveals sweet whiskey aromas. In depth, the juice settles into a desirable and musky mystery. By linking the power of the forest to the magic of animal effluvia, SORADORA signs Brocéliande as a wild and secret blend, which calls and stirs our most unpredictable instincts.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Brocéliande

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Gladiator by Sora Dora is a fresh and vibrant fragrance that combines citrus freshness with aromatic depth. Created in 2021, this perfume balances fruity notes of pineapple, green apple, and citrus with aromatic mint and white florals, all grounded by a sophisticated woody base of patchouli, vetiver, and cedar.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Gladiator

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Once upon a time... A garden in the height of summer. The calm of a sunny siesta. And children's snack time. Jany. She bustles in the kitchen, between sugar and flour. Above all other delicacies, what she loves to prepare is tarte tatin. Butter melts on the glass. She drops brown sugar crystals into it, in the silence of a fine, icy rain. Its fragrance swirls through the room, echoes to the veranda, travels to the pathway. The baked apples and cinnamon sticks fade into the emanations of puff pastry. Then come caramel, almonds, and vanilla which, powerful, will persist until evening.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Jany

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Kamel is the initiated one. In the past, he was the friend who confided to Antoine all the secrets of the oriental olfactory universe and its countless rich treasures. It is from this precious knowledge that Kamel Oud was imagined. Like charisma bottled, this elegant perfume interprets a melody of subtle and refined aromas. Giving prominence to Far Eastern scents, it delivers a gourmand and generous result. Its blend of background tones, all imbued with incense, oud wood, and red fruits, promises a unique dynamic. It will magnify your 1001 days and 1001 nights to come. Be ready for all your oriental desires. This perfume is conceived as a tribute. Thank you Kamel.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Kamel Oud

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Lü Bu. A feared warrior, betrayed but legendary. This perfume is his rebirth. It's a dense, magnetic scent. It opens with sharp, metallic notes, like clove and the scent of blood. The heart reveals burning Armenian paper and a soft, powdery iris. This fragrance is about sacrifice and memory, not just power. It's an oath, a weapon for those who wear their shadows with pride. A scent for your battles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Lü Bu

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Mallow is the story of a flower-candy that explodes in the infinite softness of violet powder. A moody-soft perfume. A singular contradiction. The real illusion of a harmonic vision in counterpoint. An incessant olfactory piece to our ears, our eyes, our mouths, and our fingers. Because Mallow is not just smelled. It is listened to, seen, drunk, and touched. Like so many ultra-ephemeral peppercorns, this fragrance draws dangerous inspiration from your most sensual shadows. Brought to light by heliotrope and the most secret orange blossom, violets will surround your neck and wrists to the absolute.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Mallow

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Mandorle tells a story of seduction. An unambiguous seduction that never hesitates. A manifest charm that never falls silent. After the initial explosion of almonds in the top notes, an icy cherry heart magnetizes us towards the powerful leather base accord. A couple dreaming between intoxicating notes of gourmand delights and an ardently magnetic musky roundness. Mandorle's tones subjugate with their sensuality, swirling for hours on undertones of smoked leather. This perfume, invulnerable in its grace, will be your first choice when attraction arises from intuition. To your enchantments.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Mandorle

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Orchidée Rouge by Sora Dora is a luxurious oriental-gourmand fragrance that tells a beautiful traveler's tale. Created from black vanilla extracts collected during journeys across the Indian Ocean, this deep concentrate combines various vanilla essences with a heliotropic accord and almond milk heart. The addiction builds with an embrace of rum and benzoin, while lingering white musks create a round, powdery finish. A true character perfume that transports us to warm, exotic lands.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Orchidée Rouge

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Red by Sora Dora ignites in the darkness, a creation born of the night. Imagine clinking glasses at a stylish celebration - that's the scene. This fragrance was meticulously crafted, blending key notes like bergamot, jasmine, and sandalwood into a captivating experience. Red is a special scent, an exclusive creation for those in the know. It's a journey through spicy, gourmand, and woody aromas.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Red

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Ylop is born from a loving craftsmanship. Its effluves are imagined through touch: it's on the skin that this water reverses our senses. Playing on the echoes between the velvety sweetness of an apricot and the sensuality of the dermis, this textured perfume captures nature's scents in flesh. A true bottling of the beloved body, Ylop offers a prismatic vision of our romantic stories, oscillating between its inspiration - Poly - and its multiple polyamorous sprays.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Ylop

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.description: Bilingual content stored in metafields: short_description (subtitle) and box_long_description_markdown (full description). Title stored in title metafield.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sor.name: Sorcinelli's Soul

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Discover a fountain of pure allure with Accento Viola. This fragrance captures a timeless grace that enchants everyone around you. It combines the tropical, juicy sweetness of pineapple with the sharp freshness of hyacinth. A sophisticated heart of iris and jasmine adds a touch of elegance. Finally, it settles into a warm embrace of amber and vanilla. It is a captivating journey through floral, fruity, and musk notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Accento Viola

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Basso acts like a deep voice in an opera. It grabs your attention immediately. The scent starts with a bright burst of grapefruit. Then, it dives into a mix of spices and flowers. Finally, it settles into a strong base of woods. It feels powerful yet smooth. This fragrance fits perfectly into woody, citrus, and spicy collections.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Basso

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Cavatina is inspired by a simple, lovely song. It captures the joy of music in a bottle. The scent starts with bright fruits and a little spice. Then, it opens up into a garden of fresh flowers. It ends with a warm and sweet touch that stays with you. This fragrance explores floral, fruity, and musk styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Cavatina

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Contralto is a scent that stands tall and proud. It mixes sweet and spicy notes for a deep, energetic vibe. While it is inspired by the resilient spirit of a woman, its bold character suits anyone who loves confidence. You get a hazy mix of flowers and spices that settles into a warm, woody embrace. It invites you to be yourself and break the mold. This fragrance features spicy, floral, and woody notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Contralto

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Deep Ocean Amber is not your typical fresh sea scent. Instead, it dives into the warm, dark depths of the abyss. It feels like discovering a hidden treasure chest filled with gold and resins. The fragrance blends the heat of the sun with the mystery of the deep ocean. It is an addictive elixir for those who love resinous and spicy perfumes. The scent is magnetic, wrapping you in a sensual and amber aura that lasts all day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Deep Ocean Amber

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Dolce Melodia is like a catchy song you simply cannot get out of your head. It starts with a bright burst of sweet citrus that instantly grabs your attention. As it settles, it reveals a luscious mix of fruits and flowers that feels both playful and elegant. This fruity and floral scent is loud, proud, and designed to make a statement. The base is warm and creamy, ensuring the melody lasts on your skin all day long.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Dolce Melodia

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Dolce Sonata feels like a beautiful song in a secret garden. It captures the joy of classical music. You get a bright mix of fruity apricot and raspberry right away. Then, floral notes like jasmine and rose take over. It ends with a cozy, sweet vibe of cotton candy and incense.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Dolce Sonata

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Erba Oud by Sospiro is a bold mix of fresh fruits and deep woods. Released in 2022, this scent takes a famous sweet vibe and adds a strong kick of oud. It opens with zest from citrus notes before revealing a heart of juicy fruits. The base is heavy and dark with leather and animalic touches. It is a loud fragrance for those who want to stand out, combining fruity and woody worlds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Erba Oud

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Erba Pura Magica feels like pure joy in a bottle. It is a lively scent that wakes up your senses immediately. The mix of fresh fruits and warm sweetness creates a smooth and magical vibe. It is perfect for anyone who loves fruity and gourmand perfumes. The velvety bottle holds a refined scent that is smoother than the original and lasts all day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Erba Pura Magica

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Il Padrino captures the essence of authority and elegance. Inspired by the concept of The Godfather, this fragrance commands attention. It blends a sophisticated woody character with rich, oriental warmth. The experience is like sipping a fine drink in a dark room. It features a bold boozy opening that settles into a smooth, confident aura. This scent is designed for those who want to leave a lasting impression.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Il Padrino

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Maraschino invites you into a whimsical world of scent. It embodies the charm of a red sunrise with its luscious blend. The fragrance is a fruity explosion that feels both playful and elegant. As it develops, a sophisticated floral tapestry emerges. The dry down offers a warm, gourmand touch that lingers on the skin. It is perfect for those who love non-synthetic fruit notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Maraschino

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Opera Grande brings a masterful performance of passion and drama to your skin. It balances sweet fruits with exotic flowers in a rich, sophisticated way. The scent feels like a rhythmic journey, moving from bright elegance to deep devotion. It is perfect for those who love bold floral and leathery fragrances that leave a memorable path.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Opera Grande

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Step into the elegant world of Traviata. Inspired by classical music, this scent acts like a symphony on your skin. It opens with a burst of citric notes and calming lavender. Soon, a heart of rose and violet sings a sweet melody. The finale is grounded by cedarwood and patchouli. It perfectly blends aromatic, floral, and woody styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Traviata

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Vibranna is a fragrance that balances strength and softness. It is made for those who embrace both sides of their nature. The scent opens with a bright glow of bergamot and orris. This creates a luminous and captivating feeling. The heart reveals a mix of nutmeg, green moss, and muguet. The base settles into warm amber and musk. It is a comforting powdery experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Vibranna

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Discover the vibrant energy of Vibrato. This fragrance is a masterclass in blending freshness with elegance. It starts with a zesty punch that feels like sunshine in a bottle. It is perfect for anyone looking for a signature summer scent that lasts all day. The mix of fruits and spices creates a sophisticated aura. It sits in the citrus and aromatic family but feels much more luxurious.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Vibrato

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.description: Viola is a symphony of scent. It opens with bright energy and softens into warm wood. It feels like the rich sound of a viola instrument. Spicy and fresh notes blend together perfectly. It reminds you of polished wood and musical strings. This is an aromatic and woody masterpiece. The fragrance is bold yet refined.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/sos.name: Viola

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.description: Aamal Metallique captures the feeling of a bright future. It's a scent full of promise. Sparkling citrus notes like bergamot and lemon mix with warm coconut and peach. Soft floral notes of rose, jasmine, and orchid feel like a gentle breeze. Solar notes and salty notes bring to mind a wide-open horizon. The scent settles into a rich base of sandalwood, amber, and patchouli. This elegant fragrance brings dreams to life and lets the future shine.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.name: Aamal Metallique

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.description: Roam the bewitching woods where nature reveals its true form with Abjar Bois. Cedarwood, with its rugged elegance, pairs beautifully with sandalwood, bergamot, mandarin, rose, patchouli, which adds a touch of creamy richness. While guaiacwood lends its smoky charm, the interplay of leather and cashmere wood truly sets Abjar Bois apart. To wear this perfume is to be transported to a place of magic and mystery, where the soul is set free.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.name: Abjar Bois

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.description: Strong and powerful like the steel and concrete that builds the iconic Dubai skyline, Dubai Abraj is a symphony of strength, innovation and modernity. A bold combination of energetic bergamot and lavender that is offset by mysterious red rose, geranium, patchouli, sandalwood and woody notes, creating a sophisticated and versatile fragrance suitable for both professional settings and leisure occasions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.name: Abraj

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.description: Ajyal by Spirit of Dubai is a luxurious niche fragrance that embodies the modern spirit of Dubai. Released in 2023, this complex creation masterfully balances fruity freshness with oriental depth, making it a versatile choice for warm weather. The fragrance represents a perfect fusion of contemporary and traditional Middle Eastern perfumery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.name: Ajyal

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.description: Bahar, meaning 'spring' in Arabic, is a luxurious aquatic-woody fragrance that captures the essence of Dubai's coastal spirit. This sophisticated blend combines the freshness of marine elements with rich oriental undertones, creating a unique harmony between the sea and precious woods.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.name: Bahar

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/spi.description: Soar higher with Baz Cuir which envelopes the senses in a whirlwind of spices. The unmistakable scent of smooth leather evokes visions of rugged landscapes and wilderness. An ode to the untamed spirit, the warmth of spicy cardamom, mandarin, jasmine, amber, incense, and leather is reminiscent of old souks. This bold perfume mixes fresh and sweet. It opens with bright lemon zest and exotic ylang-ylang. Then, a surprise: warm banana bread meets creamy peanut butter. It's a daring, irresistible scent. Explore its gourmand and fruity sides.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.name: L'Explicite

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.description: Neverending from The House of Oud is a scent that keeps on giving. It starts with a bold mix of spicy notes that grab your attention immediately. Soon, it turns into a soft and elegant cloud on your skin. The mix of flowers and leathery tones feels modern and very classy. It lasts a long time, wrapping you in deep woody comfort. This perfume is perfect for anyone who loves a scent that changes and evolves throughout the day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.name: Neverending

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.description: Released in 2025, Pure Diamond by The House of Oud is a shining example of modern perfumery. Perfumer Cristian Calabrò crafted this scent to feel like a clear gem. It balances fresh fruit with deep woods seamlessly. This fragrance falls into the floral category but boasts strong woody and fruity accents. It feels luxurious yet is easy enough to wear every day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.name: Pure Diamond

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.description: Ruby Red by The House of Oud is a tribute to the Queen, featuring a masterful blend of fresh and candied ginger with sweet vanilla and floral notes. Created by perfumer Maurizio Cerizza in 2018, this fragrance offers a sophisticated balance between spicy, sweet, and floral elements.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.name: Ruby Red

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.description: A modern fairytale. Sapphire Blue by The House of Oud is a sophisticated blend of floral and gourmand notes, created by perfumer Cristian Calabrò in 2018. This elegant composition balances sweet and spicy elements with a refined floral heart.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.name: Sapphire Blue

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.description: The Time by The House of Oud is a contemplative fragrance that captures the essence of taking time for oneself. Created in 2018 by Cristian Calabrò, it represents a moment of pause and reflection in our busy lives, symbolized through the ritual of tea drinking. The fragrance comes in a unique, hand-painted blue egg-shaped bottle that represents the artistic vision of the house.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.name: The Time

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.description: A fragrance that recounts the attractive and sensual dynamics of complicity, of experiencing emotions, of dedicating ourselves to irreplaceable moments. A deliciously tempting and soft fragrance which warms the soul, as we savour those essential days filled with nothing other than the playful time of a break, stolen from the frenzy of everyday life.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.name: What About Pop

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.description: White Pearl by The House of Oud is a niche fragrance inspired by the rare Akoya pearl. Created by perfumer Cristian Calabrò, this 2024 release combines a floral bouquet with distinctive marine nuances, resulting in a modern and sophisticated composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tho.name: White Pearl

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Age of Innocence captures a strange dream of childhood. Imagine sweet cotton candy and juicy strawberry suddenly mixed with the smell of car exhaust and hot rubber. It's like a happy memory with a surprising, edgy twist. This perfume tells a story of sweet moments interrupted by something metallic and fast. A truly unique scent journey through gourmand, synthetic, and smoky styles.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Age of Innocence

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: This perfume invites you into a melting room of memories. It feels like a sweet, sticky dream of betrayal and nostalgia. The scent mixes the richness of gourmand notes with a dark, boozy edge. You will smell hot wax and old prayers. It is a complex choice for those who love unique stories.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Amaretto in The Melting Room

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Today I remembered hypocrisy. They sell us love, faith, forgiveness, blessings, distraction, dreams. They sell anything if we are ready to buy It up. If it is hard to tell who ''they'' are, it could be because of us… All we ever wanted was everything. White-collared promises that children follow, a better tomorrow. Only if you work for it for every tomorrow. And me, waiting in the cold, snow on my face, rye in my pocket, hoping for answers for a different age. Society remains dying. And we have killed it. How shall we comfort ourselves, the murderers of all murderers? This fragrance is an exploration of synthetic, woody, and spicy notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Anarchist A_

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Today I remembered travelling… my favorite place to visit - the past. The sweet allure of it. The destination of predestination. Going nowhere, fast. I recall the image of the Tyrrhenian, while we were on tower tops. I looked at you like a kid seeing the sea for the first time. Or me seeing it the last. If you look back at that beauty, you've most likely already lost it. Or is it me? Douce melancholy breeze, of summers never lived, of places never been, of sunshine melting skin - You cast such a shadow. Take a seat. Have a treat. Hurry up. We are late. This fragrance is a journey through gourmand, citrus, and aquatic realms.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Annacamento

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Toskovat's Born Screaming is inspired by 'people coming together... an unsound dance passed on to the next generation.' It's an invitation to 'Dance the absurd.' This fragrance embodies a vibrant, punk energy. A bold statement, it blends playful fruity notes like cherry with daring synthetic elements such as plastic, and intriguing smoky accords. Perfect for those who seek unique, unconventional scents that tell a story.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Born Screaming

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Recall the emotions of a final performance. Curtain Call is a nostalgic blend of sweet praline and raspberry. It evokes the scent of an old theater with hints of musk and tobacco. This gourmand fragrance is for those who cherish memories and await one last encore.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Curtain Call

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: **Empty Wishes Well** evokes a poignant memory of childhood wishes and the enduring nature of hope. It's like discovering a forgotten, rusty coin, a symbol of dreams once held. This fragrance paints a picture of dried-up wells and prayers turned to dust, yet it clings to a resilient hope. It whispers of coming rain, of melting into the soil, and the promise that nature will nurture life anew. A contemplative journey through earthy, green, and woody accords.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Empty Wishes Well

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: This fragrance evokes memories of lost embers in late autumn, a feeling of chasing warmth amidst the cold. It's a scent of introspection, of revisiting the past with a new perspective. It speaks of enduring childhood, passing darkness, and the eventual triumph of inner light. A journey through woody, gourmand, and smoky notes, it's a tribute to resilience and gratitude.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Forlorn Embers & Black Reigns

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: This fragrance captures the atmosphere of an old cinema. It evokes the memory of sticky soda spills and popcorn kernels stuck in your teeth. You get the nostalgic scent of newspaper and discarded cigarette filters. It reminds you of small pleasures, like eating sour sugar candy while watching a favorite film. It is a unique mix of gourmand treats and synthetic memories.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Generation Godard

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Hoary Date, once known as F2, is a perfume that looks back to learn, then boldly steps forward. It's about breaking free from old rules and expectations. This scent is a journey, blending the timeless elegance of a chypre with a rich floral heart and a warm, resinous depth. It's for those who embrace vulnerability and dare to make their own plans, even if fate has a sense of humor.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Hoary Date (formerly known as F2)

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: This scent feels like a faded memory of a night out. It captures the mystery of a foggy evening and the taste of sweet treats. It tells a story of eating grapes at midnight and the warmth of touching hands. The vibe is deep and nostalgic. It mixes fruity, floral, and powdery notes to create a unique experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Я

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Ichigo Ichie is a nostalgic journey to a Japanese spring. It captures the feeling of a Sakura festival, where the air is filled with sweet blooms and memories. It tells a story of lost moments, old photos, and fizzing soda. The scent balances playful sweetness with a deep, meditative calm. It explores floral, fruity, and powdery themes. It is like a tea break in an abandoned theme park.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Ichigo Ichie

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Picture yourself at the ocean's edge, cold waves crashing. You're about to dive deep. This scent is that journey: sinking into dark waters, meeting something huge and old below. It's an animalic, woody, and aquatic trip into the unknown. As the creator says, 'the only way out is through.'
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: In the Belly of the Beast

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Inexcusable Evil is a fragrance that remembers destruction and pain. It tells a story of fallen buildings, lost memories, and the aftermath of conflict. "At least I have iodine on my wounds and crutches left to use, but what about those that don't?" asks the creator. This perfume is an artistic statement, designed to provoke thought and emotion. It explores synthetic and smoky themes, with an unsettling touch of metallic notes. Not for the faint of heart, it's a scent that challenges.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Inexcusable Evil

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Today I remembered there is but one truly serious question. I've grown resentful of all of this, I'm done pretending I like cake, done counting the days. Done searching for grains of zenith at the bottom of the barrel. I made it a long way for somebody with a short fuse anyway. Ran, then walked, then crawled. All for a roadside picnic? Make a wish they said. Any wish, they keep saying… Few of them even know what they wish for. My happiest days are probably behind me. A battlefield of fleeting fireworks spurs in front. Flickering lights are born - then gone before I can even think. In the distance a big boulder starts rolling on the hill. I remain undecided. This fragrance captures a moment of reflection, a complex blend of gourmand sweetness, boozy warmth, and a touch of smoky melancholy.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Last Birthday Cake

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: My Past Selves' Flowers is a scent of memory, love, and sorrow, like receiving flowers for the first time. It speaks of eternity, where flowers grow from deep wishes, a symbol of an undying presence. This perfume evokes dreams of soft petals, bright meadows, and healing waters. It's a tribute to a life full of color and a promise of meeting again. This fragrance explores floral, leathery, and woody dimensions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: My Past Selves' Flowers

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Pining Dew 2 tells a story of first love and heartbreak. It recalls memories of an old vase and a lover obsessed with pineapples. The scent captures summer days spent swimming to forget. It feels like waves of lavender bringing sleep. It tastes like tides of gin and tonic drowning out the pain. In the end, there are always salty tears burning your cheek. This perfume is a unique mix of aromatic, boozy, and fruity notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Pining Dew 2

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: This perfume tells a story of modern vanity and fleeting desires. It reflects on criticism and the constant search for the "next big thing." The scent embodies the feeling of cheap love and looking into a mirror without shame. It finds beauty in the artificial and the overlooked. A daring gourmand and fruity statement.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Pornstar (Noyau Doux)

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: Present Gambit explores the tension between rules and freedom. It honors the past while looking to the future. Life is not black and white, and neither is this scent. It invites you to make your move on the board of life. This fruity and woody fragrance is full of strategy. You can layer it with F2 for a sweet chocolate surprise.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Present Gambit (Formerly known as F7)

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: **Silent at the Theme Park** takes you back. Remember your mother's sweater? Eating a small lemon tart on your first flight? This perfume captures these moments. Lilacs at the window, big colorful rooms, and the calm scent of linens. It's spring, a garden in full blossom. It's playing inside, endless days. This fragrance is a nostalgic journey, blending green freshness with floral beauty and gourmand comfort, grounded by woody depths.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Silent at the Theme Park

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.description: This perfume is like a memory from the week before Christmas. Imagine waiting at a train station, a promise hanging in the air. It's about sweet moments, like shared drinks and flowers, but also about unspoken words and plans that never happened. It captures the feeling of a hot cocoa warming cold hands, a touch of longing, and the bittersweetness of 'sweet nothings'. A truly gourmand experience, it blends spicy warmth with the richness of shared memories and dreams.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/tos.name: Things We Never Shared

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ulr.description: 17 Nandan Road by Ulrich Lang New York is a fresh and sophisticated fragrance inspired by a botanical garden in Shanghai. Released in 2018, this perfume features a harmonious blend of citrus, osmanthus, and woody notes, creating a refined and versatile scent suitable for daily wear.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ulr.name: 17 Nandan Road

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ulr.description: Apsu by Ulrich Lang New York is a fresh, green fragrance launched in 2016. It is inspired by the Mesopotamian concept of Apsu, the primordial freshwater ocean. The scent captures the essence of a lush garden with fresh-cut grass, aromatic herbs, and aquatic elements.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ulr.name: Apsu

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ulr.description: Lethe by Ulrich Lang New York is a modern unisex fragrance launched in 2021. It combines fresh lavender and bergamot with woody notes of cashmere and cedar, complemented by water lily and a warm base of musk, vanilla, amber, and tonka bean. The fragrance offers a sophisticated blend that works well across seasons and occasions.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ulr.name: Lethe

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ulr.description: Suncrest by Ulrich Lang New York is a fragrance celebrating the brand's 20th anniversary. It is inspired by the essence of two peach varieties - Redhaven and Suncrest. This bright and joyful perfume combines fresh fruity notes with subtle floral undertones and a creamy woody base.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/ulr.name: Suncrest

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: The Souq of Muttrah lies in the heart of the oldest city in the Middle East, Muscat, the capital of the Sultanate of Oman. It's the perfect place to spend a small fortune on a legendary Khandjar, a J-shaped dagger. Our fragrance 'Ambre Khandjar' is a tribute to the power of tradition. It is a powerful, oriental amber fragrance with modern facets and a lingering touch of leather and vanilla that makes it timeless, warm, and irresistibly attractive. A scent that simultaneously evokes sun-tanned skin cooled by metal.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Ambre Khandjar

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: Released in homage to the 1966 documentary 'Endless Summer', Bohemian Soul captures the essence of Montauk's 'Gypset' (Gypsy + Jet Setter) culture. This fragrance embodies the desire for isolation in untouched nature, eco-luxury, and the surfing lifestyle. It represents a journey of meditation, breathing, and taking time to experience life's simple pleasures.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Bohemian Soul

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: A gentle wheat breeze, infused with the purity of a freshly picked almond. Its enveloping softness reveals soothing, calming notes. This fragrance is a journey into the gourmand world, perfect for those who love comforting scents.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Chemin D'Amande

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: 'Click Song' (Qongqothwane in the Xhosa language) was made world-famous by the great singer Miriam Makeba, known as Mama Africa, thus shaping South Africa's musical message. A child of the townships who became a singer by chance, she rose to stardom in her country but had to go into exile due to her stance against apartheid. This fragrance is a glowing tribute to this extraordinary woman, imagined as a rose bud wrapped in a patchouli leaf, with solid and deep roots of amber and labdanum sinking into the sacred soil of its origins.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Click Song

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: The mountainous coasts of Eastern Mexico blend into the warm, damp veil of late summer, where the tragic love story of Estrella de la Mañana and the Deer Prince gave birth to the first black vanilla. Their sacrificed souls transformed into intertwined branches bearing star-shaped flowers, forever whispering the fragrance of their eternal love through the smoky winds.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Estrella de la Mañana

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: Bali, island of flowers. Ylang-ylang, meaning 'flower of flowers' in Malay, is highly valued for its complex fragrance and incomparable effect on body and mind. Jasmine, the queen of the night, waits for sunset to fill the air with its powerful and warm scent. 'Fleur des Fleurs' is an ode to ylang-ylang and jasmine, an intense harmony that unfolds in a floral bouquet with subtly woody elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Fleur des Fleurs

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: It was very early when she entered Misfah. The village awoke gently to the sound of water meandering wildly along thousands of irrigation canals, the falajs. With hands covered in unknown symbols, she gently touched the trees, buds, and young fruit. Nature began to rustle. Pomegranates, apricots, figs, and almonds ripened. Roses opened into a kaleidoscope of brilliant colors. The palm trees bent under the weight of their arrogant dates. As she passed, Misfah transformed into an extraordinary village. An open-air cornucopia, where each breath was an opportunity to discover a new scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Jardins de Misfah

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: The village slowly awakened to the sound of water meandering through countless irrigation channels, the Falajs. With hands covered in unknown symbols, she gently touched trees, buds, and ripening fruits. Gradually, nature stirred. Pomegranates, buds, and fruits came to life. Misfah transformed into a cornucopia under the open sky, where each breath offered an opportunity to discover a new fragrance. Jardins de Misfah Extrait is a reinterpretation of Jardins de Misfah. In this gentler and deeper version, opulence does not rhyme with excess. Amidst a unique rose garden, the scent of dates, honey, and almonds awakens not only appetite but also desire.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Jardins de Misfah Extrait

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: Spring is mild in Johannesburg. The Jacaranda tree conquers the city with its mauve-colored mantle, reigning majestically for the duration of a season. Its bell-shaped flowers sway in the wind at will, diffusing an enchanting fragrance, a hymn to love. Impatient acacias greet this flame tree with beating hearts, blushing at such a declaration of love. 'Love at First Sight', an instantaneous passion where floral notes blend and intertwine. The intense caresses of the Jacaranda tree's freshness succumb to the honeyed kisses of acacia.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Love at First Sight

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: Memory Motel pays tribute to the Rolling Stones' turbulent times in Montauk during the summer of 1975, when they rented Andy Warhol's beach house for pre-recording their album 'Black and Blues'. This vintage-inspired fragrance captures the essence of rock 'n' roll nostalgia, combining classic tobacco notes with patchouli and subtle vanilla, creating a timeless and androgynous scent that echoes stories of the past.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Memory Motel

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: Mr. Vetiver is the story of a tall, attractive, sun-tanned man whom you might have met or will meet somewhere near Java. He is often seen on the plains of the Garut region, cycling at full speed on an old Dutch bicycle. A tribute to the free spirit, combining the freshness of vetiver with a spicy and delicate cardamom accord.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Mr Vetiver

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: Murmure des Dieux (Whisper of the Gods) honors Bali's iconic Frangipani flower, a symbol of the deity Shiva and a medium of prayer adorning most temples. This fragrance creates an olfactory mantra on the skin, combining the sweetness of Frangipani blossoms with creamy vanilla and soothing musk notes for a uniquely exotic and sensual experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Murmure des Dieux

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: The famous poetry collection 'Leaves of Grass' by Walt Whitman contains the work 'From Montauk Point'. 'Nothing but Sea & Sky' is a quote that reflects the poet's contemplative mood at Montauk Point, where the world seems to stand still, especially in winter when the village is deserted. The sky shrouded in pale white, as storm covers the beach with snowflakes, inspired this soothing fragrance that envelops like a cashmere scarf.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Nothing but Sea and Sky

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: In 'The Little Prince', St-Exupéry writes: 'Go and look at the roses again. You will understand that yours is unique in all the world.' The dunes of Montauk witness the blooming of Rosa Rugosa, a special rose battered by sea spray and exposed to the influences of time. It becomes naturally maritime, peppery, and salty. This self-assured rose, an integral part of a wild landscape, is what we have tamed.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Rose America

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: Twilight had fallen. The horses neighed with fatigue. It was time to stop. The men saw a resting place; their bodies were exhausted and dusty. The shadow of the Kashmir mountains towered over the great plain with its low grasses. Emperor Alexander, helmet in hand, brandished his sword in front of the crowd. The moon slipped in and out of view, its face ablaze. It projected a silver hue onto the blade's edge, illuminating the entire plain with a blinding ray. Early the next morning, the men could not believe their eyes. The ground was covered in a purple coat. Millions of saffron flowers had appeared over the course of one night.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Silver Saffron

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: The wind rises over Kerala. Along the Malabar Coast, the backwaters of Alleppey stretch out. Aboard a classic boat, time stands still. Papaya and mango trees grow next to coconut palms and pepper vines. These dark berries are the black gold of Kochi. Spicy Road honors the rich spices of the West Indies. Enjoy a deep scent full of spicy and woody notes.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Spicy Road

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: Our nomadic caravan stretches silently. We move forward in rhythm with the dromedaries, with their swaying, almost hypnotic motion. The saddle of our pack animals, warmed by an arrogant sun, releases a mild and tender leather scent. We approach Al Khaluf. The landscape is almost lunar. The sand has changed color and is now dazzlingly white. We appear tiny in this sugar dune. 'Sugar Leather' like a piece of sugar covered in white sand and caramelized by the flair of the sun. A racy, spicy gourmand perfume.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Sugar Leather

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: Suma Oriental is a homage to the great collection of writings by the 16th century Portuguese pharmacist Tomé Pires. In a very detailed document with the melodious name 'Suma Oriental', he describes for the first time the trade of sandalwood from the Sumba Islands. This hypnotic fragrance enhances patchouli in luxuriant harmony with woody and creamy notes, inspired by the historical spice routes and exotic treasures of the East.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Suma Oriental

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.description: In the heart of Muscat, Oman's White City, the sun's rays embrace pristine walls as the city awakens. Omanis gracefully move through the streets wearing their traditional dishdashas - long white tunics with delicately perfumed tassels. 'Sun Bleached' is a fresh fragrance that transitions from shadow to light, following the sun from dawn to morning, capturing the essence of pure linen, white flowers, and citrus notes, rounded by white musk, sandalwood, and vanilla.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/une.name: Sun Bleached

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/van.description: Dive into the irresistible world of vanilla with our "Vanilla Dreams" Parfinity Box! 🍦✨ This exclusive collection takes you on a sensual journey through the diverse facets of vanilla, from creamy-sweet to complex and smoky. Discover five exceptional fragrances that put vanilla at their heart and will enchant you. The Fragrances in Your Box: Lira by Casamorati: A masterpiece of gourmand fragrances that seduces you with an irresistible blend of blood orange, caramel, and vanilla. Imagine an elegant lemon cake refined with warm spices – simply mouth-watering! 🍊🍰 Fire At Will by Jovoy: Created by Vanina Muracciole, this fragrance is an ethereal interpretation of vanilla, complemented by honeyed mimosa and brown sugar notes. A delicate, powdery dream that envelops you like a warm blanket. 🍯🌸 Allende by Xerjoff: As rare as the meteorite from which it takes its name. This gourmand scent, composed by Christian Carbonnel, is an intoxicating vortex of vanilla and magnolia, with subtle notes of cocoa. A beautifully sophisticated and elegant creation. 🌌🍫 Van Py Rhum by Lorenzo Pazzaglia: A luxurious extrait de parfum that masterfully combines rum with soft vanilla on a bed of patchouli and white flowers. A deep, woody and boozy composition that tells a story of warm elegance. 🥃🌿 Siwa by Memo Paris: Created by Alienor Massenet, this fragrance is a warm and comforting gourmand creation. Opening with fresh narcissus and spicy cinnamon leaf, the heart reveals whiskey notes blending with creamy vanilla. The base of popcorn and musk creates a unique, sweet and powdery composition. 🍿🌼 With your Parfinity Box, you not only get the opportunity to test these exquisite fragrances but also a discount coupon equal to your purchase price, which you can redeem when buying a full-size bottle. Find your new favorite vanilla scent and let yourself be enchanted by its sweet dreams! ✨
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/van.name: Vanilla Dreams

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/vap.description: Embrace the mysterious allure of Aura, a fragrance that captures the softer side of the techno scene. This fragrance is a gentle echo of the night, reserved yet intriguing. Aura embodies the soulful moments of club nights and raves, offering a scent that is as complex and mysterious as the experiences that inspire it. Aura is for the raver who delights in the details and dances until dawn.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/vap.name: Aura

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/vap.description: Deserta - a perfume inspired by the mesmerizing landscape of a desert by night. A unique creation that captures the essence of sunlight absorbed by earth during the day, released slowly as the desert cools. Noël au Balcon by Etat Libre D'Orange: A festive and seductive scent, it embodies the spirit of Christmas with its sweet honey notes dancing with tangerine and warm spices, bringing joy to winter nights. 🍯 Guimauve de Noël/31 by Parle Moi de Parfum: This fragrance offers an instant of respite with its delicate blend of orange blossom and vanilla sugar, evoking tender and reassuring childhood memories. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/win.description: Escape the winter chill with our 'Winter's Embrace' Parfinity Box, a curated collection of fragrances designed to envelop you in warmth and comfort. Discover your new winter favorite and get a discount equal to the box price for a full bottle purchase! ❄️ Almond Harmony by THoO: A gourmand and floral delight, this fragrance wraps you in the sweet embrace of almond and orange blossom, settling into a warm, balsamic base. A truly comforting experience. Ile Bourbon by Fabbrica Della Musa: Journey to a mystical island with this smoky chocolate and vanilla fragrance, reminiscent of a luxurious and untouched landscape. Spicy cardamom and incense add an intriguing touch. Sugar Kisses by Lorenzo Pazzaglia: Indulge in the sweetness of a winter treat with this gourmand fragrance. Creamy notes of caramel, vanilla, and roasted hazelnut create a truly delectable and comforting experience. 🍬 Ambre by Les Eaux Primordiales: Evoke the warmth of a fireside with this amber fragrance, reminiscent of apple pie and gingerbread. Oriental spices, honey, and a touch of rum and tobacco create a cozy and sophisticated scent. Sissa by Mind Games: Discover a profound and creamy gourmand scent, centered around roasted tonka bean and milky accords. A warm and earthy foundation of labdanum and musk completes this comforting and slightly powdery fragrance. This collection is your perfect companion for cozy winter days and enchanting evenings. ✨
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/win.name: Winter's Embrace

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: The Join the Club collection of Xerjoff perfumes represents a series of exclusive clubs, from art and poetry to yachting and golf. https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: In honour of Elle, the first perfume born into the first collection ever created in the Xerjoff portfolio, 17/17, the much-adored scent is celebrated with the creation of Elle Anniversary, a sensual and enchanting scent inspired by the pure beauty that lies at the heart of Elle. The first Xerjoff collection, 17/17, was inspired by the semi-precious stones on display at the Natural History Museum in London, which is why the carefully crafted flacon is dressed in a unique semi-precious grey mother of pearl stone, framed by intricately crafted gold-leaf details that adorn the flacon.
