https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Layla, from Xerjoff's K Collection, is a luxurious oriental perfume taking its name from the Arabic word for night. This 2023 release captures the mystical essence of a starlit sky with a masterful blend of spices and oriental notes. The fragrance represents a romantic and feminine interpretation of the celestial world, offering a calm yet seductive character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Layla

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Intense and mysterious, Laylati is a woody and aromatic scent that captivates all that experience it. Herbal top notes lead the nose to a cedar wood and patchouli heart, while classic base notes of vanilla and tobacco add warmth. Soft and intense, each scent is evocative of pure luxury.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Laylati

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Louis XV 1722 is a prestigious collaboration between Xerjoff and the House de Venoge, celebrating the art of fine champagne and perfumery. This royal creation embodies the sophistication of French nobility, combining metallic champagne-like sparkle with warm, seductive woody notes, creating a fragrance worthy of its namesake king.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Louis XV 1722

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Two great crafts come together in this new perfume. Xerjoff worked with the famous champagne house Maison de Venoge. Their amazing Princesse Rosé de Venoge Champagne inspired this scent. Louis XV 1722 Rosé is pure luxury. Its beautiful color and sparkling notes remind you of the champagne. It wraps you in a feeling of pure elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Louis XV 1722 ROSÉ

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Fresh, fruity and irresistible, Lua takes its name from a meteorite that showered over India in 1926. Oriental in spirit with a delectable gourmand combination, it hits top notes of bergamot, orange and melon. The nose is led to a heart of lily of the valley, Bulgarian rose, iris and rose pepper for a truly mesmerising accord. Grounding cedar wood, patchouli, vanilla and musk base notes linger on the skin, for a scent that is truly unique in character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Lua

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: The Join the Club collection of Xerjoff perfumes represents a series of exclusive clubs, from art and poetry to yachting and golf. More Than Words imagines a secret club of writers and poets, inspired by literature and the power of the written word; their creativity is bound only by the paper they write on.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: More Than Words

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Muse by Xerjoff is an ode to sensuality, launched in 2018. This sophisticated fragrance is a masterful blend of fruity and floral notes, creating a mysterious and feminine character. Part of the Xerjoff V Collection, it represents modern elegance and refined luxury.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Muse

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Naxos by Xerjoff is a tribute to the grandeur and glamour of Sicily, part of the 1861 collection celebrating the 150th anniversary of Italian Unification. This classically Italian scent combines fresh citrus and lavender with warm honey, tobacco, and vanilla notes for a sophisticated and luxurious experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Naxos

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Nio, named after a meteorite that fell over Japan in the late 19th century, is a masterful blend of Mediterranean freshness and woody sophistication. This luxurious creation by Xerjoff combines the finest ingredients to create a refreshing yet elegant composition that embodies the essence of Italian refinement.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Nio

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Opera by Xerjoff is a luxurious and complex fragrance from their Vibe Collection. Presented with a unique silk neck scarf designed by Xerjoff and produced by famous silk manufacturers in Lake Como, this extravagant Eau de Parfum showcases the house's commitment to luxury and quality.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Opera

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Few scents have the romantic charm of Ouverture. Floral and fruity, this irresistible scent is a rare and precious journey that sets the senses alight. Classic magnolia and fruity fig leaves open and lead the way for a heart of Bulgarian rose and ylang-ylang. The nose is invited to experience a warm, luxurious base of cashmere vanilla and sandalwood that feels sensual and seductive. Soft and intense, each scent is evocative of pure luxury.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Ouverture

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: P.33, discovered on page 33 of Sergio Momo's sketchbook, represents a modern interpretation of fresh and spicy elegance. Part of Xerjoff's Sketchbook Collection, this fragrance embodies creative freedom and refined craftsmanship. Originally presented in a Tuscan handcrafted flacon, the Blank Page Edition maintains the precious perfume while featuring a more minimalist exterior design.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: P.33 Blank Page Edition

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Purple Accento is a happy and charming perfume. It comes in a cool purple bottle. Imagine sweet pineapple and tasty loganberry mixing with soft flowers. Then, a touch of oud wood makes it interesting. It's not too strong, just right. This scent is a fun mix of fruity, woody, and floral smells.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Purple Accento

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Renaissance by Xerjoff is a sparkling bouquet of fruity accords, authentically Italian in heart, body and soul. Inspired by rich heritage and an homage to the glamour of Italy, this fragrance represents the inspiring character of the country. Released in 2011, it's a sophisticated blend that captures the essence of Italian elegance and freshness.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Renaissance

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Part of the XJ 17/17 collection inspired by the minerals and semi-precious stones on display at London's Natural History Museum, Xerjoff Richwood is evocative of a vintage wine. Woody in character with an irresistibly sensual undertone, this warm scent has top notes of bergamot and grapefruit that lead to a heart of rose absolute and geranium leaves. In Richwood by Xerjoff the earthy base notes of patchouli vanilla and musk invite the nose in further to experience its rich splendour.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Richwood

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Star Musk is a rich and inviting scent from Xerjoff. It is designed as part of a mixing experience, often paired with Amber Star. You can wear it alone or layer it to create something new. The scent feels like a soft cashmere sweater on the skin. It combines musk, floral, and powdery elements for a luxurious feel.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Star Musk

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Starlight is the ignition that sparks a seductive and sensual olfactory experience that is difficult to forget. With top notes of citrus bergamot and fresh cardamom, this perfume from the Spotlight Collection travels to a comforting heart of almond, cinnamon and clove for an irresistibly alluring warmth. The enticing base of cedar wood and amber features balsamic accords that set the senses alight.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Starlight

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Discover the luxurious world of Xerjoff with this exclusive Parfinity Box! ✨ Dive into five unique fragrances that celebrate the diversity and craftsmanship of the Italian house. Find your new signature scent and use the included 40€ coupon towards your full-size bottle. Experience the scents: Naxos: A tribute to Sicily. This gourmand, spicy, woody fragrance seduces with notes of Honey, Tobacco Leaf, Vanilla, and Lavender. A warm, enveloping dream. 🍯🌿 Renaissance: A sparkling bouquet capturing Italian elegance. Fresh and aromatic with vibrant citrus notes like Lemon and Mandarin, invigorating Mint, and delicate florals. 🍋🌸 40 Knots: Sail across the Mediterranean! This aquatic, woody fragrance captures the essence of the luxurious yachting lifestyle, featuring notes of Seawater, Honey, and Woody notes. 🌊🛥️ Torino21: The energy of a tennis match in Turin. A fresh, aromatic, green scent full of dynamism with notes of Mint, Lemon, and Basil. Sporty yet elegant. 🎾🌿 Cruz Del Sur II: A journey into the South American rainforest. This fruity, gourmand, green fragrance is creamy and exotic, dominated by juicy Mango and Pineapple. 🥭🍍 Find your personal Xerjoff favorite and enjoy the journey through these masterpieces of perfumery!
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Xerjoff: Italian Masterpieces

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: A luxurious fragrance from Xerjoff's 1717 Stone Label collection that masterfully combines gourmand and woody elements. This intriguing composition features premium ingredients including Spanish mandarin, Belgian chocolate, and rare oud woods from Thailand and Laos, creating a mysterious and extravagant olfactory experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Symphonium

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: A masterful collaboration between Black Sabbath's legendary guitarist Tony Iommi and Xerjoff's Sergio Momo, creating a palindromic fragrance that plays in an endless loop. This dark and decadent experience casts subliminal shadows, combining mysterious elements with rock 'n' roll attitude in a sophisticated olfactory composition.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Tony Iommi Deified

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Tony Iommi Monkey Special is a collaborative creation between Xerjoff and Black Sabbath's legendary guitarist Tony Iommi, representing a unique fusion of music and fragrance. This parfum is part of the Xerjoff Blends Rock Edition, offering a dark, rich, and complex olfactory experience that mirrors Iommi's monolithic guitar riffs.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Tony Iommi Monkey Special

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Xerjoff celebrates the most significant tennis tournament held in Turin, Italy, with the intoxicating notes of TORINO21. A vigorously energetic perfume that transports the wearer to the tennis courts. Upliftingly fresh and dynamic, TORINO21 evokes the adrenaline and triumph of the accelerated atmosphere of a fast-paced match.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Torino21

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: A scent whose performance thrills and exhilarates the wearer both on and off the court, Xerjoff presents TORINO22, the invigorating perfume created to celebrate the Nitto ATP Finals for the second year running in Turin. Opening with green notes of bergamot and eucalyptus, TORINO22 leads to a heart of clary sage, and closes with a warm base of musk and dry woods. Powerful in spirit, TORINO22 mirrors the high-octane pace of the court yet remains crisp and clean in character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Torino22

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: A scent synonymous with the centuries-old sport for Xerjoff's third year as Silver Partner for the Nitto ATP Finals in Turin. Timeless and traditional, TORINO23 evokes the class and sophistication that lies at the heart of tennis. TORINO23 awakens the senses with a fresh hit of bergamot, which settles as delicate hues of rose and cardamom combine in the top notes. At the heart, a fusion of neroli and jasmine dance with the rich and heady tones of tuberose as the whole composition closes to a comforting blend of cashmere wood, amber and musk at the base. A sumptuous masterpiece that echoes the true sense of tradition and elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Torino23

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: A scent that evokes the memories that come with the friendly indoor tennis match for Xerjoff's fourth year as Silver Partner for the Nitto ATP Finals in Turin. The components that make up the match are captured in the blend, from the rubbery core of the tennis ball that bounces off the indoor court to the wooden tennis racket in hand.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Torino24

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: As a sponsor of the Nitto ATP Finals, Xerjoff has a deep connection to tennis. TORINO25 captures the essence of celebration. It evokes the emotion of lifting the winner's trophy. This perfume is the embodiment of grace and pure elation. It's the crowning achievement of a glorious legacy.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Torino25

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Uden by Xerjoff is a luxurious fragrance from the Shooting Stars collection, launched in 2007. This sophisticated scent combines bright citrus notes with boozy rum and coffee accords, wrapped in a smooth blend of woods and vanilla. Each bottle comes in a luxurious case containing a certified fragment of meteorite.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Uden

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Ten years after introducing Uden, one of the bestsellers in the Shooting Stars collection, Xerjoff presents a powerful new version of the same perfume featuring a richer olfactive pyramid, UDEN OVERDOSE. Dance upon the waves of the ocean with Uden Overdose, an enchanting fougere fragrance like no other. Exuding power and strength with every note of Uden Overdose Xerjoff, this perfume is inspired by the tempestuous sea, with enticing top notes of lemon and bergamot.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Uden Overdose

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Xerjoff's Spotlight Collection exclusively presents Via Cavour 1. Opening to top notes with quince and white peach, this delicate perfume is followed by hints of Moroccan rose dark chocolate red berries and patchouli at the heart. At the base, oud caramel amber Madagascar vanilla and musk warm up the senses. This scent is named after the street where our Turin store is located, which in turn is named after Conte Camillo Benso di Cavour. He was one of the protagonists of Italian Risorgimento, nicknamed "Father of the Nation" by Giuseppe Verdi.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Via Cavour 1

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Wardasina, meaning 'small rose', is a luxurious fragrance from Xerjoff's collection launched in 2012. This elegant tribute to the rose combines oriental and floral elements, crafted by perfumer Christian Carbonnel. The fragrance showcases a sophisticated blend of Bulgarian rose with spicy saffron, smoky cedar, and rich tobacco, creating a complex and refined olfactory experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Wardasina

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: A sophisticated fragrance that begins with fresh bergamot and earthy fig leaf notes, transitioning into a soft cloud of fig milk with woody accents of cedarwood, patchouli, and Tolu balsam. The base reveals a comforting blend of amber, musk, and Bourbon vanilla, creating a dreamy and sophisticated aura.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: White on White

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.description: Zefiro by Xerjoff is a homage to Rome and its rich Baroque history. Created in 2015 by perfumer Mathieu Nardin, this luxurious fragrance is part of the 1861 Collection. It represents a sophisticated blend of spicy, oriental, and resinous notes that embody Italian elegance and creativity.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/xer.name: Zefiro

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.description: Inspired by a montage of life-affirming experiences, especially during a magnificent ride through Hawaii's Big Island Mountains, with spectacular views of the Mauna Kea, mounted high on nature's most stately creature, Equus, whose majesty equaled the seemingly touchable clouds, which began gracefully swirling, during that magical moment at twilight, which sets the fading blue sky ablaze of pastel pink, purple and rose, trotting along the shore, while the sun slipped into the ocean.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.name: Equus N°8

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.description: Golden Aura by YeYe Parfums is a velvety and enigmatic fragrance that creates a sensual delight. Created by perfumer Ernesto Sanchez Bujanda in 2021, this Eau de Parfum combines fresh Italian Bergamot and spicy Pimento Berry in the top notes, leading to a heart of woody Cashmeran, lush Osmanthus Absolute, and green Violet Leaf. The base reveals a luxurious blend of precious Mysore Sandalwood, earthy Patchouli, sweet Vanilla, and soft White Musk.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.name: Golden Aura

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.description: Path to Infinity by YeYe Parfums is a woody-aromatic fragrance that embraces the spiritual and majestic immensity of the cosmos. Created by Ernesto Sanchez Bujanda in 2021, this Eau de Parfum combines fresh citrus notes of yuzu and mandarin with aromatic woods and spices.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.name: Path to infinity

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.description: Sentiers de Comètes by YeYe Parfums is a captivating fragrance that traces a luminous path like a comet across the night sky. Created by Ernesto Sanchez Bujanda in 2015, this sophisticated composition opens with a bright blend of Italian mandarin, bergamot, carrot seed, and pink pepper. The heart reveals a luxurious bouquet of orange blossom, jasmine, lilac, and vanilla orchid, centered around a rich tonka bean note. The base features a sensual combination of ambergris, frankincense, and Tonkin musk, creating a warm, radiant trail.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.name: Sentiers de Comètes

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.description: Inspired by sensational gardens in America's Riviera, Sunken Garden is a sophisticated blend of floral and woody notes. This 2021 creation by Ernesto Sanchez Bujanda captures the essence of nature's bounty through a harmonious composition of aromatic and fresh elements.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.name: Sunken Garden

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.description: Y.O.R.K. N°7 by YeYe Parfums is a minimalistic yet sophisticated composition created by Ernesto Sanchez Bujanda in 2015. This versatile fragrance combines fresh citrus and mint top notes with a powdery-floral heart, settling into a refined woody-musky base enhanced with Iso E Super.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yey.name: Y.O.R.K. N°7

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yle.description: Eastern Veil is like a warm, mysterious glow. It captures a unique mix of light and dark, sweet and deep. Warm, salty gourmand notes meet gentle spices. Soft woody scents and powdery iris give it a light, airy feel. This fragrance is always changing, revealing new sides. It's a perfect scent for those who love elegance with a twist.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yle.name: Eastern Veil

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yle.description: Inspired by the Helix Nebula, the 'Eye of God'. This scent is a journey into deep space. It balances awe, warmth, and the infinite. Bright spicy notes open up a universe of scent. A complex heart of dark woods and oud follows, with a hint of sweetness. A cool, metallic feel gives it an otherworldly vibe. This is a fragrance with presence and depth, a truly resinous experience.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yle.name: Eye of God

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yle.description: SOAP BUBBLE is inspired by the delicate beauty of a nebula. It's an airy and transparent scent that feels pure yet playful. Imagine sparkling notes meeting creamy, fruity, and musky accords. This creates a modern kind of freshness. It's a perfect floral fragrance for those who love minimalism with character.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/yle.name: Soap Bubble

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Step into the dark, damp world of the jungle. Bat takes you on a wild flight through a tropical night. You will smell overripe fruit waiting in the dark. It feels like exploring a warm, humid cave. Soon, deep and dark scents surround you like leathery wings. This is a very unique journey through fruity, earthy, and animalic realms. It is bold, strange, and full of life.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Bat

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Spring wakes up the forest. The beavers are busy building their home. Nearby, farmers tap trees for sweet sap. Beaver Maple Edition captures this lively scene. It mixes fresh florals with rich maple syrup and dark cacao. As it dries down, you smell dry woody notes and earthy haitian vetiver. A touch of castoreum adds an animalic edge. It feels like a cozy, rustic cabin in the woods.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Beaver Maple Ed.

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Step inside a bustling hive with **Bee** by Zoologist. Thousands of workers toil to bring sweet nectar to their queen. This gourmand and floral scent captures that frantic magic. It is a surreal and artistic journey into nature. You will feel the warmth of the hive and the hum of tiny wings. It is rich, thick, and perfectly suited for colder days. This animalic masterpiece is bold, challenging, and purely magical.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Bee

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Imagine a trek through the hot desert. The sun beats down on endless sand. A camel carries rich treasures to a far-off market. You smell sweet dates and exotic spices in the dry air. **Camel** by Zoologist is a magical journey. It blends sweet fruit with deep amber and animalic warmth. This perfume wraps you in a cozy, glowing blanket. It is perfect for those who love bold and unique scents.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Camel

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: A tropical storm has just passed. The jungle pulses with bright colors and fresh raindrops. Dreamy ylang-ylang flowers open up. They fill the heavy air with their sweet scent. Lush fruits hang from the trees, smelling ripe and juicy. A chameleon hides in this vibrant scene. It waits quietly in the colorful leaves. Chameleon Tropical Blooms Edition captures this fresh, sunny morning. It is a bright mix of floral and fruity notes. The scent shifts from lively tropical fun to quiet elegance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Chameleon Tropical Blooms Edition

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: The lush green of the treetops fades to gold. It is time to gather the harvest. Zoologist Chipmunk invites you to a cozy autumn forest. Mighty oaks drop their acorns. Small creatures scurry to collect the plumpest nuts before the snow falls. This fragrance captures a warm, natural habitat. You will feel safe and snug in a burrow of earthy and woody tones.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Chipmunk

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Step into a dense tropical forest at dusk. Zoologist **Civet** brings back the glory days of classic chypre perfumes. It is a moody and complex brew full of mystery. The scent dares you to explore its wild and alluring side. It honors the rich vintage feel of old-school perfumery without being too harsh. Warm, cozy, and deeply glamorous, it wraps around you like a heavy luxurious coat. Perfect for a sultry nighttime rendezvous.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Civet

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Spring has arrived! Cockatiel captures the joy of a sunny day. Imagine a colorful bird dancing on a golden branch. A soft breeze carries sweet honey and blossoms. This scent bursts with mischief and fun. It wraps you in a warm, fluffy hug. Discover a beautiful mix of fruity and powdery magic. Smile and let this cheeky bird take flight.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Cockatiel

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Lush green pastures stretch to the horizon. Fluffy clouds roll across a bright blue sky. In a quiet meadow, a tiny calf takes its very first steps. Soon, the scent of warm milk brings comfort to this new world. **Cow** by Zoologist captures this peaceful farm scene. Delicate floral notes sway in the soft grass. Fresh apple blends smoothly with gentle milk. The result is a comforting lactonic scent. It feels like a warm hug. It feels like coming home.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Cow

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Escape to a lush island paradise where dodos once roamed free. **Zoologist Dodo Jackfruit Edition** is a wild yet comforting journey. It starts with bright bergamot and sweet jackfruit. Soon, you wander into a fougere heart filled with calming lavender and spicy turmeric. Powdery orris and fresh geranium add a classic touch. Finally, the scent settles into wet earth, grounding you with patchouli, vetiver, and creamy sandalwood. This fruity and aromatic perfume is a refreshing twist on a classic style.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Dodo Jackfruit Edition

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Imagine a jade green pond under the warm sun. Giant lotus pads make way for tiny dragonfly nymphs. They spread their delicate wings for the first time. Nearby, golden rice fields sway in the breeze. Dragonfly captures the magic of a warm summer shower. It is a beautiful aquatic journey mixed with soft floral and green touches. It truly feels like a painting of nature right inside a bottle.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Dragonfly

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: A white shroud of mist evaporates in the morning sun. Zoologist Elephant Sanctuary Edition is an ode to the peace that comes with true freedom. Majestic elephants roam safely while young calves play. A soft veil of floral notes murmurs with quiet grace. It settles on the skin with a subtle whisper. Warm spices and a splash of tea entice you into a lush, green haven. This sanctuary is defended by the imposing presence of woods and suede. Wander your world freely with strength and serenity.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Elephant Sanctuary Edition

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Autumn winds blow across golden wheat fields. Tiny harvest mice gather seeds in the fading light. Zoologist Harvest Mouse feels like a warm hug. It brings memories of home-baked treats and sweet sunlight. This scent is a cozy mix of gourmand, woody, and aromatic notes. It is a comforting and easy-to-wear niche perfume.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Harvest Mouse

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Fly into a colorful world of blooming flowers. **Hummingbird** by Zoologist captures the sweet life of a tiny bird seeking nectar. It is a light and joyful scent that floats from petal to petal. You will find a beautiful mix of fruity juices and floral blossoms. It feels like a sunny spring day in a lush garden. The perfume wraps you in a cozy, sweet dream of nature.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Hummingbird

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: The African sun beats down on hot mountain rocks. A family of hyrax comes out to sunbathe. This animalic scent captures that wild moment. It is daring and primitive. You get the smell of hot dust and petrified stones. It is tamed just a bit by sweet florals. **Hyrax** uses real African stone for a truly unique and bold feel. It is a woody and musk perfume that is not for everyone. If you love a wild scent, this is for you.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Hyrax

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Step into the dark, damp Indian forest. Danger lurks in the shadows. King Cobra by Zoologist is a daring, primal scent. It captures the fierce spirit of the ultimate predator. The fragrance opens with a sharp, cool bite. Soon, it reveals a rich heart of spices and damp earth. Finally, a heavy base of smoke and woods takes over. This is a bold green and aromatic journey. It is meant for those who want to rule. It blends earthy power with undeniable mystery.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: King Cobra

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: With boundless curiosity, a baby koala emerges from its mother's pouch into the warm Australian sun. Koala Joey Edition by Zoologist captures this exciting moment of discovery. The air hums with crisp eucalyptus and earthy forest whispers. As the joey seeks a new tree to call home, vibrant herbs weave with sunlit warmth. It is a comforting and timeless green scent, blending the wild outdoors with an aromatic freshness.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Koala Joey Edition

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Lovebird by Zoologist captures the thrill of a new romance. It opens with a bright burst of kiwi, orange, and passionfruit. These fruity notes feel sweet and quick like a first kiss. A lovely mix of ylang-ylang, lavender, lily of the valley, and heliotrope pulls you closer. At the end, ambrette, musk, and amber create a warm hug. It leaves a soft, lasting glow of love.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Lovebird (Special Edition)

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Against a mountain backdrop, playful macaques swing through the trees. The crisp, sweet scent of apple floats through a quiet pine forest. This fragrance blends light, joyful fruit with deep, calming resins. Notes of hinoki wood and myrrh bring a quiet, grounded feeling like an ancient temple. It finishes with a touch of creamy sandalwood. Experience a perfect balance of playful energy and deep peace in this fruity and woody scent.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Macaque Fuji Apple Edition

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Discover the peace of a mountain temple. Zoologist Macaque Yuzu Edition blends bright citrus with grounding woods. Crisp yuzu dances through a serene pine forest. Soon, warm hinoki wood and calming myrrh wrap you in comfort. Soft incense adds a touch of smoky magic. This woody scent is an uplifting escape to nature. It finds harmony between joyful energy and deep relaxation.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Macaque Yuzu Edition

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Moth by Zoologist hides in the shadows. It is a dark and gothic perfume. At first you get a heavy blast of spicy notes. Then it turns into a soft and powdery floral scent. Think of an old abandoned house full of secrets. You can smell antique lace, old wood, and sweet honey. A deep smoky vibe stays with you all day. It reminds you of a moth drawn to a flame. This unique blend is mysterious and bold. It is perfect for those who love rare and artistic fragrances.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Moth

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Cold winter winds blow through the Siberian forest. A lonely musk deer looks for a mate among the frozen roots. This perfume captures that wild, romantic spirit. It uses clean musks, rich woods, and soft florals to mimic the real thing. You will feel a warm, fuzzy embrace without any harsh edges. It is a stunning blend of musk, woody, and animalic magic.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Musk Deer

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Messengers of spring arrive to chase away the winter chill. The joyous song of the nightingale fills the air. This fragrance captures the beauty of Japanese plum blossoms. It is a stunning floral chypre that melts your heart. Like a silk kimono, it wraps you in rich elegance. It tells a poetic tale of love, loss, and new beginnings. This classic scent feels deeply emotional and profound.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Nightingale

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Branches lie bare against a grey winter sky. As other birds fly south, the bold cardinal stays behind. A bright flash of red brings life to the quiet, snowy landscape. Northern Cardinal captures this festive spirit. It mixes bright citrus with a rich floral heart. Tart green touches wrap around warm, woody base notes. Wear this cheerful perfume to spark joy on a cold, bleak day.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Northern Cardinal

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Deep underground, rainwater carves through limestone. A hidden cave forms where pale, blind olms swim in dark rivers. This aquatic and mineral scent captures that hidden world. You will smell wet rocks, cold water, and damp earth. It is strange, unique, and deeply atmospheric. Let this dark cave awaken your senses.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Olm

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Step into a humid tropical rainforest with **Orchid Mantis** by Zoologist. This floral and green fragrance hides a beastly secret. It starts like a sweet, inviting flower to lure you in. Then, it snaps shut. You will find juicy pear and exotic orchid mixed with wild air. Rich moss and patchouli create an earthy, wet soil feel. An enduring musk leaves a deep, wild trail. True beauty can also be fierce.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Orchid Mantis

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Step into a lush bamboo forest after a fresh rain. Panda by Zoologist captures the playful spirit of this gentle giant. It mixes bright fruits and delicate blooms with a damp, earthy base. The scent feels happy and vibrant, like a cool breeze on a warm day. You will notice a unique blend of green, floral, and slightly animalic tones. It is a fun, everyday fragrance that stands out from the crowd.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Panda

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: A merciless cyclone howls across the ice. Emperor penguins huddle against the freezing wind to protect their young. Penguin captures this extreme landscape. It starts with a freezing blast of aquatic winds and cold ice. Then a rugged warmth breaks through the snow. This is a journey from biting cold to a comforting, leathery embrace.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Penguin

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Dive into the dangerous waters of the ocean. This bold scent captures the deadly beauty of the Portuguese man o' war. Blazing sun meets a salty breeze. You will feel a fiery sting that gives way to the deep, dark sea. It is an adventurous mix of aquatic and spicy elements. Experience the thrill of the waves with this daring fragrance.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Portuguese Man O' War

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Step into a moonlit meadow. The air smells of fresh clover and sweet hay. Little rabbits hop through the dark. They sniff wild violets and dig into the soft dirt. You can smell the spicy roots and green leaves. Soon, the scent turns into a warm, comforting hug. It feels like a magical childhood memory. This scent is a cozy mix of green and gourmand magic.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Rabbit

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Under a hot sun, the mighty rhino guards his dusty land. His tough skin fights the wild, hot wind. Rhinoceros by Zoologist starts with a strong splash of sweet rum and sharp whiskey. Soon, mellow coffee joins the mix. This bold scent takes you on a dusty journey. Rich leather, Laotian oud, and incense float in a cloud of smoky tobacco. An amber path leads the way, dotted with patchouli and oakmoss. It is a very boozy and leathery fragrance for those who make their own rules.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Rhinoceros

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Zoologist Sacred Scarab captures the magic of ancient Egypt. It brings the mystery of Kyphi incense to life in a modern way. This scent is a path to rebirth and discovery. It begins bright like the morning sun, then turns into a quiet, dark mystery. The blend offers resinous magic with a hint of smoky darkness and animalic power. It feels deeply sacred, highly artistic, and very regal.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Sacred Scarab

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Dive into a vibrant coral garden with **Seahorse**. This playful scent captures the magic of balmy sunlight dancing on turquoise waves. Watch as seahorses waltz through colorful reefs in a bright, utopian sea. It turns expectations upside down by mixing unusual pairs like sweet blooms and salty ocean greens. This aquatic and floral perfume is a joyful, out-of-office escape. It feels like a sunny holiday snorkeling in a crystal-clear lagoon.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Seahorse

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Sloth by Zoologist captures the sleepy peace of the rainforest canopy. Hide away from the chaos below in a cozy fortress of green vines and damp moss. This calming fragrance wraps you in a slow, dreamy bubble. It feels like a warm cup of herbal tea on a humid jungle morning. Let your stress melt away as you breathe in the soothing blend of floral and earthy aromas.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Sloth

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Step into a frozen winter landscape with Snowy Owl. This unique perfume captures the crisp chill of deep snow and bitter winds. Beneath the ice, you can smell the damp soil and hidden life. It starts with a blast of cool mint and fresh snow. Soon, it reveals a soft and majestic heart. It is a true experience for lovers of musk, floral, and earthy scents. Wear it to feel refreshed on a hot summer day or to fully embrace the cold.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Snowy Owl

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: Dive into the dark, endless depths of the ocean. Squid by Zoologist is not your typical sunny beach scent. It captures the cold, salty mystery of the deep sea. A massive sperm whale dives, leaving precious ambergris in its wake. This elusive treasure blends with tangy brine and sweet, cloudy ink. It is an elegant, melancholy tale of the sea. If you want an aquatic scent that feels truly wild and deep, this is your perfect match.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Squid

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: The moon fades over dark grasslands. Gleaming eyes pierce the gloom. A tiger advances, ready to strike. Like a deep growl in the night, Tiger couples danger with majesty. Earthy vetiver is striped with bright kumquat, saffron, and jasmine. Frankincense lurks at the edges. It is shrouded by smoky undertones of papyrus and ebony wood. This bold, woody scent arouses intrigue and puts everyone on high alert.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Tiger

https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.description: A massive predator roams a hot, ancient earth. Suddenly, a fiery meteor strikes. The world bursts into flames. Zoologist Tyrannosaurus Rex captures this terrifying doom. It is a giant smoky and woody fragrance. It bites into delicate perfumes and rips them apart. You will smell burning forests, primitive flowers, and a hint of danger. It is thrilling, dark, and far from ordinary.
https://www.parfinity.com/en/perfume/zoo.name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
